  <script>
    (function () {
    const TRACKING_POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 30000;

    const CONNECTION_CONNECTED_THRESHOLD_MS = 10000;
    const CONNECTION_DISCONNECTED_THRESHOLD_MS = 10000;
    const ROUTE_MAX_INSTANT_SPEED_MPS = 70;
    const ROUTE_MAX_SPEED_JUMP_MPS = 14;
    const ROUTE_STATIONARY_SPEED_BASELINE_MPS = 1.5;
    const ROUTE_STATIONARY_HIGH_SPEED_FACTOR = 2.0;
    const ROUTE_RECENT_SPEED_WINDOW_SIZE = 5;
    const ROUTE_MIN_POINT_DISTANCE_METERS = 2;
    const FAILSAFE_RETURN_TRANSPORT_MODE = 'driving';
    const ROUTE_INPUT_DEBOUNCE_MS = 250;
    const SUGGESTION_RENDER_BATCH_SIZE = 40;
    const RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_STORAGE_KEY = 'mapRecentRouteSuggestions';
    const RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_MAX_ENTRIES = 10;
    const LAST_HEADING_BY_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY = 'mapLastHeadingByDeviceKey';
    const LOCATE_BUTTON_ACTIVE_MS = 400;
    const OWNTRACKS_LOCATION_POLL_INTERVAL_MS = 100;
    const OWNTRACKS_LOCATION_WAIT_MAX_MS = 20000;
    const OWNTRACKS_LOCATE_BUTTON_MAX_WAIT_MS = 7000;
    const AUTO_FOLLOW_RESUME_AFTER_IDLE_MS = 10000;
    const AUTO_FOLLOW_MIN_PAN_DISTANCE_METERS = 3;
    const AUTO_FOLLOW_PAN_DURATION_SECONDS = 0.9;
    const OWNTRACKS_STATUS_PROBE_INTERVAL_MS = 20000;
    const OWNTRACKS_STATUS_PROBE_MAX_WAIT_MS = 20000;
    const OWNTRACKS_STATUS_PROBE_FAILS_BEFORE_DISCONNECTED = 2;
    const LIVE_TRACKING_WS_PATH = '/ws/live-tracking';
    const LIVE_TRACKING_RECONNECT_INITIAL_MS = 1500;
    const LIVE_TRACKING_RECONNECT_MAX_MS = 10000;
    const MARKER_MOVE_MIN_DURATION_MS = 500;
    const MARKER_MOVE_MAX_DURATION_MS = 1800;
    const MAP_LONG_PRESS_DURATION_MS = 500;
    const MAP_LONG_PRESS_MAX_MOVEMENT_PIXELS = 12;
    const PLACE_SHEET_COLLAPSED_TOP_OFFSET_PX = 200;

    function loadLastHeadingsFromStorage() {
      const resultByKey = {};
      try {
        const rawJson = localStorage.getItem(LAST_HEADING_BY_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY);
        if (!rawJson) {
          return resultByKey;
        }
        const parsedRecord = JSON.parse(rawJson);
        if (!parsedRecord || typeof parsedRecord !== 'object' || Array.isArray(parsedRecord)) {
          return resultByKey;
        }
        Object.keys(parsedRecord).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
          if (!deviceKey || typeof deviceKey !== 'string') {
            return;
          }
          const rawValue = parsedRecord[deviceKey];
          const numericHeading = typeof rawValue === 'number' ? rawValue : Number(rawValue);
          if (!Number.isFinite(numericHeading)) {
            return;
          }
          resultByKey[deviceKey] = ((numericHeading % 360) + 360) % 360;
        });
      } catch (storageReadError) {
        console.warn('Konnte gespeicherte Karten-Richtungen nicht lesen:', storageReadError);
      }
      return resultByKey;
    }

    const state = {
      map: null,
      vectorRenderer: null,
      baseTileLayer: null,
      currentBaseMapStyle: 'light',
      triggerTilePrefetch: null,

      mapLastCenteredDeviceKeyInAllMode: null,

      shouldAutoFitTrackLine: false,
      savedPlaces: [],
      visibleSavedPlaceMarkers: {},
      selectedDeletePlaceIdSet: {},
      savedRoutes: [],
      visibleSavedRouteLayers: {},
      selectedDeleteRouteIdSet: {},
      pointsCounterDeviceKey: '',
      pointsCounterPrevReceivedByKey: {},
      routeSuggestions: [],
      recentRouteSuggestions: [],
      waypointSuggestions: [],
      renderedRouteSuggestionCount: 0,
      suggestionRenderBatchSize: SUGGESTION_RENDER_BATCH_SIZE,
      selectedRouteSuggestion: null,
      selectedWaypointSuggestion: null,
      routeSuggestTimer: null,
      waypointSuggestTimer: null,
      routeSuggestAbortController: null,
      routeSuggestRequestToken: 0,
      suggestionCacheByQuery: {},
      waypointEditorRows: [],
      activeWaypointRowId: null,
      waypointSuggestionTargetRowId: null,
      pendingFocusWaypointRowId: null,
      liveTrackingSocket: null,
      liveTrackingReconnectTimer: null,
      liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs: LIVE_TRACKING_RECONNECT_INITIAL_MS,
      liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp: false,
      liveTrackingUpdateInFlight: false,
      liveTrackingUpdatePending: false,
      owntracksLocateWakeResolvers: [],
      lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt: 0,
      devicesByKey: {},
      orderedDeviceKeys: [],
      selectedDeviceKey: null,
      showAllDevicesOnMap: false,
      allDeviceMarkersByKey: {},
      autoFollowEnabled: false,
      autoFollowResumeTimer: null,
      lastKnownCurrentLatLng: null,
      lastKnownLatLngByDevice: {},
      connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey: {},
      owntracksProbeWatchdogFailedByKey: {},
      owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice: {},
      owntracksStatusProbeInFlight: false,
      owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey: {},
      currentMarkerAnimationFrame: null,
      latestHeadingDegrees: null,
      lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey: loadLastHeadingsFromStorage(),
      failsafeReturnMarker: null,
      failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey: {},
      failsafeReturnRouteLine: null,
      failsafeReturnRouteMeta: null,
      failsafeRouteRequestInFlight: false,
      failsafeReturnMarkersByKey: {},
      failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey: {},
      failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey: {},
      activeSearchTarget: null,
      selectedRouteStart: null,
      longPressMarker: null,
      placeSheetCurrentPoint: null,
      placeSheetSnapState: 'collapsed',
      placeSheetDragging: false,
      placeSheetSuppressNextMapClick: false
    };

    const MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS = 5;
    const BASE_MAP_STYLES = {
      light: {
        id: 'light',
        label: 'Helle Karte',
        tileUrl: 'tiles/light/{z}/{x}/{y}',
        attribution: '© OpenStreetMap © CARTO',
        subdomains: []
      },
      colored: {
        id: 'colored',
        label: 'Farbige Karte',
        tileUrl: 'tiles/colored/{z}/{x}/{y}',
        attribution: '© OpenStreetMap',
        subdomains: []
      }
    };

    const greenIcon = new L.Icon({
      iconUrl: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pointhi/leaflet-color-markers/master/img/marker-icon-green.png',
      shadowUrl: 'https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/images/marker-shadow.png',
      iconSize: [25, 41],
      iconAnchor: [12, 41],
      popupAnchor: [1, -34],
      shadowSize: [41, 41]
    });

    const redIcon = new L.Icon({
      iconUrl: 'https://raw.githubusercontent.com/pointhi/leaflet-color-markers/master/img/marker-icon-red.png',
      shadowUrl: 'https://unpkg.com/leaflet@1.9.4/dist/images/marker-shadow.png',
      iconSize: [25, 41],
      iconAnchor: [12, 41],
      popupAnchor: [1, -34],
      shadowSize: [41, 41]
    });

    function formatTime(unixMillis) {
      if (!unixMillis) {
        return '-';
      }
      const timestampDate = new Date(unixMillis);
      return timestampDate.toLocaleString('de-DE');
    }

    function formatValue(value, suffix) {
      if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') {
        return '-';
      }
      return suffix ? String(value) + ' ' + suffix : String(value);
    }

    function getStatusClassByLevel(level) {
      if (level === 'green') {
        return 'status-chip status-green';
      }
      if (level === 'yellow') {
        return 'status-chip status-yellow';
      }
      if (level === 'red') {
        return 'status-chip status-red';
      }
      return 'status-chip status-gray';
    }

    function setStatusChip(elementId, statusText, statusLevel) {
      const statusElement = byId(elementId);
      if (!statusElement) {
        return;
      }
      statusElement.className = getStatusClassByLevel(statusLevel);
      statusElement.textContent = statusText;
    }

    function showLocateLoadingBadge(loadingText) {
      const loadingBadgeElement = byId('locateLoadingBadge');
      if (!loadingBadgeElement) {
        return;
      }
      loadingBadgeElement.textContent = loadingText || 'Standort wird geladen...';
      loadingBadgeElement.classList.add('visible');
    }

    function hideLocateLoadingBadge() {
      const loadingBadgeElement = byId('locateLoadingBadge');
      if (!loadingBadgeElement) {
        return;
      }
      loadingBadgeElement.classList.remove('visible');
    }

    function getNormalizedDeviceEntries(deviceMap) {
      if (!deviceMap || typeof deviceMap !== 'object') {
        return [];
      }
      const groupedByStableId = {};
      Object.keys(deviceMap).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        const entry = deviceMap[deviceKey];
        if (!entry || typeof entry !== 'object' || !String(deviceKey).trim()) {
          return;
        }
        const lastReceiveUnixMillis = Number(entry.receivedAt || entry.timestamp);
        const receiveTimestampIsUsable = Number.isFinite(lastReceiveUnixMillis) && lastReceiveUnixMillis > 0;
        const sortTimestamp = receiveTimestampIsUsable ? lastReceiveUnixMillis : 0;
        const stableId = 'key:' + deviceKey;
        const prev = groupedByStableId[stableId];
        const prevTs = prev ? Number(prev.entry.receivedAt || prev.entry.timestamp || 0) : 0;
        if (!prev || sortTimestamp >= prevTs) {
          groupedByStableId[stableId] = { key: deviceKey, entry: entry };
        }
      });
      return Object.keys(groupedByStableId).map(function (stableId) {
        return groupedByStableId[stableId];
      }).sort(function (leftEntry, rightEntry) {
        return leftEntry.key.localeCompare(rightEntry.key);
      });
    }

    function updateDeviceSwitcherUi() {
      const previousDeviceButton = byId('prevDeviceBtn');
      const nextDeviceButton = byId('nextDeviceBtn');
      const toggleDeviceViewButton = byId('toggleDeviceViewBtn');
      const dropDeviceButton = byId('dropDeviceBtn');
      const deviceSwitchMeta = byId('deviceSwitchMeta');
      const totalDevices = state.orderedDeviceKeys.length;
      const selectedIndex = state.selectedDeviceKey
        ? state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(state.selectedDeviceKey)
        : -1;
      if (previousDeviceButton) {
        previousDeviceButton.disabled = totalDevices <= 1;
      }
      if (nextDeviceButton) {
        nextDeviceButton.disabled = totalDevices <= 1;
      }
      if (dropDeviceButton) {
        dropDeviceButton.disabled = totalDevices === 0;
      }
      if (toggleDeviceViewButton) {
        toggleDeviceViewButton.disabled = totalDevices === 0;
        toggleDeviceViewButton.classList.toggle('active', !!state.showAllDevicesOnMap);
        toggleDeviceViewButton.title = state.showAllDevicesOnMap
          ? 'Nur ausgewähltes Gerät auf Karte anzeigen'
          : 'Alle Geräte auf Karte anzeigen';
      }
      if (deviceSwitchMeta) {
        if (totalDevices === 0 || selectedIndex < 0) {
          deviceSwitchMeta.textContent = '0/0';
        } else {
          deviceSwitchMeta.textContent = String(selectedIndex + 1) + '/' + String(totalDevices);
        }
      }
    }

    function applyDeviceSnapshot(deviceMap) {
      const normalizedEntries = getNormalizedDeviceEntries(deviceMap);
      state.devicesByKey = {};
      normalizedEntries.forEach(function (wrappedEntry) {
        state.devicesByKey[wrappedEntry.key] = wrappedEntry.entry;
        const ll = parseEntryLatLon(wrappedEntry.entry);
        if (ll) {
          state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[wrappedEntry.key] = ll;
        }
      });
      state.orderedDeviceKeys = normalizedEntries.map(function (wrappedEntry) {
        return wrappedEntry.key;
      });
      if (state.selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]) {
        updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
        return;
      }
      if (state.orderedDeviceKeys.length > 0) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = state.orderedDeviceKeys[0];
      } else {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = null;
      }
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
    }

    function getSelectedDeviceTarget() {
      const selectedDeviceEntry = state.selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]
        ? state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]
        : null;
      if (selectedDeviceEntry && typeof selectedDeviceEntry.user === 'string' && typeof selectedDeviceEntry.device === 'string') {
        return {
          user: selectedDeviceEntry.user,
          device: selectedDeviceEntry.device
        };
      }
      if (state.selectedDeviceKey && state.selectedDeviceKey.indexOf('/') > 0) {
        const separatorIndex = state.selectedDeviceKey.indexOf('/');
        const fallbackUser = state.selectedDeviceKey.slice(0, separatorIndex).trim();
        const fallbackDevice = state.selectedDeviceKey.slice(separatorIndex + 1).trim();
        if (fallbackUser && fallbackDevice) {
          return {
            user: fallbackUser,
            device: fallbackDevice
          };
        }
      }
      return null;
    }

    function getSelectedDeviceKey() {
      return state.selectedDeviceKey || '';
    }

    function clearAllDeviceMarkers() {
      Object.keys(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        const marker = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        if (marker && state.map) {
          state.map.removeLayer(marker);
        }
        delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
      });
    }

    function removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap() {
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      if (state.currentMarker && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentMarker);
        state.currentMarker = null;
      }
    }

    function parseEntryLatLon(entry) {
      if (!entry || typeof entry !== 'object') {
        return null;
      }
      const lat = Number(entry.lat);
      const lon = Number(entry.lon);
      if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon) ||
        lat < -90 || lat > 90 || lon < -180 || lon > 180) {
        return null;
      }
      return [lat, lon];
    }

    function resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(deviceKey) {
      const entry = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey];
      const fromEntry = parseEntryLatLon(entry);
      if (fromEntry) {
        state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[deviceKey] = fromEntry;
        return fromEntry;
      }
      const cached = state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[deviceKey];
      if (cached && Array.isArray(cached) && cached.length >= 2 &&
        Number.isFinite(Number(cached[0])) && Number.isFinite(Number(cached[1]))) {
        return [Number(cached[0]), Number(cached[1])];
      }
      return null;
    }

    function allMapDeviceKeysOrdered() {
      const seen = {};
      const out = [];
      function add(key) {
        if (!key || !String(key).trim() || seen[key]) {
          return;
        }
        seen[key] = true;
        out.push(key);
      }
      state.orderedDeviceKeys.forEach(add);
      Object.keys(state.devicesByKey).forEach(add);
      Object.keys(state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice).forEach(add);
      out.sort(function (a, b) { return a.localeCompare(b); });
      return out;
    }

    const DEVICE_MARKER_ACCENTS = [
      '#c0392b', '#2980b9', '#27ae60', '#8e44ad', '#d35400', '#16a085', '#e67e22', '#34495e'
    ];
    const PER_DEVICE_MAP_CIRCLE_RADIUS = 8;

    function getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey) {
      const key = deviceKey ? String(deviceKey) : '';
      let hash = 0;
      for (let i = 0; i < key.length; i += 1) {
        hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + key.charCodeAt(i);
        hash |= 0;
      }
      return DEVICE_MARKER_ACCENTS[(hash >>> 0) % DEVICE_MARKER_ACCENTS.length];
    }

    function syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers() {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const nextKeys = {};
      const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const showEveryDevice = !!state.showAllDevicesOnMap;

      function removeMarkerIfWrongType(deviceKey, wantDivIconMarker) {
        const existing = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        if (!existing) {
          return;
        }
        const isDivIcon = typeof existing.setIcon === 'function';
        if (wantDivIconMarker === isDivIcon) {
          return;
        }
        state.map.removeLayer(existing);
        delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
      }

      function upsertCircleMarker(deviceKey, markerLatLng, circleStyle) {
        nextKeys[deviceKey] = true;
        removeMarkerIfWrongType(deviceKey, false);
        const entry = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey];
        const popupLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(deviceKey, entry);
        let existingMarker = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        if (!existingMarker) {
          existingMarker = L.circleMarker(markerLatLng, withVectorRenderer(circleStyle)).addTo(state.map);
          state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey] = existingMarker;
        } else {
          existingMarker.setLatLng(markerLatLng);
          existingMarker.setStyle(withVectorRenderer(circleStyle));
        }
        existingMarker.bindPopup('Gerät: ' + popupLabel);
      }

      function upsertAllModeFacingMarker(deviceKey, markerLatLng) {
        nextKeys[deviceKey] = true;
        removeMarkerIfWrongType(deviceKey, true);
        const entry = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey];
        const popupLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(deviceKey, entry);
        const nh = normalizeHeadingDegrees(entry && entry.heading);
        rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(deviceKey, nh);
        const eff = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(deviceKey, nh);
        const icon = createCurrentPositionIcon(deviceKey, eff);
        let m = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        if (!m) {
          m = L.marker(markerLatLng, {
            icon: icon,
            zIndexOffset: 2000,
            rotateWithView: true,
            rotation: 0
          }).addTo(state.map);
          state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey] = m;
        } else {
          m.setLatLng(markerLatLng);
          m.setIcon(icon);
        }
        m.bindPopup('Gerät: ' + popupLabel);
      }

      if (showEveryDevice) {
        allMapDeviceKeysOrdered().forEach(function (deviceKey) {
          const markerLatLng = resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(deviceKey);
          if (!markerLatLng) {
            return;
          }
          upsertAllModeFacingMarker(deviceKey, markerLatLng);
        });
      } else {
        if (selectedKey && state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[selectedKey]) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[selectedKey]);
          delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[selectedKey];
        }
        allMapDeviceKeysOrdered().forEach(function (deviceKey) {
          if (!selectedKey || deviceKey === selectedKey) {
            return;
          }
          const markerLatLng = resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(deviceKey);
          if (!markerLatLng) {
            return;
          }
          upsertCircleMarker(deviceKey, markerLatLng, {
            radius: PER_DEVICE_MAP_CIRCLE_RADIUS,
            color: getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey),
            fillColor: '#ffffff',
            fillOpacity: 0.58,
            weight: 2
          });
        });
      }

      Object.keys(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        if (!nextKeys[deviceKey]) {
          const marker = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
          if (marker && state.map) {
            state.map.removeLayer(marker);
          }
          delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        }
      });
      if (typeof performBearingSyncNow === 'function') {
        performBearingSyncNow();
      }
    }

    function renderAllDeviceMarkers() {
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
    }

    function toggleDeviceViewMode() {
      state.showAllDevicesOnMap = !state.showAllDevicesOnMap;
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap();
        state.mapLastCenteredDeviceKeyInAllMode = null;
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        updateFailsafeOverlaysForAllDevices().catch(function (failsafeError) {
          console.error('Fehler beim Aktualisieren der Failsafe-Overlays im ALL-Modus:', failsafeError);
        });
      } else {
        state.mapLastCenteredDeviceKeyInAllMode = null;
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
      }
      triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
    }

    async function fetchHistoryForSelectedDevice() {
      const selectedTarget = getSelectedDeviceTarget();
      if (selectedTarget && selectedTarget.user && selectedTarget.device) {
        const historyUrl = '/api/history/' +
          encodeURIComponent(selectedTarget.user) + '/' +
          encodeURIComponent(selectedTarget.device);
        return await fetchJson(historyUrl);
      }
      return await fetchJson('/api/history');
    }

    function positionEntryMatchesSelectedDevice(positionEntry, selectedKey) {
      if (!positionEntry || !selectedKey) {
        return false;
      }
      const selectedEntry = state.devicesByKey[selectedKey];
      if (selectedEntry === positionEntry) {
        return true;
      }
      if (typeof positionEntry.key === 'string' && positionEntry.key === selectedKey) {
        return true;
      }
      if (!selectedEntry) {
        return false;
      }
      const positionUser = typeof positionEntry.user === 'string' ? positionEntry.user.trim() : '';
      const positionDevice = typeof positionEntry.device === 'string' ? positionEntry.device.trim() : '';
      const selectedUser = typeof selectedEntry.user === 'string' ? selectedEntry.user.trim() : '';
      const selectedDevice = typeof selectedEntry.device === 'string' ? selectedEntry.device.trim() : '';
      if (positionUser && positionDevice && selectedUser && selectedDevice &&
        positionUser === selectedUser && positionDevice === selectedDevice) {
        return true;
      }
      return false;
    }

    function getSelectedOrFallbackPosition(lastPositionEntry) {
      const selectedKey = state.selectedDeviceKey;
      const selectedDeviceEntry = selectedKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedKey]
        ? state.devicesByKey[selectedKey]
        : null;
      if (selectedDeviceEntry &&
        typeof selectedDeviceEntry.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof selectedDeviceEntry.lon === 'number') {
        return selectedDeviceEntry;
      }
      if (lastPositionEntry &&
        selectedKey &&
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lon === 'number' &&
        positionEntryMatchesSelectedDevice(lastPositionEntry, selectedKey)) {
        return lastPositionEntry;
      }
      return selectedDeviceEntry || null;
    }

    function switchDevice(stepDirection) {
      if (!Array.isArray(state.orderedDeviceKeys) || state.orderedDeviceKeys.length < 2) {
        return;
      }
      const currentIndex = state.selectedDeviceKey
        ? state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(state.selectedDeviceKey)
        : -1;
      const safeIndex = currentIndex >= 0 ? currentIndex : 0;
      const nextIndex = (safeIndex + stepDirection + state.orderedDeviceKeys.length) % state.orderedDeviceKeys.length;
      state.selectedDeviceKey = state.orderedDeviceKeys[nextIndex];
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      syncTrackingStateFromServer().catch(function (error) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Synchronisieren des Tracking-Status nach Gerätewechsel:', error);
      });
      triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
    }

    async function removeSelectedDevice() {
      const selectedTarget = getSelectedDeviceTarget();
      if (!selectedTarget) {
        return;
      }
      const confirmRemoval = window.confirm('Gerät "' + (state.selectedDeviceKey || (selectedTarget.user + '/' + selectedTarget.device)) + '" entfernen?');
      if (!confirmRemoval) {
        return;
      }
      await fetchJson(
        '/api/devices/' + encodeURIComponent(selectedTarget.user) + '/' + encodeURIComponent(selectedTarget.device),
        { method: 'DELETE' }
      );
      if (state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]) {
        delete state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey];
      }
      state.orderedDeviceKeys = Object.keys(state.devicesByKey).sort(function (leftKey, rightKey) {
        return leftKey.localeCompare(rightKey);
      });
      if (state.orderedDeviceKeys.length > 0) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = state.orderedDeviceKeys[0];
      } else {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = null;
      }
      state.savedPlaces = [];
      state.savedRoutes = [];
      clearSavedPlaceMarkers();
      clearSavedRouteLayers();
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      await Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes(), loadTracking()]);
    }

    function clearAutoFollowResumeTimer() {
      if (!state.autoFollowResumeTimer) {
        return;
      }
      clearTimeout(state.autoFollowResumeTimer);
      state.autoFollowResumeTimer = null;
    }

    function followCurrentPositionOnMap(latLng, forceFollow) {
      if (!state.map || !Array.isArray(latLng) || latLng.length < 2) {
        return;
      }
      state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [latLng[0], latLng[1]];
      if (!state.autoFollowEnabled && !forceFollow) {
        return;
      }
      const currentCenter = state.map.getCenter();
      if (!currentCenter || typeof state.map.distance !== 'function') {
        state.map.panTo(latLng);
        return;
      }
      const panDistanceMeters = state.map.distance(currentCenter, L.latLng(latLng[0], latLng[1]));
      if (!forceFollow && panDistanceMeters < AUTO_FOLLOW_MIN_PAN_DISTANCE_METERS) {
        return;
      }
      state.map.panTo(latLng, {
        animate: true,
        duration: AUTO_FOLLOW_PAN_DURATION_SECONDS,
        easeLinearity: 0.25
      });
    }

    function scheduleAutoFollowResume() {
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      state.autoFollowResumeTimer = setTimeout(function () {
        state.autoFollowResumeTimer = null;
        state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
        if (state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng) {
          followCurrentPositionOnMap(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng, true);
        }
      }, AUTO_FOLLOW_RESUME_AFTER_IDLE_MS);
    }

    function disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction() {
      if (state.autoFollowEnabled) {
        state.autoFollowEnabled = false;
      }
      scheduleAutoFollowResume();
    }

    function connectionStatusKeyForDevice(deviceKey) {
      return deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '__none__';
    }

    function tryClearForcedDisconnectAfterFreshPoint(deviceKey, positionEntry) {
      if (!deviceKey || !positionEntry || typeof positionEntry !== 'object') {
        return;
      }
      if (typeof positionEntry.key === 'string' && positionEntry.key && positionEntry.key !== deviceKey) {
        return;
      }
      const hasPosition =
        typeof positionEntry.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof positionEntry.lon === 'number' &&
        !isNaN(positionEntry.lat) &&
        !isNaN(positionEntry.lon);
      if (!hasPosition) {
        return;
      }
      const nowUnixMillis = Date.now();
      const lastReceiveUnixMillis = Number(positionEntry.receivedAt || positionEntry.timestamp);
      if (!Number.isFinite(lastReceiveUnixMillis) || lastReceiveUnixMillis <= 0) {
        return;
      }
      const ageUnixMillis = nowUnixMillis - lastReceiveUnixMillis;
      if (ageUnixMillis > CONNECTION_CONNECTED_THRESHOLD_MS) {
        return;
      }
      const key = String(deviceKey).trim();
      delete state.owntracksProbeWatchdogFailedByKey[key];
      delete state.owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey[key];
      delete state.owntracksProbeWatchdogFailedByKey.__default__;
      delete state.owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey.__default__;
      state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[connectionStatusKeyForDevice(key)] = true;
    }

    function evaluateConnectionStatus(lastPositionEntry, deviceKey) {
      const hysteresisKey = connectionStatusKeyForDevice(deviceKey);
      if (!state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey = {};
      }
      if (!lastPositionEntry || typeof lastPositionEntry !== 'object') {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
        return { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
      }
      const hasPosition =
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lon === 'number' &&
        !isNaN(lastPositionEntry.lat) &&
        !isNaN(lastPositionEntry.lon);
      if (!hasPosition) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
        return { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
      }
      const nowUnixMillis = Date.now();
      const lastReceiveUnixMillis = Number(lastPositionEntry.receivedAt || lastPositionEntry.timestamp);
      const receiveTimestampIsUsable = Number.isFinite(lastReceiveUnixMillis) && lastReceiveUnixMillis > 0;
      const ageUnixMillis = receiveTimestampIsUsable ? nowUnixMillis - lastReceiveUnixMillis : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
      if (!Number.isFinite(ageUnixMillis)) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
        return { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
      }
      if (state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey]) {
        if (ageUnixMillis > CONNECTION_DISCONNECTED_THRESHOLD_MS) {
          state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
          return { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
        }
        return { text: 'Verbunden', level: 'green' };
      }
      if (ageUnixMillis <= CONNECTION_CONNECTED_THRESHOLD_MS) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = true;
        return { text: 'Verbunden', level: 'green' };
      }
      return { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
    }

    function resetConnectionStatusUi() {
      state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey = {};
      state.owntracksProbeWatchdogFailedByKey = {};
      state.owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey = {};
      setStatusChip('connStatus', 'Getrennt', 'red');
      const chipElement = byId('connStatus');
      if (chipElement) {
        chipElement.removeAttribute('title');
      }
    }

    function getHumanDeviceLabel(deviceKey, deviceTarget) {
      const normalizedKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '';
      const deviceEntry = normalizedKey && state.devicesByKey[normalizedKey]
        ? state.devicesByKey[normalizedKey]
        : null;
      if (normalizedKey.indexOf('/') > 0) {
        return normalizedKey;
      }
      if (deviceEntry && deviceEntry.user && deviceEntry.device) {
        return String(deviceEntry.user) + '/' + String(deviceEntry.device);
      }
      if (normalizedKey) {
        return normalizedKey;
      }
      if (deviceTarget && deviceTarget.user && deviceTarget.device) {
        return String(deviceTarget.user) + '/' + String(deviceTarget.device);
      }
      return 'Unbekannt';
    }

    function applyDeviceConnectionFailure(deviceKey, optionalTitle) {
      const failureKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim()
        ? String(deviceKey).trim()
        : getOwntracksProbeFailureKey();
      state.owntracksProbeWatchdogFailedByKey[failureKey] = true;
      const hysteresisKey = failureKey === '__default__'
        ? connectionStatusKeyForDevice(getSelectedDeviceKey())
        : connectionStatusKeyForDevice(failureKey);
      state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
      state.owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey[failureKey] = typeof optionalTitle === 'string' ? optionalTitle : '';
      const selectedNow = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const shouldRefreshStatusChip = !selectedNow || selectedNow === failureKey || failureKey === '__default__';
      if (shouldRefreshStatusChip) {
        setStatusChip('connStatus', 'Getrennt', 'red');
        const chipElement = byId('connStatus');
        if (chipElement) {
          const titleText = state.owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey[failureKey];
          if (titleText) {
            chipElement.setAttribute('title', titleText);
          } else {
            chipElement.removeAttribute('title');
          }
        }
      }
    }

    function applyOwntracksProbeConnectionFailure(optionalTitle) {
      applyDeviceConnectionFailure(getOwntracksProbeFailureKey(), optionalTitle);
    }

    function clearDeviceConnectionFailure(deviceKey) {
      const failureKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim()
        ? String(deviceKey).trim()
        : getOwntracksProbeFailureKey();
      delete state.owntracksProbeWatchdogFailedByKey[failureKey];
      delete state.owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey[failureKey];
      const selectedNow = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (selectedNow === failureKey || failureKey === '__default__') {
        const chipElement = byId('connStatus');
        if (chipElement) {
          chipElement.removeAttribute('title');
        }
      }
    }

    function clearOwntracksProbeConnectionFailure() {
      clearDeviceConnectionFailure(getOwntracksProbeFailureKey());
    }

    function getOwntracksProbeFailureKey() {
      return getSelectedDeviceKey() || '__default__';
    }

    function fillOwntracksDetailPanel(lastPositionEntry) {
      const detailFieldIds = [
        'otUser',
        'otDevice',
        'otKey',
        'otLat',
        'otLon',
        'otAccuracy',
        'otSpeed',
        'otHeading',
        'otBattery',
        'otTimestamp'
      ];
      if (!lastPositionEntry) {
        detailFieldIds.forEach(function (fieldId) {
          const fieldElement = byId(fieldId);
          if (fieldElement) {
            fieldElement.textContent = '-';
          }
        });
        return;
      }

      const hasLatLon =
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lat === 'number' && typeof lastPositionEntry.lon === 'number';

      byId('otUser').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.user);
      byId('otDevice').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.device);
      byId('otKey').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.key);
      byId('otLat').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(lastPositionEntry.lat) : '-';
      byId('otLon').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(lastPositionEntry.lon) : '-';
      byId('otAccuracy').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(lastPositionEntry.accuracy, 'm') : '-';
      byId('otSpeed').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(lastPositionEntry.speed, 'km/h') : '-';
      byId('otHeading').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(lastPositionEntry.heading, '°') : '-';
      byId('otBattery').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.battery, '%');
      byId('otTimestamp').textContent = formatTime(lastPositionEntry.timestamp);
    }

    const TILE_DB_NAME = 'tile-cache-db';
    const TILE_DB_STORE = 'tiles';
    const TILE_DB_VERSION = 1;
    const TILE_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES = 30000;

    const TileCache = (function () {
      let databaseInstance = null;
      let openPromise = null;
      let isDisabled = false;

      function openDatabase() {
        if (isDisabled) return Promise.resolve(null);
        if (databaseInstance) return Promise.resolve(databaseInstance);
        if (openPromise) return openPromise;
        if (!('indexedDB' in window)) {
          isDisabled = true;
          return Promise.resolve(null);
        }
        openPromise = new Promise(function (resolve) {
          const openRequest = indexedDB.open(TILE_DB_NAME, TILE_DB_VERSION);
          openRequest.onupgradeneeded = function () {
            const upgradeDatabase = openRequest.result;
            if (!upgradeDatabase.objectStoreNames.contains(TILE_DB_STORE)) {
              const objectStore = upgradeDatabase.createObjectStore(TILE_DB_STORE, { keyPath: 'url' });
              objectStore.createIndex('lastAccess', 'lastAccess', { unique: false });
            }
          };
          openRequest.onsuccess = function () {
            databaseInstance = openRequest.result;
            resolve(databaseInstance);
          };
          openRequest.onerror = function () {
            console.warn('Tile-Cache konnte nicht geöffnet werden:', openRequest.error);
            isDisabled = true;
            resolve(null);
          };
          openRequest.onblocked = function () {
            isDisabled = true;
            resolve(null);
          };
        });
        return openPromise;
      }

      function getTileBlob(tileUrl) {
        return openDatabase().then(function (database) {
          if (!database) return null;
          return new Promise(function (resolve) {
            let transaction;
            try {
              transaction = database.transaction(TILE_DB_STORE, 'readwrite');
            } catch (transactionError) {
              resolve(null);
              return;
            }
            const objectStore = transaction.objectStore(TILE_DB_STORE);
            const getRequest = objectStore.get(tileUrl);
            getRequest.onsuccess = function () {
              const record = getRequest.result;
              if (!record || !record.blob) {
                resolve(null);
                return;
              }
              record.lastAccess = Date.now();
              try { objectStore.put(record); } catch (writeError) { /* touch best-effort */ }
              resolve(record.blob);
            };
            getRequest.onerror = function () { resolve(null); };
          });
        });
      }

      let pendingTrim = false;
      function maybeTrimCache(database) {
        if (pendingTrim) return;
        pendingTrim = true;
        setTimeout(function () {
          pendingTrim = false;
          try {
            const transaction = database.transaction(TILE_DB_STORE, 'readwrite');
            const objectStore = transaction.objectStore(TILE_DB_STORE);
            const countRequest = objectStore.count();
            countRequest.onsuccess = function () {
              const overflow = countRequest.result - TILE_CACHE_MAX_ENTRIES;
              if (overflow <= 0) return;
              const lastAccessIndex = objectStore.index('lastAccess');
              const cursorRequest = lastAccessIndex.openCursor();
              let deletedCount = 0;
              cursorRequest.onsuccess = function () {
                const cursor = cursorRequest.result;
                if (!cursor || deletedCount >= overflow) return;
                cursor.delete();
                deletedCount += 1;
                cursor.continue();
              };
            };
          } catch (trimError) { /* trim best-effort */ }
        }, 5000);
      }

      function putTileBlob(tileUrl, tileBlob) {
        if (!tileBlob) return Promise.resolve(false);
        return openDatabase().then(function (database) {
          if (!database) return false;
          return new Promise(function (resolve) {
            try {
              const transaction = database.transaction(TILE_DB_STORE, 'readwrite');
              const objectStore = transaction.objectStore(TILE_DB_STORE);
              objectStore.put({ url: tileUrl, blob: tileBlob, lastAccess: Date.now() });
              transaction.oncomplete = function () { resolve(true); };
              transaction.onerror = function () { resolve(false); };
              maybeTrimCache(database);
            } catch (putError) {
              resolve(false);
            }
          });
        });
      }

      function clearCache() {
        return openDatabase().then(function (database) {
          if (!database) return false;
          return new Promise(function (resolve) {
            try {
              const transaction = database.transaction(TILE_DB_STORE, 'readwrite');
              transaction.objectStore(TILE_DB_STORE).clear();
              transaction.oncomplete = function () { resolve(true); };
              transaction.onerror = function () { resolve(false); };
            } catch (clearError) { resolve(false); }
          });
        });
      }

      return { get: getTileBlob, put: putTileBlob, clear: clearCache };
    })();

    const CachedTileLayer = L.TileLayer.extend({
      createTile: function (tileCoords, doneCallback) {
        const tileElement = document.createElement('img');
        tileElement.setAttribute('role', 'presentation');
        tileElement.alt = '';
        tileElement.setAttribute('draggable', 'false');
        tileElement.decoding = 'async';
        const tileUrl = this.getTileUrl(tileCoords);

        function assignTileSource(sourceUrl, objectUrlToRevoke) {
          tileElement.onload = function () {
            if (objectUrlToRevoke) URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrlToRevoke);
            tileElement.style.opacity = '1';
            doneCallback(null, tileElement);
          };
          tileElement.onerror = function () {
            if (objectUrlToRevoke) URL.revokeObjectURL(objectUrlToRevoke);
            doneCallback('tile-load-error', tileElement);
          };
          tileElement.src = sourceUrl;
        }

        TileCache.get(tileUrl).then(function (cachedBlob) {
          if (cachedBlob) {
            tileElement.style.transition = 'none';
            const cachedObjectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(cachedBlob);
            assignTileSource(cachedObjectUrl, cachedObjectUrl);
            return;
          }
          fetch(tileUrl, { cache: 'force-cache' })
            .then(function (networkResponse) {
              if (!networkResponse.ok) throw new Error('tile http ' + networkResponse.status);
              return networkResponse.blob();
            })
            .then(function (networkBlob) {
              TileCache.put(tileUrl, networkBlob);
              const networkObjectUrl = URL.createObjectURL(networkBlob);
              assignTileSource(networkObjectUrl, networkObjectUrl);
            })
            .catch(function () {
              assignTileSource(tileUrl, null);
            });
        });
        return tileElement;
      }
    });

    const BASE_TILE_LAYER_BOUNDS = [[-85.0511, -180], [85.0511, 180]];
    const TILE_ERROR_PLACEHOLDER =
      'data:image/svg+xml;charset=utf-8,' + encodeURIComponent(
        '<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="256" height="256"><rect fill="#d8dde2" width="256" height="256"/></svg>'
      );

    function buildBaseTileLayer(styleConfig) {
      return new CachedTileLayer(styleConfig.tileUrl, {
        maxZoom: 19,
        maxNativeZoom: 19,
        minZoom: 2,
        attribution: styleConfig.attribution,
        subdomains: styleConfig.subdomains,
        errorTileUrl: TILE_ERROR_PLACEHOLDER,
        keepBuffer: 128,
        updateWhenIdle: false,
        updateWhenZooming: false,
        updateInterval: 80,
        detectRetina: false,
        noWrap: true,
        bounds: BASE_TILE_LAYER_BOUNDS
      });
    }

    function withVectorRenderer(layerOptions) {
      return Object.assign({}, layerOptions, { renderer: state.vectorRenderer });
    }

    function initMap() {
      state.vectorRenderer = L.svg({ padding: 0.5 });
      state.map = L.map('map', {
        zoomControl: false,
        preferCanvas: false,
        renderer: state.vectorRenderer,
        rotate: true,
        touchRotate: true,
        bearing: 0,
        rotateControl: { closeOnZeroBearing: false, position: 'topright' },
        dragging: true,
        inertia: true,
        inertiaDeceleration: 1400,
        inertiaMaxSpeed: 4000,
        easeLinearity: 0.25,
        worldCopyJump: false,
        maxBounds: [[-85.0511, -180], [85.0511, 180]],
        maxBoundsViscosity: 1.0,
        bounceAtZoomLimits: true,
        touchZoom: true,
        tap: false,
        tapTolerance: 30,
        tapHold: false,
        zoomSnap: 0.25,
        zoomDelta: 1,
        wheelPxPerZoomLevel: 40,
        wheelDebounceTime: 20,
        fadeAnimation: false,
        zoomAnimation: true,
        zoomAnimationThreshold: 19,
        markerZoomAnimation: true
      }).setView([52.52, 13.4], 13);
      const selectedBaseMapStyle = localStorage.getItem('selectedBaseMapStyle');
      if (selectedBaseMapStyle && BASE_MAP_STYLES[selectedBaseMapStyle]) {
        state.currentBaseMapStyle = selectedBaseMapStyle;
      }
      const initialStyleConfig = BASE_MAP_STYLES[state.currentBaseMapStyle] || BASE_MAP_STYLES.light;
      const baseTileLayer = buildBaseTileLayer(initialStyleConfig).addTo(state.map);
      state.baseTileLayer = baseTileLayer;
      L.control.zoom({ position: 'topright' }).addTo(state.map);

      const markUserInteraction = function () {
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap = true;
        state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
      };
      state.map.on('zoomstart', markUserInteraction);
      state.map.on('dragstart', markUserInteraction);
      state.map.on('rotate', markUserInteraction);
      state.map.on('rotate rotateend rotatestart load viewreset', scheduleBearingMarkerSync);
      scheduleBearingMarkerSync();

      state.map.on('rotatestart', function () {
        state.map.options.inertia = false;
      });
      state.map.on('rotateend', function () {
        state.map.options.inertia = true;
      });
      const mapContainerElement = state.map.getContainer();
      if (mapContainerElement) {
        const handleMapInteraction = function () {
          markUserInteraction();
          disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction();
        };
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('pointerdown', handleMapInteraction, { passive: true });
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('touchstart', handleMapInteraction, { passive: true });
        mapContainerElement.addEventListener('wheel', handleMapInteraction, { passive: true });
      }

      attachMapClickGestures(state.map);

      const triggerTilePrefetch = attachTilePrefetch(state.map);
      state.triggerTilePrefetch = triggerTilePrefetch;
      attachZoomInertia(state.map, triggerTilePrefetch);
      attachRotatedRendererSync(state.map, state.vectorRenderer);
    }

    const TILE_PREFETCH_MAX_PARALLEL = 4;
    const TILE_PREFETCH_SEEN_LIMIT = 12000;
    const tilePrefetchSeenUrls = new Set();
    const tilePrefetchQueue = [];
    let tilePrefetchActiveRequests = 0;

    function enqueueTilePrefetchUrl(url) {
      if (!url || tilePrefetchSeenUrls.has(url)) return;
      tilePrefetchSeenUrls.add(url);
      tilePrefetchQueue.push(url);
      if (tilePrefetchSeenUrls.size > TILE_PREFETCH_SEEN_LIMIT) {
        const iterator = tilePrefetchSeenUrls.values();
        for (let i = 0; i < 1000; i++) {
          const entry = iterator.next();
          if (entry.done) break;
          tilePrefetchSeenUrls.delete(entry.value);
        }
      }
    }

    function drainTilePrefetchQueue() {
      while (tilePrefetchActiveRequests < TILE_PREFETCH_MAX_PARALLEL && tilePrefetchQueue.length > 0) {
        const url = tilePrefetchQueue.shift();
        tilePrefetchActiveRequests++;
        const finish = function () {
          tilePrefetchActiveRequests--;
          if (tilePrefetchQueue.length > 0) drainTilePrefetchQueue();
        };
        TileCache.get(url).then(function (cachedBlob) {
          if (cachedBlob) { finish(); return; }
          fetch(url, { cache: 'force-cache' })
            .then(function (networkResponse) {
              if (!networkResponse.ok) throw new Error('prefetch http ' + networkResponse.status);
              return networkResponse.blob();
            })
            .then(function (networkBlob) { return TileCache.put(url, networkBlob); })
            .catch(function () { /* prefetch best-effort */ })
            .then(finish);
        }).catch(finish);
      }
    }

    function attachTilePrefetch(mapInstance) {
      const PREFETCH_DEBOUNCE_MS = 120;
      const PREFETCH_VIEWPORT_OFFSETS = [-2, -1, 0, 1, 2];
      const PREFETCH_EXPAND_FACTOR = 1.15;
      let prefetchTimer = null;

      function enqueuePrefetch() {
        const tileLayer = state.baseTileLayer;
        if (!tileLayer) return;
        const currentZoom = Math.round(mapInstance.getZoom());
        const tileSize = tileLayer.getTileSize().x;
        const minZoom = tileLayer.options.minZoom || 0;
        const maxZoom = tileLayer.options.maxNativeZoom || tileLayer.options.maxZoom || 19;

        PREFETCH_VIEWPORT_OFFSETS.forEach(function (offset) {
          const targetZoom = currentZoom + offset;
          if (targetZoom < minZoom || targetZoom > maxZoom) return;

          const tilesPerSide = Math.pow(2, targetZoom);
          const pixelBounds = mapInstance.getPixelBounds(mapInstance.getCenter(), targetZoom);
          const centerX = (pixelBounds.min.x + pixelBounds.max.x) / 2;
          const centerY = (pixelBounds.min.y + pixelBounds.max.y) / 2;
          const halfWidth = (pixelBounds.max.x - pixelBounds.min.x) * PREFETCH_EXPAND_FACTOR / 2;
          const halfHeight = (pixelBounds.max.y - pixelBounds.min.y) * PREFETCH_EXPAND_FACTOR / 2;

          const tileMinX = Math.floor((centerX - halfWidth) / tileSize);
          const tileMaxX = Math.ceil((centerX + halfWidth) / tileSize);
          const tileMinY = Math.floor((centerY - halfHeight) / tileSize);
          const tileMaxY = Math.ceil((centerY + halfHeight) / tileSize);

          for (let x = tileMinX; x <= tileMaxX; x++) {
            if (x < 0 || x >= tilesPerSide) continue;
            for (let y = tileMinY; y <= tileMaxY; y++) {
              if (y < 0 || y >= tilesPerSide) continue;
              const url = tileLayer.getTileUrl({ x: x, y: y, z: targetZoom });
              enqueueTilePrefetchUrl(url);
            }
          }
        });

        drainTilePrefetchQueue();
      }

      function schedulePrefetch() {
        if (prefetchTimer) clearTimeout(prefetchTimer);
        prefetchTimer = setTimeout(function () {
          prefetchTimer = null;
          enqueuePrefetch();
        }, PREFETCH_DEBOUNCE_MS);
      }

      mapInstance.on('moveend zoomend', schedulePrefetch);
      mapInstance.whenReady(function () {
        schedulePrefetch();
        startBackgroundRegionPrecache(mapInstance);
      });
      return schedulePrefetch;
    }

    function latLonToTileCoords(latitude, longitude, zoomLevel) {
      const latRad = latitude * Math.PI / 180;
      const tilesPerSide = Math.pow(2, zoomLevel);
      const xTile = Math.floor((longitude + 180) / 360 * tilesPerSide);
      const yTile = Math.floor((1 - Math.log(Math.tan(latRad) + 1 / Math.cos(latRad)) / Math.PI) / 2 * tilesPerSide);
      return { x: xTile, y: yTile };
    }

    const BACKGROUND_PRECACHE_MIN_DISTANCE_METERS = 45000;
    let lastBackgroundPrecacheCenter = null;
    function startBackgroundRegionPrecache(mapInstance, overrideCenter) {
      const tileLayer = state.baseTileLayer;
      if (!tileLayer) return;
      const mapCenter = overrideCenter || mapInstance.getCenter();
      if (!mapCenter) return;
      if (lastBackgroundPrecacheCenter && typeof haversineKilometers === 'function') {
        const distanceKm = haversineKilometers(
          lastBackgroundPrecacheCenter.lat, lastBackgroundPrecacheCenter.lng,
          mapCenter.lat, mapCenter.lng
        );
        if (distanceKm * 1000 < BACKGROUND_PRECACHE_MIN_DISTANCE_METERS) return;
      }
      lastBackgroundPrecacheCenter = { lat: mapCenter.lat, lng: mapCenter.lng };

      const BACKGROUND_PRECACHE_LAYERS = [
        { zoom: 11, tileRadius: 3 },
        { zoom: 12, tileRadius: 3 },
        { zoom: 13, tileRadius: 3 },
        { zoom: 14, tileRadius: 2 }
      ];

      BACKGROUND_PRECACHE_LAYERS.forEach(function (layer) {
        const tilesPerSide = Math.pow(2, layer.zoom);
        const centerTile = latLonToTileCoords(mapCenter.lat, mapCenter.lng, layer.zoom);
        for (let dx = -layer.tileRadius; dx <= layer.tileRadius; dx++) {
          for (let dy = -layer.tileRadius; dy <= layer.tileRadius; dy++) {
            const tileX = centerTile.x + dx;
            const tileY = centerTile.y + dy;
            if (tileX < 0 || tileX >= tilesPerSide) continue;
            if (tileY < 0 || tileY >= tilesPerSide) continue;
            const tileUrl = tileLayer.getTileUrl({ x: tileX, y: tileY, z: layer.zoom });
            enqueueTilePrefetchUrl(tileUrl);
          }
        }
      });

      drainTilePrefetchQueue();
    }

    function updateMapStyleButtonState() {
      const mapStyleToggleButton = byId('mapStyleToggleBtn');
      if (!mapStyleToggleButton) return;
      const isColoredStyleActive = state.currentBaseMapStyle === 'colored';
      mapStyleToggleButton.classList.toggle('active', isColoredStyleActive);
      mapStyleToggleButton.title = isColoredStyleActive ? 'Helle Karte aktivieren' : 'Farbige Karte aktivieren';
      mapStyleToggleButton.setAttribute('aria-label', isColoredStyleActive ? 'Helle Karte aktivieren' : 'Farbige Karte aktivieren');
    }

    function toggleMapStyle() {
      if (!state.map || !state.baseTileLayer) return;
      const nextStyleId = state.currentBaseMapStyle === 'light' ? 'colored' : 'light';
      const nextStyleConfig = BASE_MAP_STYLES[nextStyleId];
      if (!nextStyleConfig) return;
      const nextTileLayer = buildBaseTileLayer(nextStyleConfig);
      state.map.addLayer(nextTileLayer);
      state.map.removeLayer(state.baseTileLayer);
      state.baseTileLayer = nextTileLayer;
      state.currentBaseMapStyle = nextStyleId;
      localStorage.setItem('selectedBaseMapStyle', nextStyleId);
      updateMapStyleButtonState();
      if (typeof state.triggerTilePrefetch === 'function') {
        state.triggerTilePrefetch();
      }
    }

    function attachZoomInertia(mapInstance, triggerTilePrefetch) {
      const ZOOM_SAMPLE_WINDOW_MS = 140;
      const ZOOM_DECELERATION_PER_SEC = 3.5;
      const ZOOM_MIN_VELOCITY = 0.45;
      const ZOOM_MAX_VELOCITY = 3.2;
      const ZOOM_VELOCITY_SCALE = 1.1;
      const ZOOM_MAX_DELTA = 1.2;
      const ZOOM_MIN_DURATION = 0.28;
      const ZOOM_MAX_DURATION = 1.0;
      const ZOOM_TARGET_EPSILON = 0.05;
      const passiveTouchListenerOptions = { passive: true };

      const mapContainer = mapInstance.getContainer();
      let zoomSamples = [];
      let isPinching = false;
      let pinchAnchor = null;

      function computePinchMidpointLatLng(touchEvent) {
        if (!touchEvent || touchEvent.touches.length < 2) return null;
        const rect = mapContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
        const midX = (touchEvent.touches[0].clientX + touchEvent.touches[1].clientX) / 2 - rect.left;
        const midY = (touchEvent.touches[0].clientY + touchEvent.touches[1].clientY) / 2 - rect.top;
        return mapInstance.containerPointToLatLng([midX, midY]);
      }

      function recordZoomSample() {
        const now = performance.now();
        zoomSamples.push({ zoom: mapInstance.getZoom(), time: now });
        while (zoomSamples.length > 0 && now - zoomSamples[0].time > ZOOM_SAMPLE_WINDOW_MS) {
          zoomSamples.shift();
        }
      }

      function computeVelocity() {
        if (zoomSamples.length < 2) return 0;
        const first = zoomSamples[0];
        const last = zoomSamples[zoomSamples.length - 1];
        const dt = (last.time - first.time) / 1000;
        if (dt <= 0) return 0;
        const velocity = ((last.zoom - first.zoom) / dt) * ZOOM_VELOCITY_SCALE;
        if (!isFinite(velocity)) return 0;
        return Math.max(-ZOOM_MAX_VELOCITY, Math.min(ZOOM_MAX_VELOCITY, velocity));
      }

      function isMapRotated() {
        return typeof mapInstance.getBearing === 'function' && mapInstance.getBearing() !== 0;
      }

      function runMomentum(anchorLatLng, velocity) {
        if (Math.abs(velocity) < ZOOM_MIN_VELOCITY) return;
        if (mapInstance._flyToFrame) mapInstance.stop();

        const signed = Math.sign(velocity);
        const rawDelta = signed * (velocity * velocity) / (2 * ZOOM_DECELERATION_PER_SEC);
        const clampedDelta = Math.max(-ZOOM_MAX_DELTA, Math.min(ZOOM_MAX_DELTA, rawDelta));
        const durationSec = Math.max(ZOOM_MIN_DURATION, Math.min(ZOOM_MAX_DURATION, Math.abs(velocity) / ZOOM_DECELERATION_PER_SEC));
        const currentZoom = mapInstance.getZoom();
        const unclampedTargetZoom = currentZoom + clampedDelta;
        const targetZoom = Math.max(
          mapInstance.getMinZoom(),
          Math.min(mapInstance.getMaxZoom(), unclampedTargetZoom)
        );
        if (Math.abs(targetZoom - currentZoom) < ZOOM_TARGET_EPSILON) return;

        if (isMapRotated()) {
          if (typeof mapInstance.setZoomAround === 'function' && anchorLatLng) {
            mapInstance.setZoomAround(anchorLatLng, targetZoom, { animate: true });
          } else {
            mapInstance.setZoom(targetZoom, { animate: true });
          }
          return;
        }

        const zoomScale = mapInstance.getZoomScale(targetZoom, currentZoom);
        const anchorLayer = mapInstance.latLngToLayerPoint(anchorLatLng);
        const currentCenterLayer = mapInstance.latLngToLayerPoint(mapInstance.getCenter());
        const newCenterLayer = anchorLayer.add(currentCenterLayer.subtract(anchorLayer).multiplyBy(1 / zoomScale));
        const newCenter = mapInstance.layerPointToLatLng(newCenterLayer);

        mapInstance.flyTo(newCenter, targetZoom, {
          duration: durationSec,
          easeLinearity: 0.25,
          noMoveStart: true
        });
      }

      mapContainer.addEventListener('touchstart', function (touchEvent) {
        if (mapInstance._flyToFrame) mapInstance.stop();
        if (typeof triggerTilePrefetch === 'function') triggerTilePrefetch();
        if (touchEvent.touches.length === 2) {
          isPinching = true;
          zoomSamples = [];
          recordZoomSample();
          pinchAnchor = computePinchMidpointLatLng(touchEvent);
        }
      }, passiveTouchListenerOptions);

      mapContainer.addEventListener('touchmove', function (touchEvent) {
        if (!isPinching || touchEvent.touches.length !== 2) return;
        const updatedAnchor = computePinchMidpointLatLng(touchEvent);
        if (updatedAnchor) pinchAnchor = updatedAnchor;
      }, passiveTouchListenerOptions);

      mapInstance.on('zoom', function () {
        if (isPinching) recordZoomSample();
      });

      function handlePinchRelease() {
        if (!isPinching) return;
        isPinching = false;
        const pinchReleaseVelocity = computeVelocity();
        zoomSamples = [];
        const anchor = pinchAnchor;
        pinchAnchor = null;
        if (anchor && Math.abs(pinchReleaseVelocity) >= ZOOM_MIN_VELOCITY) {
          runMomentum(anchor, pinchReleaseVelocity);
        }
      }

      mapContainer.addEventListener('touchend', function (touchEvent) {
        if (isPinching && touchEvent.touches.length < 2) handlePinchRelease();
      }, passiveTouchListenerOptions);

      mapContainer.addEventListener('touchcancel', function () {
        if (isPinching) handlePinchRelease();
      }, passiveTouchListenerOptions);
    }

    function attachRotatedRendererSync(mapInstance, vectorRenderer) {
      if (!mapInstance || !vectorRenderer) return;

      function resetVectorRendererGeometry() {
        if (!vectorRenderer._map) return;
        if (typeof vectorRenderer._reset === 'function') {
          vectorRenderer._reset();
        } else if (typeof vectorRenderer._update === 'function') {
          vectorRenderer._update();
        }
      }

      mapInstance.on('rotateend', resetVectorRendererGeometry);
    }

    function byId(id) { return document.getElementById(id); }

    function stopEventPropagation(eventObject) {
      if (eventObject && typeof eventObject.stopPropagation === 'function') {
        eventObject.stopPropagation();
      }
    }

    function getErrorMessageOrFallback(errorObject, fallbackMessage) {
      if (errorObject && typeof errorObject.message === 'string' && errorObject.message.trim()) {
        return errorObject.message;
      }
      return fallbackMessage;
    }

    function handleAsyncActionError(actionError, logMessage, fallbackAlertMessage) {
      console.error(logMessage, actionError);
      if (fallbackAlertMessage) {
        window.alert(getErrorMessageOrFallback(actionError, fallbackAlertMessage));
      }
    }

    function setTextIfPresent(elementId, textValue) {
      const targetElement = byId(elementId);
      if (!targetElement) {
        return;
      }
      targetElement.textContent = textValue;
    }

    function bindClickIfPresent(element, clickHandler) {
      if (!element || typeof clickHandler !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      element.addEventListener('click', clickHandler);
    }

    function bindAsyncClickIfPresent(element, asyncHandler, logMessage, fallbackAlertMessage) {
      if (!element || typeof asyncHandler !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      element.addEventListener('click', function () {
        asyncHandler().catch(function (error) {
          handleAsyncActionError(error, logMessage, fallbackAlertMessage);
        });
      });
    }

    async function fetchJson(url, options) {
      const response = await fetch(url, Object.assign({ cache: 'no-store' }, options || {}));
      if (!response.ok) {
        const responseText = await response.text();
        throw new Error('HTTP Fehler ' + response.status + ' bei ' + url + ': ' + responseText);
      }
      return await response.json();
    }

    async function resetTrackingData(optionalDeviceKey) {
      const requestBody = {};
      if (optionalDeviceKey) {
        requestBody.deviceKey = optionalDeviceKey;
      }
      return await fetchJson('/api/reset', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(requestBody)
      });
    }

    async function fetchTrackingStatus(deviceKey) {
      const selectedDeviceKey = typeof deviceKey === 'string' ? deviceKey : getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const statusUrl = selectedDeviceKey
        ? '/api/tracking/status?deviceKey=' + encodeURIComponent(selectedDeviceKey)
        : '/api/tracking/status';
      return await fetchJson(statusUrl);
    }

    async function fetchFailsafeRoutePlan(deviceKey) {
      const selectedDeviceKey = typeof deviceKey === 'string' ? deviceKey : getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const failsafeUrl = selectedDeviceKey
        ? '/api/failsafe-route-plan?deviceKey=' + encodeURIComponent(selectedDeviceKey)
        : '/api/failsafe-route-plan';
      return await fetchJson(failsafeUrl);
    }

    function setRouteInlineInfo(distanceText, durationText) {
      setTextIfPresent('routeDistanceInline', distanceText || '-');
      setTextIfPresent('routeDurationInline', durationText || '-');
    }

    function updateTrackingStatusChip() {
      if (state.trackingEnabled) {
        setStatusChip('trackingStatusChip', 'Aktiv', 'green');
      } else {
        setStatusChip('trackingStatusChip', 'Inaktiv', 'gray');
      }
    }

    function removeFailsafeReturnMarker() {
      if (state.failsafeReturnMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnMarker);
        state.failsafeReturnMarker = null;
      }
    }

    function removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine() {
      if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLine) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLine);
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLine = null;
      }
      state.failsafeReturnRouteMeta = null;
    }

    function removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(deviceKey) {
      const normalizedKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '';
      if (!normalizedKey) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey]) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey]);
        delete state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey];
      }
      if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]);
        delete state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey];

      delete state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey[normalizedKey];

    function clearAllFailsafeOverlays() {
      Object.keys(state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(deviceKey);
      });
    }

    async function updateFailsafeReturnRouteFromPlan() {
      if (state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlight) {
        return;
      }
      state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlight = true;
      try {
        const failsafePlanResponse = await fetchFailsafeRoutePlan();
        const planData = failsafePlanResponse && failsafePlanResponse.data ? failsafePlanResponse.data : null;
        if (!planData || !planData.shouldComputeRoute || !planData.startPosition || !planData.returnPosition) {
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          return;
        }
        const startPosition = planData.startPosition;
        const returnPosition = planData.returnPosition;
        if (typeof startPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof startPosition.lon !== 'number' ||
            typeof returnPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof returnPosition.lon !== 'number') {
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          return;
        }
        const routeResult = await fetchRouteGeometry(
          startPosition.lat,
          startPosition.lon,
          returnPosition.lat,
          returnPosition.lon,
          FAILSAFE_RETURN_TRANSPORT_MODE,
          []
        );
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLine = L.geoJSON(routeResult.route.geometry, {
          style: withVectorRenderer({
            color: '#c62828',
            weight: 5,
            opacity: 0.9
          })
        }).addTo(state.map);
        const routeDistanceText = formatDistanceMeters(routeResult.route.distance);
        const routeDurationText = formatDurationSeconds(routeResult.route.duration);
        state.failsafeReturnRouteMeta = {
          distance: routeDistanceText,
          duration: routeDurationText
        };
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLine.bindPopup(
          'Failsafe-Rückkehrroute: ' + routeDistanceText + ' | ' + routeDurationText
        );
      } catch (failsafeRouteError) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Berechnen der Failsafe-Rückkehrroute:', failsafeRouteError);
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
      } finally {
        state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlight = false;
      }
    }

    async function updateFailsafeReturnRouteFromPlanForDevice(deviceKey) {
      const normalizedKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '';
      if (!normalizedKey || state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey[normalizedKey]) {
        return;
      }
      state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey[normalizedKey] = true;
      try {
        const failsafePlanResponse = await fetchFailsafeRoutePlan(normalizedKey);
        const planData = failsafePlanResponse && failsafePlanResponse.data ? failsafePlanResponse.data : null;
        if (!planData || !planData.shouldComputeRoute || !planData.startPosition || !planData.returnPosition) {
          if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]);
            delete state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey];
          }
          return;
        }
        const startPosition = planData.startPosition;
        const returnPosition = planData.returnPosition;
        if (typeof startPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof startPosition.lon !== 'number' ||
            typeof returnPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof returnPosition.lon !== 'number') {
          if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]);
            delete state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey];
          }
          return;
        }
        const routeResult = await fetchRouteGeometry(
          startPosition.lat,
          startPosition.lon,
          returnPosition.lat,
          returnPosition.lon,
          FAILSAFE_RETURN_TRANSPORT_MODE,
          []
        );
        if (state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey]);
        }
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey] = L.geoJSON(routeResult.route.geometry, {
          style: withVectorRenderer({
            color: '#c62828',
            weight: 4,
            opacity: 0.7
          })
        }).addTo(state.map);
        const routeDistanceText = formatDistanceMeters(routeResult.route.distance);
        const routeDurationText = formatDurationSeconds(routeResult.route.duration);
        state.failsafeReturnRouteLinesByKey[normalizedKey].bindPopup(
          'Failsafe-Rückkehrroute (' + getHumanDeviceLabel(normalizedKey, null) + '): ' +
          routeDistanceText + ' | ' + routeDurationText
        );
      } catch (failsafeRouteError) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Berechnen der Failsafe-Rückkehrroute (ALL):', failsafeRouteError);
      } finally {
        delete state.failsafeRouteRequestInFlightByKey[normalizedKey];
      }
    }

    async function updateFailsafeOverlaysForAllDevices() {
      if (!state.map || !state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
        return;
      }
      const deviceKeys = allMapDeviceKeysOrdered();
      const activeDeviceKeys = {};
      await Promise.all(deviceKeys.map(async function (deviceKey) {
        const normalizedKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '';
        if (!normalizedKey) {
          return;
        }
        try {
          const trackingStatusResponse = await fetchTrackingStatus(normalizedKey);
          const trackingStatusData = trackingStatusResponse && trackingStatusResponse.data
            ? trackingStatusResponse.data
            : null;
          const failsafeData = trackingStatusData && trackingStatusData.failsafe ? trackingStatusData.failsafe : null;
          const returnPosition = trackingStatusData ? trackingStatusData.returnPosition : null;
          const linkLostForLongTime = !!(failsafeData && failsafeData.linkLostForLongTime);
          const rLat = returnPosition ? Number(returnPosition.lat) : NaN;
          const rLon = returnPosition ? Number(returnPosition.lon) : NaN;
          const hasReturnPosition = Number.isFinite(rLat) && Number.isFinite(rLon) &&
            rLat >= -90 && rLat <= 90 && rLon >= -180 && rLon <= 180;
          if (!linkLostForLongTime || !hasReturnPosition) {
            removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(normalizedKey);
            delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[normalizedKey];
            return;
          }

          activeDeviceKeys[normalizedKey] = true;
          const returnLatLng = [rLat, rLon];
          if (!state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey]) {
            state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey] = L.marker(returnLatLng, {
              icon: redIcon,
              zIndexOffset: 3000
            }).addTo(state.map);
          } else {
            state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey].setLatLng(returnLatLng);
          }
          state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey[normalizedKey].bindPopup(
            'Rückkehrpunkt (Failsafe) ' + getHumanDeviceLabel(normalizedKey, null) + ': ' +
            rLat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + rLon.toFixed(6)
          );
          if (!state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[normalizedKey]) {
            state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[normalizedKey] = true;
            window.alert('Hinweis für Gerät «' + getHumanDeviceLabel(normalizedKey, null) + '»: Seit über 1 Minute wurden keine frischen Tracking-Daten empfangen. ' +
              'Der Rückkehrpunkt wurde ermittelt und ist als roter Marker markiert. Die Rückkehrroute wird angezeigt.');
          }
          await updateFailsafeReturnRouteFromPlanForDevice(normalizedKey);
        } catch (failsafeAllError) {
          console.error('Fehler beim Laden des Failsafe-Status für Gerät:', normalizedKey, failsafeAllError);
        }
      }));
      Object.keys(state.failsafeReturnMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        if (!activeDeviceKeys[deviceKey]) {
          removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(deviceKey);
        }
      });
    }

    function updateFailsafeStateFromTrackingStatus(trackingStatusData) {
      const deviceKeyForFailsafe = (trackingStatusData && trackingStatusData.deviceKey)
        ? trackingStatusData.deviceKey
        : getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const failsafeNoticeKey = deviceKeyForFailsafe ? String(deviceKeyForFailsafe) : '__none__';
      if (!state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey) {
        state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey = {};
      }
      if (!trackingStatusData || !trackingStatusData.failsafe) {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[failsafeNoticeKey];
        return;
      }
      const failsafeData = trackingStatusData.failsafe;
      const returnPosition = trackingStatusData.returnPosition;
      const retLat = returnPosition ? Number(returnPosition.lat) : NaN;
      const retLon = returnPosition ? Number(returnPosition.lon) : NaN;
      const hasReturnPosition = Number.isFinite(retLat) && Number.isFinite(retLon) &&
        retLat >= -90 && retLat <= 90 && retLon >= -180 && retLon <= 180;
      const linkLostForLongTime = !!(failsafeData && failsafeData.linkLostForLongTime);

      if (!linkLostForLongTime || !hasReturnPosition) {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[failsafeNoticeKey];
        return;
      }

      const returnLatLng = [retLat, retLon];
      if (!state.failsafeReturnMarker) {
        state.failsafeReturnMarker = L.marker(returnLatLng, {
          icon: redIcon,
          zIndexOffset: 3000
        }).addTo(state.map);
        state.failsafeReturnMarker.bindPopup('Rückkehrpunkt (Failsafe): ' +
          retLat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + retLon.toFixed(6));
      } else {
        state.failsafeReturnMarker.setLatLng(returnLatLng);
      }
      if (typeof state.failsafeReturnMarker.setZIndexOffset === 'function') {
        state.failsafeReturnMarker.setZIndexOffset(3000);
      }
      if (typeof state.failsafeReturnMarker.bringToFront === 'function') {
        state.failsafeReturnMarker.bringToFront();
      }

      if (!state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[failsafeNoticeKey]) {
        const failsafeDeviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(deviceKeyForFailsafe, returnPosition);
        state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[failsafeNoticeKey] = true;
        window.alert('Hinweis für Gerät «' + failsafeDeviceLabel + '»: Seit über 1 Minute wurden keine frischen Tracking-Daten empfangen. ' +
          'Der Rückkehrpunkt wurde ermittelt und ist als roter Marker markiert. Die Rückkehrroute wird angezeigt.');
      }
      updateFailsafeReturnRouteFromPlan();
    }

    function updateRouteActionVisibility() {
