    function escapeHtmlForDisplay(rawText) {
      return String(rawText == null ? '' : rawText)
        .replace(/&/g, '&')
        .replace(/</g, '<')
        .replace(/>/g, '>')
        .replace(/"/g, '"')
        .replace(/'/g, ''');
    }

    function buildFlexibleQueryRegexSource(queryText) {
      const trimmedQueryText = String(queryText || '').trim();
      if (!trimmedQueryText) {
        return '';
      }
      const escapedRegexSource = trimmedQueryText.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
      return escapedRegexSource.replace(/[\s\-]+/g, '[\\s\\-]+');
    }

    function buildHighlightedLabelHtml(labelText, queryText) {
      const safeLabel = escapeHtmlForDisplay(labelText);
      const flexibleSource = buildFlexibleQueryRegexSource(queryText);
      if (!flexibleSource) {
        return safeLabel;
      }
      const highlightRegex = new RegExp('(' + flexibleSource + ')', 'gi');
      return safeLabel.replace(highlightRegex, '<mark>$1</mark>');
    }

    function labelContainsQuery(labelText, queryText) {
      const flexibleSource = buildFlexibleQueryRegexSource(queryText);
      if (!flexibleSource) {
        return true;
      }
      const matchRegex = new RegExp(flexibleSource, 'i');
      return matchRegex.test(String(labelText || ''));
    }

    function buildSearchQueryVariants(trimmedQuery) {
      const queryVariantSet = new Set();
      if (!trimmedQuery) {
        return [];
      }
      queryVariantSet.add(trimmedQuery);
      const streetSuffixRegex = /(\S+)\s+(stra(?:ße|sse)|str\.?|platz|weg|allee|gasse|ring|damm|ufer|brücke|bruecke)\b/gi;
      const combinedVariant = trimmedQuery.replace(streetSuffixRegex, '$1$2');
      if (combinedVariant !== trimmedQuery) {
        queryVariantSet.add(combinedVariant);
      }
      const hyphenatedVariant = trimmedQuery.replace(streetSuffixRegex, '$1-$2');
      if (hyphenatedVariant !== trimmedQuery) {
        queryVariantSet.add(hyphenatedVariant);
      }
      if (trimmedQuery.indexOf('ß') !== -1) {
        queryVariantSet.add(trimmedQuery.replace(/ß/g, 'ss'));
      }
      if (/[äöüÄÖÜ]/.test(trimmedQuery)) {
        const umlautExpanded = trimmedQuery
          .replace(/ä/g, 'ae').replace(/ö/g, 'oe').replace(/ü/g, 'ue')
          .replace(/Ä/g, 'Ae').replace(/Ö/g, 'Oe').replace(/Ü/g, 'Ue');
        if (umlautExpanded !== trimmedQuery) {
          queryVariantSet.add(umlautExpanded);
        }
      }
      return Array.from(queryVariantSet).slice(0, 4);
    }

    function renderWaypointSuggestions() {
      const waypointSuggestionsElement = byId('waypointSuggestions');
      if (!waypointSuggestionsElement) {
        return;
      }
      waypointSuggestionsElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (!Array.isArray(state.waypointSuggestions) || state.waypointSuggestions.length === 0) {
        waypointSuggestionsElement.classList.remove('open');
        return;
      }
      const activeWaypointRowIdForQuery = state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId || state.activeWaypointRowId;
      const activeWaypointInputElement = activeWaypointRowIdForQuery
        ? document.querySelector('input[data-waypoint-row-id="' + activeWaypointRowIdForQuery + '"]')
        : null;
      const currentWaypointQuery = activeWaypointInputElement ? activeWaypointInputElement.value : '';
      const matchingWaypointSuggestions = state.waypointSuggestions.filter(function (suggestionItem) {
        return suggestionItem && labelContainsQuery(suggestionItem.label, currentWaypointQuery);
      });
      if (matchingWaypointSuggestions.length === 0) {
        waypointSuggestionsElement.classList.remove('open');
        return;
      }
      matchingWaypointSuggestions.slice(0, 10).forEach(function (suggestionItem) {
        const suggestionElement = document.createElement('div');
        suggestionElement.className = 'suggestion-item';
        suggestionElement.innerHTML = buildHighlightedLabelHtml(suggestionItem.label, currentWaypointQuery);
        suggestionElement.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          const targetRowId = state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId || state.activeWaypointRowId;
          const targetRowIndex = findWaypointRowIndexById(targetRowId);
          if (targetRowIndex < 0) {
            hideWaypointSuggestions();
            return;
          }
          const targetRowEntry = state.waypointEditorRows[targetRowIndex];
          targetRowEntry.suggestion = {
            lat: suggestionItem.lat,
            lon: suggestionItem.lon,
            label: suggestionItem.label
          };
          state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
          syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
          renderWaypointDynamicRows();
          renderWaypointMarkers();
          updateWaypointButtonState();
          fitMapToRoutePoints();
        });
        waypointSuggestionsElement.appendChild(suggestionElement);
      });
      waypointSuggestionsElement.classList.add('open');
    }

    function appendSuggestionBatchToList() {
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      if (!routeSuggestionsElement) {
        return;
      }
      if (!Array.isArray(state.routeSuggestions) || state.routeSuggestions.length === 0) {
        return;
      }

      const routeQueryInputElement = byId('routeQuery');
      const currentRouteQuery = routeQueryInputElement ? routeQueryInputElement.value : '';
      const fragment = document.createDocumentFragment();
      const renderEndIndex = Math.min(
        state.routeSuggestions.length,
        state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount + state.suggestionRenderBatchSize
      );
      for (let suggestionIndex = state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount; suggestionIndex < renderEndIndex; suggestionIndex += 1) {
        const suggestion = state.routeSuggestions[suggestionIndex];
        if (!suggestion) {
          continue;
        }
        const isMyLocationEntry = suggestion.source === 'myLocation';
        if (!isMyLocationEntry && !labelContainsQuery(suggestion.label, currentRouteQuery)) {
          continue;
        }
        const suggestionElement = document.createElement('div');
        const cssClassParts = ['suggestion-item'];
        if (suggestion.source === 'recent') {
          cssClassParts.push('is-recent');
        }
        if (isMyLocationEntry) {
          cssClassParts.push('is-my-location');
        }
        suggestionElement.className = cssClassParts.join(' ');
        suggestionElement.innerHTML = isMyLocationEntry
          ? '<span>Mein Standort</span>'
          : buildHighlightedLabelHtml(suggestion.label, currentRouteQuery);
        suggestionElement.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          selectSuggestionAndShow(suggestion).catch(function (error) {
            console.error('Fehler beim Anzeigen des Suchtreffers:', error);
          });
        });
        fragment.appendChild(suggestionElement);
      }
      routeSuggestionsElement.appendChild(fragment);
      state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount = renderEndIndex;
    }

    function renderRouteSuggestions(resetList) {
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      if (!routeSuggestionsElement) {
        return;
      }
      if (!Array.isArray(state.routeSuggestions) || state.routeSuggestions.length === 0) {
        routeSuggestionsElement.classList.remove('open');
        routeSuggestionsElement.innerHTML = '';
        state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount = 0;
        return;
      }
      if (resetList) {
        routeSuggestionsElement.innerHTML = '';
        state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount = 0;
      }
      appendSuggestionBatchToList();
      routeSuggestionsElement.classList.add('open');
    }

    function maybeRenderMoreSuggestionsOnScroll() {
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      if (!routeSuggestionsElement || !Array.isArray(state.routeSuggestions)) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.renderedRouteSuggestionCount >= state.routeSuggestions.length) {
        return;
      }
      const remainingScrollPixels = routeSuggestionsElement.scrollHeight -
        routeSuggestionsElement.scrollTop - routeSuggestionsElement.clientHeight;
      if (remainingScrollPixels <= 24) {
        appendSuggestionBatchToList();
      }
    }

    function clearRouteVisualization(keepMarkers) {
      if (state.routeLine) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.routeLine);
        state.routeLine = null;
      }
      if (!keepMarkers) {
        if (state.destinationMarker) {

          state.destinationMarker = null;

          });
        }
        state.waypointMarkers = [];
        state.selectedWaypoints = [];
        state.waypointEditorRows = [];
        state.activeWaypointRowId = null;
        state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = null;
        state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = null;
        state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
        state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
        state.selectedRouteStart = null;
        const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
        if (routeStartQueryElement) {
          routeStartQueryElement.value = '';
        }
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');

        updateRouteActionVisibility();
      }
      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
