    function normalizeSuggestionItem(rawItem) {
      if (!rawItem) {
        return null;
      }
      const latitude = Number(rawItem.lat);
      const longitude = Number(rawItem.lon);
      const labelText = String(rawItem.label || '').trim();
      if (!Number.isFinite(latitude) || !Number.isFinite(longitude) || !labelText) {
        return null;
      }
      return {
        lat: latitude,
        lon: longitude,
        label: labelText,
        source: rawItem.source || 'unknown'
      };
    }

    function haversineKilometers(latA, lonA, latB, lonB) {
      const earthRadiusKm = 6371;
      const toRadians = function (degreeValue) { return degreeValue * Math.PI / 180; };
      const latDelta = toRadians(latB - latA);
      const lonDelta = toRadians(lonB - lonA);
      const a = Math.sin(latDelta / 2) * Math.sin(latDelta / 2) +
        Math.cos(toRadians(latA)) * Math.cos(toRadians(latB)) *
        Math.sin(lonDelta / 2) * Math.sin(lonDelta / 2);
      return 2 * earthRadiusKm * Math.atan2(Math.sqrt(a), Math.sqrt(1 - a));
    }

    function rankSuggestions(searchQuery, suggestions, currentPosition) {
      const normalizedQuery = String(searchQuery || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      return suggestions
        .map(function (suggestionItem) {
          const normalizedLabel = suggestionItem.label.toLowerCase();
          let rankingScore = 0;
          if (normalizedLabel.startsWith(normalizedQuery)) {
            rankingScore += 120;
          } else if (normalizedLabel.includes(normalizedQuery)) {
            rankingScore += 40;
          }
          const queryTokens = normalizedQuery.split(/\s+/).filter(Boolean);
          queryTokens.forEach(function (queryToken) {
            if (normalizedLabel.startsWith(queryToken)) {
              rankingScore += 16;
            } else if (normalizedLabel.includes(queryToken)) {
              rankingScore += 8;
            }
          });
          if (currentPosition) {
            const distanceKm = haversineKilometers(currentPosition.lat, currentPosition.lon, suggestionItem.lat, suggestionItem.lon);
            rankingScore += Math.max(0, 80 - Math.min(80, distanceKm));
          }
          if (suggestionItem.source === 'nominatim') {
            rankingScore += 5;
          }
          return Object.assign({}, suggestionItem, { score: rankingScore });
        })
        .sort(function (leftItem, rightItem) {
          return rightItem.score - leftItem.score;
        });
    }

    function deduplicateSuggestions(suggestions) {
      const seenSuggestionKeySet = {};
      const uniqueSuggestionList = [];
      suggestions.forEach(function (suggestionEntry) {
        const suggestionKey = suggestionEntry.label.toLowerCase() + '|' +
          suggestionEntry.lat.toFixed(5) + '|' + suggestionEntry.lon.toFixed(5);
        if (!seenSuggestionKeySet[suggestionKey]) {
          seenSuggestionKeySet[suggestionKey] = true;
          uniqueSuggestionList.push(suggestionEntry);
        }
      });
      return uniqueSuggestionList;
    }

    async function fetchCurrentPosition() {
      const lastPositionResponse = await fetchJson('/api/last-position');
      const lastPosition = lastPositionResponse && lastPositionResponse.data ? lastPositionResponse.data : null;
      if (!lastPosition || typeof lastPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof lastPosition.lon !== 'number') {
        return null;
      }
      return { lat: lastPosition.lat, lon: lastPosition.lon };
    }

    async function fetchDevicesSnapshot() {
      const devicesResponse = await fetchJson('/api/devices');
      return devicesResponse && devicesResponse.data && typeof devicesResponse.data === 'object'
        ? devicesResponse.data
        : {};
    }

    async function fetchLastPositionRecord() {
      const lastPositionResponse = await fetchJson('/api/last-position');
      return lastPositionResponse && lastPositionResponse.data ? lastPositionResponse.data : null;
    }

    async function fetchDevicePositionRecord(deviceTarget) {
      if (!deviceTarget || !deviceTarget.user || !deviceTarget.device) {
        return await fetchLastPositionRecord();
      }
      const devicesSnapshot = await fetchDevicesSnapshot();
      const deviceKey = String(deviceTarget.user) + '/' + String(deviceTarget.device);
      const record = devicesSnapshot && typeof devicesSnapshot === 'object'
        ? devicesSnapshot[deviceKey]
        : null;
      return record && typeof record === 'object' ? record : null;
    }

    function lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(positionEntry) {
      if (!positionEntry || typeof positionEntry !== 'object') {
        return 0;
      }
      const receivedAt = Number(positionEntry.receivedAt);
      return Number.isFinite(receivedAt) && receivedAt > 0 ? receivedAt : 0;
    }

    async function publishOwntracksReportLocationRequest(deviceTarget) {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const selectedDeviceEntry = selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]
        ? state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]
        : null;
      const requestBody = {
        deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey || ''
      };
      if (selectedDeviceEntry && typeof selectedDeviceEntry.owntracksTid === 'string' && selectedDeviceEntry.owntracksTid.trim()) {
        requestBody.owntracksTid = selectedDeviceEntry.owntracksTid.trim().toLowerCase();
      }
      if (deviceTarget && deviceTarget.user && deviceTarget.device) {
        requestBody.user = deviceTarget.user;
        requestBody.device = deviceTarget.device;
      } else if (selectedDeviceEntry &&
        typeof selectedDeviceEntry.user === 'string' &&
        typeof selectedDeviceEntry.device === 'string' &&
        selectedDeviceEntry.user.trim() &&
        selectedDeviceEntry.device.trim()) {
        requestBody.user = selectedDeviceEntry.user.trim();
        requestBody.device = selectedDeviceEntry.device.trim();
      }
      const response = await fetch('/api/owntracks/request-location', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify(requestBody),
        cache: 'no-store'
      });
      if (!response.ok) {
        const responseText = await response.text();
        throw new Error('HTTP Fehler ' + response.status + ' bei /api/owntracks/request-location: ' + responseText);
      }
      return await response.json();
    }

    function wakeOwntracksLocateWaitIfAny() {
      if (state.owntracksLocateWakeResolvers.length === 0) {
        return;
      }
      const pendingDeliverList = state.owntracksLocateWakeResolvers.slice();
      state.owntracksLocateWakeResolvers = [];
      pendingDeliverList.forEach(function (deliverWake) {
        deliverWake();
      });
    }

    function owntracksLocateWaitUntilWakeOrTimeout(intervalMs) {
      return new Promise(function (resolve) {
        let settled = false;
        const timerId = setTimeout(function () {
          if (settled) {
            return;
          }
          settled = true;
          const resolverIndex = state.owntracksLocateWakeResolvers.indexOf(deliverWake);
          if (resolverIndex >= 0) {
            state.owntracksLocateWakeResolvers.splice(resolverIndex, 1);
          }
          resolve();
        }, intervalMs);
        function deliverWake() {
          if (settled) {
            return;
          }
          settled = true;
          clearTimeout(timerId);
          const resolverIndex = state.owntracksLocateWakeResolvers.indexOf(deliverWake);
          if (resolverIndex >= 0) {
            state.owntracksLocateWakeResolvers.splice(resolverIndex, 1);
          }
          resolve();
        }
        state.owntracksLocateWakeResolvers.push(deliverWake);
      });
    }

    async function waitForLastPositionNewerThan(minReceivedAtMillis, waitOptions) {
      const options = waitOptions && typeof waitOptions === 'object' ? waitOptions : {};
      const maxWaitMs = typeof options.maxWaitMs === 'number' ? options.maxWaitMs : OWNTRACKS_LOCATION_WAIT_MAX_MS;
      const retryPublishAfterMs = options.retryPublishAfterMs;
      const retryDeviceTarget = options.deviceTarget || null;
      const retrySecondPublish = retryPublishAfterMs !== false && retryPublishAfterMs !== null;
      const retryAfterMs = typeof retryPublishAfterMs === 'number' ? retryPublishAfterMs : 8000;
      const waitDeadline = Date.now() + maxWaitMs;
      let owntracksLocateRetryPublishDone = false;
      const retryPublishAt = Date.now() + retryAfterMs;
      while (Date.now() < waitDeadline) {
        if (retrySecondPublish && !owntracksLocateRetryPublishDone && Date.now() >= retryPublishAt) {
          owntracksLocateRetryPublishDone = true;
          publishOwntracksReportLocationRequest(retryDeviceTarget).catch(function () {
            /* zweiter reportLocation-Versuch ist optional */
          });
        }
        const record = retryDeviceTarget
          ? await fetchDevicePositionRecord(retryDeviceTarget)
          : await fetchLastPositionRecord();
        if (record && typeof record.lat === 'number' && typeof record.lon === 'number') {
          const receivedAt = lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(record);
          if (receivedAt > minReceivedAtMillis) {
            return { lat: record.lat, lon: record.lon };
          }
        }
        await owntracksLocateWaitUntilWakeOrTimeout(OWNTRACKS_LOCATION_POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
      }
      return null;
    }

    async function runOwnTracksStatusProbe() {
      if (state.owntracksStatusProbeInFlight) {
        return;
      }
      state.owntracksStatusProbeInFlight = true;
      const failureKey = getOwntracksProbeFailureKey();
      try {
        const selectedTarget = getSelectedDeviceTarget();
        if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap && !selectedTarget) {
          return;
        }
        const priorRecord = await fetchDevicePositionRecord(selectedTarget);
        const priorReceivedAt = lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(priorRecord);
        try {
          await publishOwntracksReportLocationRequest(selectedTarget);
        } catch (probeRequestError) {
          console.warn('OwnTracks Status-Abfrage:', probeRequestError);
          state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] = Number(state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] || 0) + 1;
          if (state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] >= OWNTRACKS_STATUS_PROBE_FAILS_BEFORE_DISCONNECTED) {
            applyOwntracksProbeConnectionFailure('OwnTracks-Abfrage nicht möglich (kein Gerät oder Serverfehler).');
          }
          return;
        }
        const newerPosition = await waitForLastPositionNewerThan(priorReceivedAt, {
          maxWaitMs: OWNTRACKS_STATUS_PROBE_MAX_WAIT_MS,
          retryPublishAfterMs: 10000,
          deviceTarget: selectedTarget
        });
        if (newerPosition) {
          state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] = 0;
          clearOwntracksProbeConnectionFailure();
          triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
        } else {
          state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] = Number(state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] || 0) + 1;
          if (state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] >= OWNTRACKS_STATUS_PROBE_FAILS_BEFORE_DISCONNECTED) {
            applyOwntracksProbeConnectionFailure('OwnTracks hat innerhalb von 20 s keinen neuen Punkt geliefert.');
          }
        }
      } catch (probeError) {
        console.warn('OwnTracks Status-Probe:', probeError);
        state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] = Number(state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] || 0) + 1;
        if (state.owntracksProbeFailCountByDevice[failureKey] >= OWNTRACKS_STATUS_PROBE_FAILS_BEFORE_DISCONNECTED) {
          applyOwntracksProbeConnectionFailure('OwnTracks-Statusprüfung fehlgeschlagen.');
        }
      } finally {
        state.owntracksStatusProbeInFlight = false;
      }
    }

    function quickPollOwnTracksLastPosition() {
      fetchLastPositionRecord()
        .then(function (record) {
          const receivedAtMillis = lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(record);
          if (receivedAtMillis > state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt) {
            state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt = receivedAtMillis;
            triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
          }
        })
        .catch(function () {
          /* leichtes Polling: Fehler ignorieren */
        });
    }

    async function searchDestinationCoordinates(searchQuery) {
      const trimmedQuery = (searchQuery || '').trim();
      if (!trimmedQuery) {
        throw new Error('Bitte ein Ziel eingeben.');
      }
      const suggestionItems = await fetchRouteSuggestions(trimmedQuery, true);
      if (!Array.isArray(suggestionItems) || suggestionItems.length === 0) {
        throw new Error('Ziel wurde nicht gefunden.');
      }
      return suggestionItems[0];
    }

    async function searchDestinationCoordinatesDirect(searchQuery) {
      const trimmedQuery = (searchQuery || '').trim();
      if (!trimmedQuery) {
        throw new Error('Bitte einen Zwischenstopp eingeben.');
      }
      const searchUrl = 'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&limit=1&q=' + encodeURIComponent(trimmedQuery);
      const searchResults = await fetchJson(searchUrl, {
        headers: {
          'Accept': 'application/json'
        }
      });
      if (!Array.isArray(searchResults) || searchResults.length === 0) {
        throw new Error('Zwischenstopp wurde nicht gefunden.');
      }
      return {
        lat: Number(searchResults[0].lat),
        lon: Number(searchResults[0].lon),
        label: searchResults[0].display_name || trimmedQuery
      };
    }

    async function resolveMapClickLabel(latitude, longitude) {
      const fallbackLabel = 'Kartenpunkt: ' + Number(latitude).toFixed(6) + ', ' + Number(longitude).toFixed(6);
      const reverseUrl = 'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=jsonv2&lat=' +
        encodeURIComponent(String(latitude)) + '&lon=' + encodeURIComponent(String(longitude)) +
        '&zoom=18&addressdetails=1';
      try {
        const reverseResult = await fetchJson(reverseUrl, {
          headers: {
            'Accept': 'application/json'
          }
        });
        if (!reverseResult || typeof reverseResult !== 'object') {
          return fallbackLabel;
        }
        const addressObject = reverseResult.address || {};
        const primaryName = reverseResult.name || addressObject.shop || addressObject.amenity ||
          addressObject.tourism || addressObject.building || addressObject.road || '';
        const displayName = reverseResult.display_name || '';
        if (primaryName && displayName) {
          if (displayName.toLowerCase().indexOf(String(primaryName).toLowerCase()) >= 0) {
            return displayName;
          }
          return String(primaryName) + ', ' + displayName;
        }
        if (displayName) {
          return displayName;
        }
        if (primaryName) {
          return String(primaryName);
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fehler bei Reverse-Geocoding:', error);
      }
      return fallbackLabel;
    }

    function loadRecentRouteSuggestions() {
      try {
        const storedValue = window.localStorage.getItem(RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_STORAGE_KEY);
        if (!storedValue) {
          state.recentRouteSuggestions = [];
          return;
        }
        const parsedEntries = JSON.parse(storedValue);
        state.recentRouteSuggestions = Array.isArray(parsedEntries)
          ? parsedEntries.filter(function (entry) {
              return entry && typeof entry.lat === 'number' && typeof entry.lon === 'number' && entry.label;
            }).slice(0, RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_MAX_ENTRIES)
          : [];
      } catch (storageError) {
        state.recentRouteSuggestions = [];
      }
    }

    function persistRecentRouteSuggestions() {
      try {
        window.localStorage.setItem(
          RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_STORAGE_KEY,
          JSON.stringify(state.recentRouteSuggestions)
        );
      } catch (storageError) {
        // storage quota / privacy mode -> silent
      }
    }

    function addToRecentRouteSuggestions(suggestion) {
      if (!suggestion || typeof suggestion.lat !== 'number' || typeof suggestion.lon !== 'number' || !suggestion.label) {
        return;
      }
      const normalizedEntry = {
        lat: suggestion.lat,
        lon: suggestion.lon,
        label: suggestion.label,
        source: 'recent'
      };
      const filteredEntries = (Array.isArray(state.recentRouteSuggestions) ? state.recentRouteSuggestions : [])
        .filter(function (entry) {
          return entry && entry.label !== normalizedEntry.label;
        });
      state.recentRouteSuggestions = [normalizedEntry].concat(filteredEntries).slice(0, RECENT_SUGGESTIONS_MAX_ENTRIES);
      persistRecentRouteSuggestions();
    }

    function getRecentSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery) {
      const recentEntries = Array.isArray(state.recentRouteSuggestions) ? state.recentRouteSuggestions : [];
      if (!trimmedQuery) {
        return recentEntries.slice();
      }
      const lowerQuery = trimmedQuery.toLowerCase();
      return recentEntries.filter(function (entry) {
        return entry && entry.label && entry.label.toLowerCase().indexOf(lowerQuery) !== -1;
      });
    }

    function buildMyLocationSuggestionEntry() {
      return {
        lat: NaN,
        lon: NaN,
        label: 'Mein Standort',
        source: 'myLocation'
      };
    }

    function prependMyLocationSuggestion(entries) {
      const list = Array.isArray(entries) ? entries.slice() : [];
      const myLocationEntry = buildMyLocationSuggestionEntry();
      const filteredList = list.filter(function (entry) {
        return !(entry && entry.source === 'myLocation');
      });
      return [myLocationEntry].concat(filteredList);
    }

    function showRecentRouteSuggestionsForQuery(trimmedQuery) {
      const matchingRecents = getRecentSuggestionsMatchingQuery(trimmedQuery);
      const includeMyLocation = !state.activeSearchTarget || state.activeSearchTarget.kind !== 'waypoint';
      if (matchingRecents.length === 0 && !includeMyLocation) {
        hideRouteSuggestions();
        return;
      }
      state.routeSuggestions = includeMyLocation
        ? prependMyLocationSuggestion(matchingRecents)
        : matchingRecents;
      renderRouteSuggestions(true);
    }

    async function fetchRouteSuggestions(searchQuery, returnDataOnly) {
      const trimmedQuery = (searchQuery || '').trim();
      if (trimmedQuery.length < 1) {
        if (returnDataOnly) {
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
        } else {
          showRecentRouteSuggestionsForQuery(trimmedQuery);
        }
        return [];
      }

      const queryCacheKey = trimmedQuery.toLowerCase();
      if (state.suggestionCacheByQuery[queryCacheKey]) {
        const cachedRanked = state.suggestionCacheByQuery[queryCacheKey];
        const includeMyLocationCached = !returnDataOnly && (!state.activeSearchTarget || state.activeSearchTarget.kind !== 'waypoint');
        state.routeSuggestions = includeMyLocationCached
          ? prependMyLocationSuggestion(cachedRanked)
          : cachedRanked;
        if (!returnDataOnly) {
          renderRouteSuggestions(true);
        }
        return state.routeSuggestions;
      }

      state.routeSuggestRequestToken += 1;
      const activeRequestToken = state.routeSuggestRequestToken;
      if (state.routeSuggestAbortController) {
        state.routeSuggestAbortController.abort();
      }
      state.routeSuggestAbortController = new AbortController();
      const currentPosition = await fetchCurrentPosition();

      const queryVariants = buildSearchQueryVariants(trimmedQuery);
      const providerRequestPromises = [];
      queryVariants.forEach(function (queryVariant) {
        const encodedVariant = encodeURIComponent(queryVariant);
        providerRequestPromises.push(fetchJson(
          'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/search?format=json&addressdetails=1&limit=30&q=' + encodedVariant,
          { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }, signal: state.routeSuggestAbortController.signal }
        ).then(function (resultValue) { return { provider: 'nominatim', value: resultValue }; }));
        providerRequestPromises.push(fetchJson(
          'https://photon.komoot.io/api/?lang=de&limit=80&q=' + encodedVariant,
          { headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }, signal: state.routeSuggestAbortController.signal }
        ).then(function (resultValue) { return { provider: 'photon', value: resultValue }; }));
      });

      const providerResults = await Promise.allSettled(providerRequestPromises);
      if (activeRequestToken !== state.routeSuggestRequestToken) {
        return [];
      }

      const aggregatedSuggestions = [];
      providerResults.forEach(function (settledResult) {
        if (settledResult.status !== 'fulfilled' || !settledResult.value) {
          return;
        }
        const providerName = settledResult.value.provider;
        const providerPayload = settledResult.value.value;
        if (providerName === 'nominatim' && Array.isArray(providerPayload)) {
          providerPayload.forEach(function (entry) {
            const normalized = normalizeSuggestionItem({
              lat: entry.lat,
              lon: entry.lon,
              label: entry.display_name,
              source: 'nominatim'
            });
            if (normalized) aggregatedSuggestions.push(normalized);
          });
        } else if (providerName === 'photon' && providerPayload && Array.isArray(providerPayload.features)) {
          providerPayload.features.forEach(function (featureEntry) {
            const coordinates = featureEntry && featureEntry.geometry && Array.isArray(featureEntry.geometry.coordinates)
              ? featureEntry.geometry.coordinates
              : [];
            const featureProperties = featureEntry && featureEntry.properties ? featureEntry.properties : {};
            const labelParts = [
              featureProperties.name,
              featureProperties.city,
              featureProperties.state,
              featureProperties.country
            ].filter(function (labelPart) { return labelPart && String(labelPart).trim(); });
            const normalized = normalizeSuggestionItem({
              lat: coordinates[1],
              lon: coordinates[0],
              label: labelParts.join(', '),
              source: 'photon'
            });
            if (normalized) aggregatedSuggestions.push(normalized);
          });
        }
      });

      const allSuggestions = deduplicateSuggestions(aggregatedSuggestions);
      const rankedSuggestions = rankSuggestions(trimmedQuery, allSuggestions, currentPosition);
      const includeMyLocation = !returnDataOnly && (!state.activeSearchTarget || state.activeSearchTarget.kind !== 'waypoint');
      const finalSuggestions = includeMyLocation
        ? prependMyLocationSuggestion(rankedSuggestions)
        : rankedSuggestions;
      state.routeSuggestions = finalSuggestions;
      state.suggestionCacheByQuery[queryCacheKey] = rankedSuggestions;
      if (!returnDataOnly) {
        renderRouteSuggestions(true);
      }
      return rankedSuggestions;
    }

    function getTransportModeLabel(transportMode) {
      if (transportMode === 'walking') {
        return 'Fuß';
      }
      if (transportMode === 'cycling') {
        return 'Fahrrad';
      }
      return 'Auto';
    }

    function buildRouteServiceCandidates(transportMode) {
      if (transportMode === 'walking') {
        return [
          { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-foot', profile: 'foot', modeLabel: 'Fuß' },
          { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-foot', profile: 'walking', modeLabel: 'Fuß' },
          { baseUrl: 'https://router.project-osrm.org', profile: 'walking', modeLabel: 'Fuß' }
        ];
      }
      if (transportMode === 'cycling') {
        return [
          { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-bike', profile: 'bike', modeLabel: 'Fahrrad' },
          { baseUrl: 'https://routing.openstreetmap.de/routed-bike', profile: 'cycling', modeLabel: 'Fahrrad' },
          { baseUrl: 'https://router.project-osrm.org', profile: 'cycling', modeLabel: 'Fahrrad' }
        ];
      }
      return [
        { baseUrl: 'https://router.project-osrm.org', profile: 'driving', modeLabel: 'Auto' }
      ];
    }

    async function fetchRouteGeometry(startLat, startLon, endLat, endLon, transportMode, waypoints) {
      const routeServiceCandidates = buildRouteServiceCandidates(transportMode);
      let lastRouteErrorMessage = '';
      for (let candidateIndex = 0; candidateIndex < routeServiceCandidates.length; candidateIndex += 1) {
        const routeServiceCandidate = routeServiceCandidates[candidateIndex];
        const coordinateParts = [
          encodeURIComponent(String(startLon)) + ',' + encodeURIComponent(String(startLat))
        ];
        coordinateParts.push(
          encodeURIComponent(String(endLon)) + ',' + encodeURIComponent(String(endLat))
        );
        (Array.isArray(waypoints) ? waypoints : []).forEach(function (waypointItem) {
          if (waypointItem && typeof waypointItem.lat === 'number' && typeof waypointItem.lon === 'number') {
            coordinateParts.push(
              encodeURIComponent(String(waypointItem.lon)) + ',' + encodeURIComponent(String(waypointItem.lat))
            );
          }
        });
        const routeUrl = routeServiceCandidate.baseUrl + '/route/v1/' + routeServiceCandidate.profile + '/' +
          coordinateParts.join(';') +
          '?overview=full&geometries=geojson';
        try {
          const routeResponse = await fetchJson(routeUrl);
          if (routeResponse && Array.isArray(routeResponse.routes) && routeResponse.routes.length > 0) {
            return {
              route: routeResponse.routes[0],
              usedModeLabel: routeServiceCandidate.modeLabel || getTransportModeLabel(transportMode),
              usedServiceLabel: routeServiceCandidate.baseUrl + ' [' + routeServiceCandidate.profile + ']'
            };
          }
          lastRouteErrorMessage = 'Leere Routenantwort vom Routing-Dienst.';
        } catch (routeServiceError) {
          lastRouteErrorMessage = routeServiceError && routeServiceError.message
            ? routeServiceError.message
            : 'Routing-Dienst nicht erreichbar.';
        }
      }
      throw new Error('Route für "' + getTransportModeLabel(transportMode) + '" konnte nicht berechnet werden. ' + lastRouteErrorMessage);
    }

    function getSelectedTransportModeFromDom() {
      const transportModeElement = byId('transportMode');
      return transportModeElement ? transportModeElement.value : 'driving';
    }

    async function applyRouteWithKnownStartPosition(startPosition, destination) {
      const routeResult = await fetchRouteGeometry(
        startPosition.lat,
        startPosition.lon,
        destination.lat,
        destination.lon,
        getSelectedTransportModeFromDom(),
        state.selectedWaypoints
      );
      applyRouteOnMap(routeResult, destination);
    }

    async function applyRouteFromCurrentServerPositionToDestinationIfAvailable(destination) {
      const startPosition = await resolveRouteStartPosition();
      if (!startPosition) {
        return false;
      }
      await applyRouteWithKnownStartPosition(startPosition, destination);
      return true;
    }

    async function resolveRouteStartPosition() {
      if (state.selectedRouteStart &&
        typeof state.selectedRouteStart.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof state.selectedRouteStart.lon === 'number' &&
        Number.isFinite(state.selectedRouteStart.lat) &&
        Number.isFinite(state.selectedRouteStart.lon)) {
        return {
          lat: state.selectedRouteStart.lat,
          lon: state.selectedRouteStart.lon,
          label: state.selectedRouteStart.label || 'Start',
          kind: state.selectedRouteStart.kind || 'place'
        };
      }
      const currentPosition = await fetchCurrentPosition();
      if (!currentPosition) {
        return null;
      }
      return {
        lat: currentPosition.lat,
        lon: currentPosition.lon,
        label: 'Mein Standort',
        kind: 'currentLocation'
      };
    }

    function renderRouteStartMarker() {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const startEntry = state.selectedRouteStart;
      if (!startEntry || typeof startEntry.lat !== 'number' || typeof startEntry.lon !== 'number') {
        if (state.startMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
          state.startMarker = null;
        }
        return;
      }
      if (state.startMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
      }
      state.startMarker = L.marker([startEntry.lat, startEntry.lon], {
        icon: createRouteLabelIcon('S', 'route-label-marker-a')
      }).addTo(state.map);
      state.startMarker.bindPopup('S (Start): ' + (startEntry.label || ''));
    }

    function updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility() {
      const clearStartInlineButton = byId('clearStartInlineBtn');
      const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
      if (!clearStartInlineButton || !routeStartQueryElement) {
        return;
      }
      const hasInputText = String(routeStartQueryElement.value || '').trim().length > 0;
      clearStartInlineButton.classList.toggle('visible', hasInputText);
    }

    function formatDistanceMeters(distanceMeters) {
      if (typeof distanceMeters !== 'number' || Number.isNaN(distanceMeters)) {
        return '-';
      }
      if (distanceMeters >= 1000) {
        return (distanceMeters / 1000).toFixed(2) + ' km';
      }
      return Math.round(distanceMeters) + ' m';
    }

    function formatDurationSeconds(durationSeconds) {
      if (typeof durationSeconds !== 'number' || Number.isNaN(durationSeconds)) {
        return '-';
      }
      const totalMinutes = Math.round(durationSeconds / 60);
      const hours = Math.floor(totalMinutes / 60);
      const minutes = totalMinutes % 60;
      if (hours > 0) {
        return hours + ' h ' + minutes + ' min';
      }
      return minutes + ' min';
    }

    function createRouteLabelIcon(markerLabel, markerCssClass) {
      return L.divIcon({
        className: '',
        html: '<div class="route-label-marker ' + markerCssClass + '">' + markerLabel + '</div>',
        iconSize: [30, 30],
        iconAnchor: [15, 30],
        popupAnchor: [0, -26]
      });
    }

    function getCurrentMapBearingDegrees() {
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.getBearing !== 'function') {
        return 0;
      }
      const rawBearing = state.map.getBearing();
      if (typeof rawBearing !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(rawBearing)) {
        return 0;
      }
      return rawBearing;
    }

    function isMapLockedFacingPositionMarker(targetMarker) {
      if (!targetMarker || !targetMarker.options || !targetMarker.options.icon) {
        return false;
      }
      const iconOptions = targetMarker.options.icon.options;
      const iconClassName = iconOptions && iconOptions.className;
      return iconClassName === 'device-facing-marker-layer';
    }

    function applyCounterRotationToSingleMarker(targetMarker, counterRotationRadians) {
      if (!targetMarker || typeof targetMarker !== 'object') {
        return;
      }
      if (!targetMarker.options) {
        return;
      }
      if (isMapLockedFacingPositionMarker(targetMarker)) {
        targetMarker.options.rotateWithView = true;
        targetMarker.options.rotation = 0;
        if (typeof targetMarker.update === 'function' && targetMarker._map) {
          targetMarker.update();
        }
        return;
      }
      targetMarker.options.rotation = counterRotationRadians;
      if (typeof targetMarker.update === 'function' && targetMarker._map) {
        targetMarker.update();
      }
    }

    function applyCounterRotationToAllPositionMarkers(counterRotationRadians) {
      if (state.currentMarker) {
        applyCounterRotationToSingleMarker(state.currentMarker, counterRotationRadians);
      }
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
        applyCounterRotationToSingleMarker(state.currentHeadingMarker, counterRotationRadians);
      }
      if (state.allDeviceMarkersByKey && typeof state.allDeviceMarkersByKey === 'object') {
        Object.keys(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
          applyCounterRotationToSingleMarker(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey], counterRotationRadians);
        });
      }
    }

    let pendingBearingSyncFrameId = 0;
    function scheduleBearingMarkerSync() {
      if (pendingBearingSyncFrameId) {
        return;
      }
      pendingBearingSyncFrameId = (typeof window !== 'undefined' && typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === 'function')
        ? window.requestAnimationFrame(performBearingSyncNow)
        : setTimeout(performBearingSyncNow, 0);
    }

    function performBearingSyncNow() {
      pendingBearingSyncFrameId = 0;
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.getBearing !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      const bearingDegrees = getCurrentMapBearingDegrees();
      const counterRotationRadians = -bearingDegrees * Math.PI / 180;
      applyCounterRotationToAllPositionMarkers(counterRotationRadians);
    }

    function buildFacingIconSvg(normalizedHeading, accentHex) {
      const arrow = normalizedHeading === null ? '' : (
        '<g transform="rotate(' + normalizedHeading + ' 24 24)">' +
        '<path d="M24 7.5L33.5 28.5L24 21.5L14.5 28.5Z" fill="#111"/></g>'
      );
      return '<div class="device-facing-marker"><svg viewBox="0 0 48 48" width="48" height="48" aria-hidden="true">' +
        '<circle cx="24" cy="24" r="18" fill="none" stroke="' + accentHex + '" stroke-width="2.2"/>' +
        '<circle cx="24" cy="24" r="15" fill="#fff" stroke="#111" stroke-width="2.6"/>' +
        arrow + '</svg></div>';
    }

    function createCurrentPositionIcon(deviceKey, normalizedHeading) {
      return L.divIcon({
        className: 'device-facing-marker-layer',
        html: buildFacingIconSvg(normalizedHeading, getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey)),
        iconSize: [48, 48],
        iconAnchor: [24, 24],
        popupAnchor: [0, -26]
      });
    }

    function displayDestination(destination) {
      if (!destination || typeof destination.lat !== 'number' || typeof destination.lon !== 'number') {
        throw new Error('Suchziel ist ungültig.');
      }
      if (state.destinationMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.destinationMarker);
      }
      state.destinationMarker = L.marker([destination.lat, destination.lon], {
        icon: createRouteLabelIcon('A', 'route-label-marker-a')
      }).addTo(state.map);
      state.destinationMarker.bindPopup('A (Ziel): ' + destination.label);
      renderRouteStartMarker();
      state.map.setView([destination.lat, destination.lon], 16);
      updateRouteActionVisibility();
    }

    function updateWaypointButtonState() {
      const waypointButton = byId('waypointBtn');
      if (waypointButton) {
        waypointButton.classList.toggle('active', state.awaitingWaypointPick);
        const waypointCount = Array.isArray(state.selectedWaypoints) ? state.selectedWaypoints.length : 0;
        waypointButton.textContent = waypointCount > 0
          ? 'Zwischenstopps: ' + waypointCount + '/' + MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS
          : 'Zwischenstopp';
      }
      const waypointDynamicContainer = byId('waypointDynamicContainer');
      if (waypointDynamicContainer) {
        const rowCount = Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows) ? state.waypointEditorRows.length : 0;
        waypointDynamicContainer.classList.toggle('waypoint-dynamic-empty', rowCount === 0);
      }
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function newWaypointEditorRowId() {
      return 'w_' + Date.now().toString(36) + '_' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 9);
    }

    function findWaypointRowIndexById(rowId) {
      if (!rowId || !Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows)) {
        return -1;
      }
      for (let rowIndex = 0; rowIndex < state.waypointEditorRows.length; rowIndex += 1) {
        if (state.waypointEditorRows[rowIndex].id === rowId) {
          return rowIndex;
        }
      }
      return -1;
    }

    function syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows() {
      if (!Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows)) {
        state.waypointEditorRows = [];
      }
      state.selectedWaypoints = [];
      state.waypointEditorRows.forEach(function (rowEntry) {
        const suggestionItem = rowEntry && rowEntry.suggestion;
        if (suggestionItem &&
          typeof suggestionItem.lat === 'number' &&
          Number.isFinite(suggestionItem.lat) &&
          typeof suggestionItem.lon === 'number' &&
          Number.isFinite(suggestionItem.lon)) {
          state.selectedWaypoints.push({
            lat: suggestionItem.lat,
            lon: suggestionItem.lon,
            label: suggestionItem.label || ''
          });
        }
      });
    }

    function renderWaypointDynamicRows() {
      const containerElement = byId('waypointDynamicContainer');
      if (!containerElement) {
        return;
      }
      containerElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (!Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows) || state.waypointEditorRows.length === 0) {
        containerElement.classList.add('waypoint-dynamic-empty');
        updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
        updateWaypointButtonState();
        return;
      }
      containerElement.classList.remove('waypoint-dynamic-empty');

      state.waypointEditorRows.forEach(function (rowEntry, rowIndex) {
        const rowWrapElement = document.createElement('div');
        rowWrapElement.className = 'waypoint-dynamic-row waypoint-row-static';

        const inputWrapElement = document.createElement('div');
        inputWrapElement.className = 'search-input-wrap';

        const waypointInputElement = document.createElement('input');
        waypointInputElement.className = 'text-input';
        waypointInputElement.type = 'text';
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('data-waypoint-row-id', rowEntry.id);
        waypointInputElement.placeholder = 'Zwischenstopp suchen (Adresse oder Ort)';
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('autocomplete', 'off');
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('autocorrect', 'off');
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('autocapitalize', 'off');
        waypointInputElement.setAttribute('spellcheck', 'false');
        waypointInputElement.name = 'mapWaypointQuery';
        waypointInputElement.value = rowEntry.suggestion && rowEntry.suggestion.label
          ? rowEntry.suggestion.label
          : '';

        const clearRowButton = document.createElement('button');
        clearRowButton.type = 'button';
        clearRowButton.className = 'search-clear-btn';
        clearRowButton.title = 'Eingabe leeren';
        clearRowButton.textContent = '×';
        const updateClearRowVisibility = function () {
          const hasInputText = String(waypointInputElement.value || '').trim().length > 0;
          clearRowButton.classList.toggle('visible', hasInputText);
        };
        updateClearRowVisibility();

        clearRowButton.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          waypointInputElement.value = '';
          rowEntry.suggestion = null;
          state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
          syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
          renderWaypointMarkers();
          updateClearRowVisibility();
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
        });

        inputWrapElement.appendChild(waypointInputElement);
        inputWrapElement.appendChild(clearRowButton);

        const waypointLabelElement = document.createElement('div');
        waypointLabelElement.className = 'waypoint-index-badge route-letter-badge';
        waypointLabelElement.textContent = String.fromCharCode(66 + rowIndex);
        waypointLabelElement.title = 'Zwischenstopp ' + (rowIndex + 1);

        const actionsWrapElement = document.createElement('div');
        actionsWrapElement.className = 'waypoint-row-actions';

        const addRowButton = document.createElement('button');
        addRowButton.type = 'button';
        addRowButton.className = 'button button-route waypoint-row-icon-btn';
        addRowButton.title = 'Weiteres Suchfeld';
        addRowButton.textContent = '+';

        const removeRowButton = document.createElement('button');
        removeRowButton.type = 'button';
        removeRowButton.className = 'waypoint-remove-btn';
        removeRowButton.title = 'Zeile entfernen';
        removeRowButton.textContent = '×';

        addRowButton.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          if (state.waypointEditorRows.length >= MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS) {
            window.alert('Maximal ' + MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS + ' Zwischenstopps sind möglich.');
            return;
          }
          const newRowPayload = { id: newWaypointEditorRowId(), suggestion: null };
          state.waypointEditorRows.splice(rowIndex + 1, 0, newRowPayload);
          state.activeWaypointRowId = newRowPayload.id;
          state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = newRowPayload.id;
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
          state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = newRowPayload.id;
          state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
          renderWaypointDynamicRows();
          updateWaypointButtonState();
        });

        removeRowButton.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          stopEventPropagation(clickEvent);
          state.waypointEditorRows.splice(rowIndex, 1);
          if (state.activeWaypointRowId === rowEntry.id) {
            state.activeWaypointRowId = null;
            state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
          }
          if (state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId === rowEntry.id) {
            state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = null;
          }
          hideWaypointSuggestions();
          syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
          renderWaypointDynamicRows();
          renderWaypointMarkers();
          updateWaypointButtonState();
        });

        waypointInputElement.addEventListener('focus', function () {
          state.activeWaypointRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
          state.activeSearchTarget = { kind: 'waypoint', rowId: rowEntry.id };
          updateWaypointButtonState();
        });
        waypointInputElement.addEventListener('click', function () {
          state.activeWaypointRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
          state.activeSearchTarget = { kind: 'waypoint', rowId: rowEntry.id };
          updateWaypointButtonState();
        });
        waypointInputElement.addEventListener('input', function () {
          const previousLabel = rowEntry.suggestion && rowEntry.suggestion.label
            ? String(rowEntry.suggestion.label)
            : '';
          if (String(waypointInputElement.value || '').trim() !== previousLabel.trim()) {
            rowEntry.suggestion = null;
          }
          state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
          syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
          renderWaypointMarkers();
          updateClearRowVisibility();
          if (state.waypointSuggestTimer) {
            clearTimeout(state.waypointSuggestTimer);
          }
          state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = rowEntry.id;
          state.waypointSuggestTimer = setTimeout(function () {
            fetchRouteSuggestions(waypointInputElement.value, true).then(function (suggestionList) {
              state.waypointSuggestions = Array.isArray(suggestionList) ? suggestionList : [];
              renderWaypointSuggestions();
            }).catch(function (error) {
              if (error && error.name === 'AbortError') {
                return;
              }
              console.error('Fehler bei Zwischenstopp-Vorschlägen:', error);
              hideWaypointSuggestions();
            });
          }, ROUTE_INPUT_DEBOUNCE_MS);
        });
        waypointInputElement.addEventListener('keydown', function (keyboardEvent) {
          if (keyboardEvent.key === 'Enter') {
            keyboardEvent.preventDefault();
            handleWaypointRowEnterCommit(rowEntry.id).catch(function (error) {
              console.error('Fehler bei Zwischenstopp-Suche:', error);
              window.alert(getErrorMessageOrFallback(error, 'Zwischenstopp konnte nicht gesetzt werden.'));
            });
          }
        });

        if (state.waypointEditorRows.length < MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS) {
          actionsWrapElement.appendChild(addRowButton);
        }
        actionsWrapElement.appendChild(removeRowButton);

        rowWrapElement.appendChild(waypointLabelElement);
        rowWrapElement.appendChild(inputWrapElement);
        rowWrapElement.appendChild(actionsWrapElement);
        containerElement.appendChild(rowWrapElement);
      });

      if (state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId) {
        const focusRowId = state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId;
        state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = null;
        const focusInputElement = containerElement.querySelector('input[data-waypoint-row-id="' + focusRowId + '"]');
        if (focusInputElement && typeof focusInputElement.focus === 'function') {
          setTimeout(function () {
            focusInputElement.focus();
          }, 0);
        }
      }

      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
      updateWaypointButtonState();
    }

    function appendWaypointEditorRowAfterDestinationSearch() {
      if (!state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.waypointEditorRows.length >= MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS) {
        window.alert('Maximal ' + MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS + ' Zwischenstopps sind möglich.');
        return;
      }
      const lastRowEntry = state.waypointEditorRows.length > 0
        ? state.waypointEditorRows[state.waypointEditorRows.length - 1]
        : null;
      if (lastRowEntry && !lastRowEntry.suggestion) {
        state.activeWaypointRowId = lastRowEntry.id;
        state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = lastRowEntry.id;
        state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
        state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = lastRowEntry.id;
        state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
        hideWaypointSuggestions();
        renderWaypointDynamicRows();
        updateWaypointButtonState();
        return;
      }
      const newRowPayload = { id: newWaypointEditorRowId(), suggestion: null };
      state.waypointEditorRows.push(newRowPayload);
      state.activeWaypointRowId = newRowPayload.id;
      state.waypointSuggestionTargetRowId = newRowPayload.id;
      state.awaitingWaypointPick = true;
      state.pendingFocusWaypointRowId = newRowPayload.id;
      state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
      hideWaypointSuggestions();
      renderWaypointDynamicRows();
      updateWaypointButtonState();
    }

    async function recalculateRouteForSelectedDestination() {
      if (!state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
        return;
      }
      await applyRouteFromCurrentServerPositionToDestinationIfAvailable(state.selectedRouteSuggestion);
    }

    function renderWaypointMarkers() {
      if (Array.isArray(state.waypointMarkers)) {
        state.waypointMarkers.forEach(function (waypointMarkerEntry) {
          state.map.removeLayer(waypointMarkerEntry);
        });
      }
      state.waypointMarkers = [];
      (Array.isArray(state.selectedWaypoints) ? state.selectedWaypoints : []).forEach(function (waypointItem, waypointIndex) {
        if (!waypointItem || typeof waypointItem.lat !== 'number' || typeof waypointItem.lon !== 'number') {
          return;
        }
        const markerLetter = String.fromCharCode(66 + waypointIndex);
        const waypointMarker = L.marker([waypointItem.lat, waypointItem.lon], {
          icon: createRouteLabelIcon(markerLetter, 'route-label-marker-b')
        }).addTo(state.map);
        waypointMarker.bindPopup(markerLetter + ' (Zwischenstopp): ' + (waypointItem.label || 'Punkt'));
        state.waypointMarkers.push(waypointMarker);
      });
    }

    function fitMapToRoutePoints() {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const routePointLatLngs = [];
      if (state.destinationMarker) {
        routePointLatLngs.push(state.destinationMarker.getLatLng());
      }
      if (Array.isArray(state.waypointMarkers)) {
        state.waypointMarkers.forEach(function (waypointMarkerEntry) {
          if (waypointMarkerEntry) {
            routePointLatLngs.push(waypointMarkerEntry.getLatLng());
          }
        });
      }
      if (state.currentMarker) {
        routePointLatLngs.push(state.currentMarker.getLatLng());
      }
      if (routePointLatLngs.length === 0) {
        return;
      }
      if (routePointLatLngs.length === 1) {
        state.map.setView(routePointLatLngs[0], Math.min(state.map.getZoom(), 15), { animate: true });
        return;
      }
      const routeBounds = L.latLngBounds(routePointLatLngs);
      state.map.fitBounds(routeBounds, { padding: [60, 60], maxZoom: 16, animate: true });
    }

    const MAP_FIT_SAVED_OVERLAYS_PADDING = [60, 60];
    const MAP_FIT_SAVED_OVERLAYS_MAX_ZOOM = 16;
    const MAP_FIT_SAVED_OVERLAYS_SINGLE_POINT_ZOOM = 15;

    function fitMapToVisibleSavedRoutesAndPlaces() {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      let combinedBounds = null;
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers).forEach(function (routeId) {
        const layerBundle = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
        if (!layerBundle || !layerBundle.line || typeof layerBundle.line.getBounds !== 'function') {
          return;
        }
        const routeBounds = layerBundle.line.getBounds();
        if (!routeBounds || !routeBounds.isValid()) {
          return;
        }
        combinedBounds = combinedBounds ? combinedBounds.extend(routeBounds) : routeBounds;
      });
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers).forEach(function (placeId) {
        const placeMarker = state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
        if (!placeMarker || typeof placeMarker.getLatLng !== 'function') {
          return;
        }
        const placeLatLng = placeMarker.getLatLng();
        combinedBounds = combinedBounds
          ? combinedBounds.extend(placeLatLng)
          : L.latLngBounds(placeLatLng, placeLatLng);
      });
      if (!combinedBounds || !combinedBounds.isValid()) {
        return;
      }
      const boundsSouthWest = combinedBounds.getSouthWest();
      const boundsNorthEast = combinedBounds.getNorthEast();
      if (boundsSouthWest.equals(boundsNorthEast)) {
        state.map.setView(boundsSouthWest, Math.min(state.map.getZoom(), MAP_FIT_SAVED_OVERLAYS_SINGLE_POINT_ZOOM), { animate: true });
        return;
      }
      state.map.fitBounds(combinedBounds, {
        padding: MAP_FIT_SAVED_OVERLAYS_PADDING,
        maxZoom: MAP_FIT_SAVED_OVERLAYS_MAX_ZOOM,
        animate: true
      });
    }

    async function handleWaypointRowEnterCommit(rowId) {
      if (!state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
        throw new Error('Bitte zuerst ein Ziel auswählen.');
      }
      const rowIndex = findWaypointRowIndexById(rowId);
      if (rowIndex < 0) {
        return;
      }
      const containerElement = byId('waypointDynamicContainer');
      const inputElement = containerElement
        ? containerElement.querySelector('input[data-waypoint-row-id="' + rowId + '"]')
        : null;
      const waypointQuery = inputElement ? inputElement.value : '';
      const rowEntry = state.waypointEditorRows[rowIndex];
      const waypoint = state.selectedWaypointSuggestion && waypointQuery && state.selectedWaypointSuggestion.label === waypointQuery
        ? state.selectedWaypointSuggestion
        : await searchDestinationCoordinatesDirect(waypointQuery);
      hideWaypointSuggestions();
      rowEntry.suggestion = {
        lat: waypoint.lat,
        lon: waypoint.lon,
        label: waypoint.label
      };
      state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
      syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
      renderWaypointDynamicRows();
      renderWaypointMarkers();
      updateWaypointButtonState();
      state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
      fitMapToRoutePoints();
    }

    async function selectSuggestionAndShow(suggestion) {
      if (!suggestion) {
        return;
      }
      const targetKind = state.activeSearchTarget && state.activeSearchTarget.kind
        ? state.activeSearchTarget.kind
        : 'destination';
      const isMyLocationSuggestion = suggestion.source === 'myLocation';

      if (targetKind === 'start') {
        const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
        if (isMyLocationSuggestion) {
          state.selectedRouteStart = null;
          if (state.startMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
            state.startMarker = null;
          }
          if (routeStartQueryElement) {
            routeStartQueryElement.value = 'Mein Standort';
          }
        } else {
          state.selectedRouteStart = {
            lat: suggestion.lat,
            lon: suggestion.lon,
            label: suggestion.label,
            kind: 'place'
          };
          if (routeStartQueryElement) {
            routeStartQueryElement.value = suggestion.label;
          }
          addToRecentRouteSuggestions(suggestion);
          renderRouteStartMarker();
        }
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        hideRouteSuggestions();
        if (state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
          await applyRouteFromCurrentServerPositionToDestinationIfAvailable(state.selectedRouteSuggestion);
        }
        return;
      }

      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      if (isMyLocationSuggestion) {
        const currentPosition = await fetchCurrentPosition();
        if (!currentPosition) {
          window.alert('Aktueller Standort ist noch nicht verfügbar.');
          return;
        }
        const myLocationDestination = {
          lat: currentPosition.lat,
          lon: currentPosition.lon,
          label: 'Mein Standort'
        };
        if (routeQueryElement) {
          routeQueryElement.value = myLocationDestination.label;
        }
        state.selectedRouteSuggestion = myLocationDestination;
        hideRouteSuggestions();
        displayDestination(myLocationDestination);
        return;
      }

      if (routeQueryElement) {
        routeQueryElement.value = suggestion.label;
      }
      state.selectedRouteSuggestion = suggestion;
      hideRouteSuggestions();
      addToRecentRouteSuggestions(suggestion);
      displayDestination(suggestion);
    }

    function updateInlineClearButtonVisibility() {
      const clearSearchInlineButton = byId('clearSearchInlineBtn');
      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      if (!clearSearchInlineButton || !routeQueryElement) {
        return;
      }
      const hasInputText = String(routeQueryElement.value || '').trim().length > 0;
      clearSearchInlineButton.classList.toggle('visible', hasInputText);
    }

    function clearSearchInputAndMap() {
      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      if (routeQueryElement) {
        routeQueryElement.value = '';
      }
      const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
      if (routeStartQueryElement) {
        routeStartQueryElement.value = '';
      }
      state.selectedRouteSuggestion = null;
      state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
      state.selectedRouteStart = null;
      hideRouteSuggestions();
      hideWaypointSuggestions();
      clearRouteVisualization();
      updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
      updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
    }


    function updateDevicePointCounters(receivedCount, cleanedCount, deviceKey) {
      const receivedElement = byId('countReceived');
      const routeElement = byId('countRoute');
      if (!receivedElement || !routeElement) {
        return;
      }
      const scopeKey = deviceKey || '__default__';
      const sanitizedReceivedCount = Number.isFinite(Number(receivedCount)) ? Number(receivedCount) : 0;
      const sanitizedCleanedCount = Number.isFinite(Number(cleanedCount)) ? Number(cleanedCount) : 0;
      const switchedDevice = state.pointsCounterDeviceKey !== '' && state.pointsCounterDeviceKey !== scopeKey;
      state.pointsCounterDeviceKey = scopeKey;

      routeElement.textContent = String(sanitizedCleanedCount);

      if (switchedDevice) {
        receivedElement.classList.remove('count-pulse');
        receivedElement.textContent = String(sanitizedReceivedCount);
        state.pointsCounterPrevReceivedByKey[scopeKey] = sanitizedReceivedCount;
        return;
      }

      const previousReceivedCount = Number(state.pointsCounterPrevReceivedByKey[scopeKey] || 0);
      const receivedGrew = sanitizedReceivedCount > previousReceivedCount;
      state.pointsCounterPrevReceivedByKey[scopeKey] = sanitizedReceivedCount;

      if (receivedGrew) {
        receivedElement.textContent = String(sanitizedReceivedCount);
        receivedElement.classList.remove('count-pulse');
        void receivedElement.offsetWidth;
        receivedElement.classList.add('count-pulse');
        setTimeout(function () {
          receivedElement.classList.remove('count-pulse');
        }, 650);
      } else {
        receivedElement.textContent = String(sanitizedReceivedCount);
      }
    }

    const SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_SATURATION_PERCENT = 72;
    const SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_LIGHTNESS_PERCENT = 48;
    const SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX = '#6b7780';

    let savedRouteColorById = {};
    let savedPlaceColorById = {};

    function distinctHslColorForPaletteIndex(paletteIndex) {
      const goldenRatioConjugate = 0.618033988749895;
      const hueDegrees = Math.round(((paletteIndex * goldenRatioConjugate) % 1) * 360);
      return 'hsl(' + hueDegrees + ',' + SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_SATURATION_PERCENT + '%,' + SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_LIGHTNESS_PERCENT + '%)';
    }

    function rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors() {
      const nextRouteColors = {};
      const nextPlaceColors = {};
      const orderedItems = [];
      state.savedRoutes.forEach(function (routeEntry) {
        if (routeEntry && routeEntry.id) {
          orderedItems.push({ kind: 'route', id: String(routeEntry.id) });
        }
      });
      state.savedPlaces.forEach(function (placeEntry) {
        if (placeEntry && placeEntry.id) {
          orderedItems.push({ kind: 'place', id: String(placeEntry.id) });
        }
      });
      orderedItems.sort(function (itemA, itemB) {
        if (itemA.id !== itemB.id) {
          return itemA.id < itemB.id ? -1 : itemA.id > itemB.id ? 1 : 0;
        }
        if (itemA.kind !== itemB.kind) {
          return itemA.kind === 'route' ? -1 : 1;
        }
        return 0;
      });
      orderedItems.forEach(function (item, paletteIndex) {
        const nextColor = distinctHslColorForPaletteIndex(paletteIndex);
        if (item.kind === 'route') {
          nextRouteColors[item.id] = nextColor;
        } else {
          nextPlaceColors[item.id] = nextColor;
        }
      });
      savedRouteColorById = nextRouteColors;
      savedPlaceColorById = nextPlaceColors;
      refreshVisibleSavedLayerStyles();
    }

    function refreshVisibleSavedLayerStyles() {
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers).forEach(function (routeId) {
        const layerBundle = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
        const routeModel = state.savedRoutes.find(function (routeEntry) {
          return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === routeId;
        });
        const nextRouteColor = routeModel ? getRouteColor(routeModel) : SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
        if (layerBundle && layerBundle.line && typeof layerBundle.line.setStyle === 'function') {
          layerBundle.line.setStyle({ color: nextRouteColor });
        }
        if (layerBundle && layerBundle.startMarker && typeof layerBundle.startMarker.setStyle === 'function') {
          layerBundle.startMarker.setStyle({ color: nextRouteColor, fillColor: nextRouteColor });
        }
        if (layerBundle && layerBundle.endMarker && typeof layerBundle.endMarker.setStyle === 'function') {
          layerBundle.endMarker.setStyle({ color: nextRouteColor, fillColor: '#ffffff' });
        }
      });
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers).forEach(function (placeId) {
        const placeMarker = state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
        const placeModel = state.savedPlaces.find(function (placeEntry) {
          return placeEntry && placeEntry.id === placeId;
        });
        if (!placeMarker || !placeModel || typeof placeMarker.setStyle !== 'function') {
          return;
        }
        const nextPlaceColor = getPlaceColor(placeModel);
        placeMarker.setStyle({
          color: nextPlaceColor,
          fillColor: nextPlaceColor
        });
      });
    }

    async function loadSavedPlaces() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const placesUrl = selectedDeviceKey
        ? '/api/places?deviceKey=' + encodeURIComponent(selectedDeviceKey)
        : '/api/places';
      const placesJson = await fetchJson(placesUrl);
      state.savedPlaces = Array.isArray(placesJson.data) ? placesJson.data : [];
      renderPlacesList();
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
    }

    async function loadSavedRoutes() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const routesUrl = selectedDeviceKey
        ? '/api/routes?deviceKey=' + encodeURIComponent(selectedDeviceKey)
        : '/api/routes';
      const routesJson = await fetchJson(routesUrl);
      state.savedRoutes = Array.isArray(routesJson.data) ? routesJson.data : [];
      renderRoutesList();
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
    }

    function getRouteColor(savedRoute) {
      if (!savedRoute || !savedRoute.id) {
        return distinctHslColorForPaletteIndex(0);
      }
      const cachedRouteColor = savedRouteColorById[savedRoute.id];
      if (cachedRouteColor) {
        return cachedRouteColor;
      }
      const routeStillInList = state.savedRoutes.some(function (routeEntry) {
        return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === savedRoute.id;
      });
      if (routeStillInList) {
        rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
        return savedRouteColorById[savedRoute.id] || SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
      }
      return SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
    }

    function setSavedRouteVisibility(routeId, shouldBeVisible) {
      if (!routeId) {
        return;
      }
      const savedRoute = state.savedRoutes.find(function (routeEntry) {
        return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === routeId;
      });
      if (!savedRoute || !Array.isArray(savedRoute.points) || savedRoute.points.length < 2) {
        return;
      }

      const existingLayer = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
      if (!shouldBeVisible) {
        if (existingLayer) {
          state.map.removeLayer(existingLayer.line);
          if (existingLayer.startMarker) state.map.removeLayer(existingLayer.startMarker);
          if (existingLayer.endMarker) state.map.removeLayer(existingLayer.endMarker);
          delete state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
          renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
        }
        return;
      }
      if (existingLayer) {
        return;
      }

      const routeColor = getRouteColor(savedRoute);
      const routeCoords = savedRoute.points
        .filter(function (point) { return typeof point.lat === 'number' && typeof point.lon === 'number'; })
        .map(function (point) { return [point.lat, point.lon]; });
      if (routeCoords.length < 2) return;

      const routeLine = L.polyline(routeCoords, withVectorRenderer({
        color: routeColor,
        weight: 4,
        opacity: 0.85
      })).addTo(state.map);
      routeLine.bindPopup('Route: ' + savedRoute.name);
      const startMarker = L.circleMarker(routeCoords[0], withVectorRenderer({
        radius: 6,
        color: routeColor,
        fillColor: routeColor,
        fillOpacity: 0.95,
        weight: 2
      })).addTo(state.map);
      startMarker.bindPopup('Route "' + savedRoute.name + '" – Start');
      const endMarker = L.circleMarker(routeCoords[routeCoords.length - 1], withVectorRenderer({
        radius: 6,
        color: routeColor,
        fillColor: '#fff',
        fillOpacity: 1,
        weight: 3
      })).addTo(state.map);
      endMarker.bindPopup('Route "' + savedRoute.name + '" – Ende');

      state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId] = { line: routeLine, startMarker: startMarker, endMarker: endMarker };
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      fitMapToVisibleSavedRoutesAndPlaces();
    }

    function toggleSavedRouteVisibility(routeId) {
      const isVisible = !!state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
      setSavedRouteVisibility(routeId, !isVisible);
      renderRoutesList();
    }

    function clearSavedRouteLayers() {
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers).forEach(function (routeId) {
        const layerBundle = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
        if (layerBundle) {
          state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.line);
          if (layerBundle.startMarker) state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.startMarker);
          if (layerBundle.endMarker) state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.endMarker);
        }
        delete state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
      });
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
    }

    function renderRoutesList() {
      const routesListElement = byId('routesList');
      if (!routesListElement) {
        return;
      }
      routesListElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (state.savedRoutes.length === 0) {
        const emptyElement = document.createElement('div');
        emptyElement.className = 'row';
        emptyElement.textContent = 'Keine gespeicherten Routen.';
        routesListElement.appendChild(emptyElement);
        return;
      }

      state.savedRoutes.forEach(function (savedRoute) {
        if (!savedRoute || !savedRoute.id) {
          return;
        }
        const rowElement = document.createElement('div');
        rowElement.className = 'place-row';

        const toggleButton = document.createElement('button');
        toggleButton.type = 'button';
        toggleButton.className = 'place-toggle' + (state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[savedRoute.id] ? ' active' : '');
        toggleButton.dataset.routeId = savedRoute.id;
        const pointsCount = Array.isArray(savedRoute.points) ? savedRoute.points.length : 0;
        toggleButton.innerHTML =
          '<span class="route-color-bar" style="background:' + getRouteColor(savedRoute) + ';"></span> ' +
          savedRoute.name + ' (' + pointsCount + ' Pkt, ' + formatTime(savedRoute.timestamp) + ')';
        toggleButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
          toggleSavedRouteVisibility(savedRoute.id);
        });

        const deleteCheckbox = document.createElement('input');
        deleteCheckbox.type = 'checkbox';
        deleteCheckbox.checked = !!state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[savedRoute.id];
        deleteCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function () {
          if (deleteCheckbox.checked) {
            state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[savedRoute.id] = true;
          } else {
            delete state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[savedRoute.id];
          }
        });

        rowElement.appendChild(toggleButton);
        rowElement.appendChild(deleteCheckbox);
        routesListElement.appendChild(rowElement);
      });
    }

    async function saveCurrentRoute() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const historyJson = await fetchHistoryForSelectedDevice();
      const pointCount = Array.isArray(historyJson.data) ? historyJson.data.length : 0;
      if (pointCount < 2) {
        window.alert('Keine Trackingdaten für eine Route vorhanden (mindestens 2 Punkte nötig).');
        return;
      }
      const routeName = window.prompt('Bitte Namen für die Route eingeben:');
      if (routeName === null) {
        return;
      }
      const trimmedRouteName = routeName.trim();
      if (!trimmedRouteName) {
        window.alert('Bitte einen gültigen Namen eingeben.');
        return;
      }
      const saveResult = await fetchJson('/api/routes', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          name: trimmedRouteName,
          deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey
        })
      });
      window.alert('Die Route wurde gespeichert.');
      await loadSavedRoutes();
      if (saveResult && saveResult.data && saveResult.data.id) {
        setSavedRouteVisibility(saveResult.data.id, true);
        renderRoutesList();
      }
    }

    function getPlaceColor(savedPlace) {
      if (!savedPlace || !savedPlace.id) {
        return distinctHslColorForPaletteIndex(0);
      }
      const cachedPlaceColor = savedPlaceColorById[savedPlace.id];
      if (cachedPlaceColor) {
        return cachedPlaceColor;
      }
      const placeStillInList = state.savedPlaces.some(function (placeEntry) {
        return placeEntry && placeEntry.id === savedPlace.id;
      });
      if (placeStillInList) {
        rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
        return savedPlaceColorById[savedPlace.id] || SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
      }
      return SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
    }

    function clearSavedPlaceMarkers() {
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers).forEach(function (placeId) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId]);
        delete state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
      });
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
    }

    function removeStartMarker() {
      if (state.startMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
        state.startMarker = null;
      }
      state.map.eachLayer(function (layer) {
        if (layer && typeof layer.getPopup === 'function') {
          const layerPopup = layer.getPopup();
          if (layerPopup && layerPopup.getContent && layerPopup.getContent() === 'Startpunkt') {
            state.map.removeLayer(layer);
          }
        }
      });
    }

    function setSavedPlaceVisibility(placeId, shouldBeVisible) {
      if (!placeId) {
        return;
      }

      const savedPlace = state.savedPlaces.find(function (placeEntry) {
        return placeEntry && placeEntry.id === placeId;
      });
      if (!savedPlace || typeof savedPlace.lat !== 'number' || typeof savedPlace.lon !== 'number') {
        return;
      }

      const existingMarker = state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
      if (!shouldBeVisible) {
        if (existingMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(existingMarker);
          delete state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
          renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
        }
        return;
      }

      if (existingMarker) {
        return;
      }

      const markerColor = getPlaceColor(savedPlace);
      const placeMarker = L.circleMarker([savedPlace.lat, savedPlace.lon], withVectorRenderer({
        radius: 8,
        color: markerColor,
        fillColor: markerColor,
        fillOpacity: 0.9,
        weight: 2
      })).addTo(state.map);
      placeMarker.bindPopup('Ort: ' + savedPlace.name);
      state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId] = placeMarker;
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      fitMapToVisibleSavedRoutesAndPlaces();
    }

    function toggleSavedPlaceVisibility(placeId) {
      const markerIsVisible = !!state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
      setSavedPlaceVisibility(placeId, !markerIsVisible);
      renderPlacesList();
    }

    function getSelectedDeletePlaceIds() {
      return Object.keys(state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet).filter(function (placeId) {
        return !!state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[placeId];
      });
    }

    function toggleDeleteSelection(placeId, isSelected) {
      if (!placeId) {
        return;
      }
      if (isSelected) {
        state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[placeId] = true;
      } else {
        delete state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[placeId];
      }
    }

        emptyElement.textContent = 'Keine gespeicherten Orte.';

        placeToggleButton.dataset.placeId = savedPlace.id;
        placeToggleButton.innerHTML =
          '<span class="place-color-dot" style="background:' + getPlaceColor(savedPlace) + ';"></span>' +
          savedPlace.name + ' (' + formatTime(savedPlace.timestamp) + ')';

          toggleSavedPlaceVisibility(savedPlace.id);

    function renderVisiblePlacesLegend() {
      const placesLegendElement = byId('placesLegend');
      const placesLegendItemsElement = byId('placesLegendItems');
      const routesLegendItemsElement = byId('routesLegendItems');
      const placesSectionElement = byId('placesLegendPlacesSection');
      const routesSectionElement = byId('placesLegendRoutesSection');
      if (!placesLegendElement || !placesLegendItemsElement || !routesLegendItemsElement) {
        return;
      }

      placesLegendItemsElement.innerHTML = '';
      routesLegendItemsElement.innerHTML = '';

      const visiblePlaceIds = Object.keys(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers);
      visiblePlaceIds.forEach(function (placeId) {
        const savedPlace = state.savedPlaces.find(function (placeEntry) {
          return placeEntry && placeEntry.id === placeId;
        });
        if (!savedPlace) {
          return;
        }
        const legendItemElement = document.createElement('div');
        legendItemElement.className = 'legend-item';
        legendItemElement.setAttribute('data-kind', 'place');
        const legendColorElement = document.createElement('span');
        legendColorElement.className = 'legend-color-dot';
        legendColorElement.style.background = getPlaceColor(savedPlace);
        const legendNameElement = document.createElement('span');
        legendNameElement.textContent = savedPlace.name;
        legendItemElement.appendChild(legendColorElement);
        legendItemElement.appendChild(legendNameElement);
        placesLegendItemsElement.appendChild(legendItemElement);
      });

      const visibleRouteIds = Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers);
      visibleRouteIds.forEach(function (routeId) {
        const savedRoute = state.savedRoutes.find(function (routeEntry) {
          return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === routeId;
        });
        if (!savedRoute) {
          return;
        }
        const legendItemElement = document.createElement('div');
        legendItemElement.className = 'legend-item';
        legendItemElement.setAttribute('data-kind', 'route');
        const legendColorElement = document.createElement('span');
        legendColorElement.className = 'route-color-bar';
        legendColorElement.style.background = getRouteColor(savedRoute);
        legendColorElement.style.marginRight = '8px';
        const legendNameElement = document.createElement('span');
        legendNameElement.textContent = savedRoute.name;
        legendItemElement.appendChild(legendColorElement);
        legendItemElement.appendChild(legendNameElement);
        routesLegendItemsElement.appendChild(legendItemElement);
      });

      if (placesSectionElement) {
        placesSectionElement.style.display = placesLegendItemsElement.children.length > 0 ? '' : 'none';
      }
      if (routesSectionElement) {
        routesSectionElement.style.display = routesLegendItemsElement.children.length > 0 ? '' : 'none';
      }

      if (placesLegendItemsElement.children.length > 0 || routesLegendItemsElement.children.length > 0) {
        placesLegendElement.classList.add('open');
      } else {
        placesLegendElement.classList.remove('open');
      }

            deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey
          })
        });

        await fetchJson('/api/routes', {

            deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey
          })
