    async function loadTracking() {
      try {
        const resultList = await Promise.all([
          fetchJson('/api/last-position'),
          fetchHistoryForSelectedDevice(),
          fetchDevicesSnapshot()
        ]);
        const lastJson = resultList[0];
        const historyJson = resultList[1];
        const devicesSnapshot = resultList[2];
        applyDeviceSnapshot(devicesSnapshot);

        const last = lastJson.data;
        const history = historyJson.data || [];
        const activePosition = getSelectedOrFallbackPosition(last);
        const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        if (selectedDeviceKey) {
          const selectedOnlyEntry = state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
          if (selectedOnlyEntry) {
            tryClearForcedDisconnectAfterFreshPoint(selectedDeviceKey, selectedOnlyEntry);
          } else if (activePosition && positionEntryMatchesSelectedDevice(activePosition, selectedDeviceKey)) {
            tryClearForcedDisconnectAfterFreshPoint(selectedDeviceKey, activePosition);
          }
        }
        const probeStateKey = getOwntracksProbeFailureKey();
        const statusPositionEntry = selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]
          ? state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]
          : activePosition;
        let connectionStatus;
        if (state.owntracksProbeWatchdogFailedByKey[probeStateKey]) {
          const hysteresisKey = connectionStatusKeyForDevice(selectedDeviceKey);
          state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
          connectionStatus = { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
        } else {
          connectionStatus = evaluateConnectionStatus(statusPositionEntry, selectedDeviceKey);
        }

        const trackingStatusResponse = await fetchTrackingStatus(selectedDeviceKey);
        const trackingStatusData = trackingStatusResponse && trackingStatusResponse.data
          ? trackingStatusResponse.data
          : null;
        state.trackingEnabled = !!(trackingStatusData && trackingStatusData.active);
        updateTrackingButtonLabel();
        updateTrackingStatusChip();
        const cleanedCount = typeof historyJson.count === 'number'
          ? historyJson.count
          : history.length;
        const receivedCount = typeof historyJson.received === 'number'
          ? historyJson.received
          : cleanedCount;
        updateDevicePointCounters(receivedCount, cleanedCount, getSelectedDeviceKey());
        setStatusChip('connStatus', connectionStatus.text, connectionStatus.level);

        const validHistory = history.filter(function (point) {
          return typeof point.lat === 'number' && typeof point.lon === 'number';
        });

        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
          removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap();
        }

        if (activePosition && typeof activePosition.lat === 'number' && typeof activePosition.lon === 'number' &&
          (!selectedDeviceKey || positionEntryMatchesSelectedDevice(activePosition, selectedDeviceKey))) {
          const activeDeviceKey = selectedDeviceKey || activePosition.key || '';
          const deviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(activeDeviceKey, activePosition);
          setTextIfPresent('device', deviceLabel);
          setTextIfPresent('lat', activePosition.lat);
          setTextIfPresent('lon', activePosition.lon);

          const currentLatLng = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
          const headingDeviceKey = selectedDeviceKey || activeDeviceKey || '';
          const nhLive = normalizeHeadingDegrees(activePosition && activePosition.heading);
          rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(headingDeviceKey, nhLive);
          const effLive = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(headingDeviceKey, nhLive);

          if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
            if (!state.currentMarker) {
              state.currentMarker = L.marker(currentLatLng, {
                icon: createCurrentPositionIcon(
                  selectedDeviceKey || '',
                  effLive
                ),
                zIndexOffset: 2000,
                rotateWithView: true,
                rotation: 0
              }).addTo(state.map);
              state.currentMarker.bindPopup('Aktuelle Position');
            } else {
              animateCurrentMarkerTo(currentLatLng, activePosition.timestamp);
            }
          }
          updateHeadingVisualization(activePosition, currentLatLng);
          state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
          if (selectedDeviceKey) {
            state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey] = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
          }

          if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
            if (!state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation) {
              state.map.setView(currentLatLng, 16);
              state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = true;
            } else {
              followCurrentPositionOnMap(currentLatLng, false);
            }
          } else if (selectedDeviceKey) {
            if (state.mapLastCenteredDeviceKeyInAllMode !== selectedDeviceKey) {
              state.map.setView(currentLatLng, 16);
              state.mapLastCenteredDeviceKeyInAllMode = selectedDeviceKey;
            } else {
              followCurrentPositionOnMap(currentLatLng, false);
            }
          }

          startBackgroundRegionPrecache(state.map, { lat: activePosition.lat, lng: activePosition.lon });
          fillOwntracksDetailPanel(activePosition);
        } else {
          const fallbackLatLng = selectedDeviceKey && state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey]
            ? state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey]
            : null;
          if (fallbackLatLng && Array.isArray(fallbackLatLng) && fallbackLatLng.length >= 2) {
            if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
              const dkFb = selectedDeviceKey || '';
              const effFb = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(dkFb, null);
              if (!state.currentMarker) {
                state.currentMarker = L.marker(fallbackLatLng, {
                  icon: createCurrentPositionIcon(selectedDeviceKey || '', effFb),
                  zIndexOffset: 2000,
                  rotateWithView: true,
                  rotation: 0
                }).addTo(state.map);
                state.currentMarker.bindPopup('Letzte bekannte Position');
              } else {

          } else {

              : null;
            if (existingMarkerLatLng && Number.isFinite(existingMarkerLatLng.lat) && Number.isFinite(existingMarkerLatLng.lng)) {
              if (selectedDeviceKey) {
                state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey] = [existingMarkerLatLng.lat, existingMarkerLatLng.lng];
              }
              setTextIfPresent('device', getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedDeviceKey, null));
              setTextIfPresent('lat', existingMarkerLatLng.lat);
              setTextIfPresent('lon', existingMarkerLatLng.lng);
            } else {

                setTextIfPresent('device', '-');

              setTextIfPresent('lat', '-');
              setTextIfPresent('lon', '-');
            }
          }
          fillOwntracksDetailPanel(
            (selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]) ? state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey] : (activePosition || null)
          );
        }

        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();

        if (state.showLatestTrackingRoute) {
          const trackingStatusResponse = await fetchTrackingStatus(selectedDeviceKey);
          const trackingStatusData = trackingStatusResponse && trackingStatusResponse.data
            ? trackingStatusResponse.data
            : null;
          const trackedStartPosition = trackingStatusData &&
            trackingStatusData.missionStartPosition &&
            typeof trackingStatusData.missionStartPosition.lat === 'number' &&
            typeof trackingStatusData.missionStartPosition.lon === 'number'
            ? trackingStatusData.missionStartPosition
            : state.latestTrackingStartPosition;
          state.latestTrackingStartPosition = trackedStartPosition || null;
          renderLatestTrackingRouteLineFromHistory(validHistory, trackedStartPosition);
          if (state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine && !state.userHasInteractedWithMap && Array.isArray(validHistory) && validHistory.length > 0) {
            if (state.latestTrackingRouteLine) {
              state.map.fitBounds(state.latestTrackingRouteLine.getBounds(), { padding: [20, 20] });
            } else if (state.latestTrackingStartMarker) {
              state.map.setView(state.latestTrackingStartMarker.getLatLng(), 15);
            }
            state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
          }
        } else {
          removeLatestTrackingRouteLine();
        }
        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
          removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          await updateFailsafeOverlaysForAllDevices();
        } else {
          updateFailsafeStateFromTrackingStatus(trackingStatusData);
          clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
        }
        const connChipElement = byId('connStatus');
        if (connChipElement) {
          let connectionStatusTitle = '';
          if (state.owntracksProbeWatchdogFailedByKey[probeStateKey] &&
            state.owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey[probeStateKey]) {
            connectionStatusTitle = state.owntracksStatusProbeFailureTitleByKey[probeStateKey];
          } else if (trackingStatusData && trackingStatusData.active && trackingStatusData.failsafe) {
            const failsafeInfo = trackingStatusData.failsafe;
            const statusDeviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedDeviceKey, null);
            if (failsafeInfo.linkLostForLongTime) {
              connectionStatusTitle = 'Gerät «' + statusDeviceLabel + '»: Failsafe – seit 1 Minute keine frischen Daten. Letzter bekannter Standort und Rückkehrpunkt bleiben gespeichert; Rückkehrroute wird berechnet.';
            } else if (failsafeInfo.linkStale) {
              connectionStatusTitle = 'Gerät «' + statusDeviceLabel + '»: Getrennt (≥10 s ohne frische Daten). Letzter Standort bleibt gespeichert. Rückkehr-Failsafe erst nach 1 Minute ohne Daten.';
            }
          }
          if (connectionStatusTitle) {
            connChipElement.setAttribute('title', connectionStatusTitle);
          } else {
            connChipElement.removeAttribute('title');
          }
        }
        state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt = Math.max(
          state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt,
          lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(last)
        );
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Laden der Tracking-Daten:', error);

    async function applyClickedPlaceToActiveSearchField(clickEvent) {
      if (!clickEvent || !clickEvent.latlng) {
        return;
      }
      const clickLatitude = Number(clickEvent.latlng.lat);
      const clickLongitude = Number(clickEvent.latlng.lng);
      if (!Number.isFinite(clickLatitude) || !Number.isFinite(clickLongitude)) {
        return;
      }
      const clickLabel = await resolveMapClickLabel(clickLatitude, clickLongitude);
      const targetKind = state.activeSearchTarget && state.activeSearchTarget.kind;

      if (targetKind === 'waypoint') {
        const targetRowId = state.activeSearchTarget.rowId || state.activeWaypointRowId;
        let targetRowIndex = findWaypointRowIndexById(targetRowId);
        if (targetRowIndex < 0) {
          if (!Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows) || state.waypointEditorRows.length === 0) {
            return;
          }
          targetRowIndex = state.waypointEditorRows.length - 1;
        }
        const rowEntry = state.waypointEditorRows[targetRowIndex];
        rowEntry.suggestion = {
          lat: clickLatitude,
          lon: clickLongitude,
          label: clickLabel

        state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
        state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
        hideWaypointSuggestions();
        syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
        renderWaypointDynamicRows();
        renderWaypointMarkers();
        updateWaypointButtonState();
        fitMapToRoutePoints();
        return;
      }

      if (targetKind === 'start') {
        const startEntry = {
          lat: clickLatitude,
          lon: clickLongitude,
          label: clickLabel,
          kind: 'place'
        };
        state.selectedRouteStart = startEntry;
        const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
        if (routeStartQueryElement) {
          routeStartQueryElement.value = clickLabel;
        }
        addToRecentRouteSuggestions({ lat: clickLatitude, lon: clickLongitude, label: clickLabel });
        hideRouteSuggestions();
        renderRouteStartMarker();
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        if (state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
          await applyRouteWithKnownStartPosition(startEntry, state.selectedRouteSuggestion);
        }
        return;
      }

      const destination = {
        lat: clickLatitude,
        lon: clickLongitude,
        label: clickLabel
      };
      state.selectedRouteSuggestion = destination;

      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      if (routeQueryElement) {
        routeQueryElement.value = destination.label;
      }
      updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
      hideRouteSuggestions();
      if (state.routeLine) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.routeLine);
        state.routeLine = null;
      }
      setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
      addToRecentRouteSuggestions(destination);
      displayDestination(destination);
      updateWaypointButtonState();
      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
    }

    function attachMapClickGestures(mapInstance) {
      const containerElement = mapInstance.getContainer();
      if (!containerElement) {
        return;
      }
      let pressStartedAt = 0;
      let pressStartLayerPoint = null;
      let pressStartScreenPoint = null;
      let pressTimerId = null;
      let pressFiredAsLong = false;
      let pressActivePointerId = null;

      const cancelPendingTimer = function () {
        if (pressTimerId) {
          clearTimeout(pressTimerId);
          pressTimerId = null;
        }
      };

      const cleanupGestureState = function () {
        cancelPendingTimer();
        pressStartedAt = 0;
        pressStartLayerPoint = null;
        pressStartScreenPoint = null;
        pressActivePointerId = null;
      };

      const isPointerOnMapInteractive = function (target) {
        if (!target || target === containerElement) {
          return true;
        }
        let cursor = target;
        while (cursor && cursor !== containerElement) {
          if (cursor.classList && (
            cursor.classList.contains('leaflet-marker-icon') ||
            cursor.classList.contains('leaflet-popup') ||
            cursor.classList.contains('leaflet-control')
          )) {
            return false;
          }
          cursor = cursor.parentElement;
        }
        return true;
      };

      containerElement.addEventListener('pointerdown', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (pointerEvent.pointerType === 'mouse' && pointerEvent.button !== 0) {
          return;
        }
        if (!isPointerOnMapInteractive(pointerEvent.target)) {
          return;
        }
        cleanupGestureState();
        pressFiredAsLong = false;
        pressActivePointerId = pointerEvent.pointerId;
        pressStartedAt = Date.now();
        pressStartScreenPoint = { x: pointerEvent.clientX, y: pointerEvent.clientY };
        const containerPoint = mapInstance.mouseEventToContainerPoint(pointerEvent);
        pressStartLayerPoint = containerPoint;
        pressTimerId = setTimeout(function () {
          pressTimerId = null;
          if (pressActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId) {
            return;
          }
          pressFiredAsLong = true;
          state.placeSheetSuppressNextMapClick = true;
          const latlng = mapInstance.containerPointToLatLng(containerPoint);
          handleMapLongPress({ latlng: latlng }).catch(function (longPressError) {
            console.error('Fehler beim Ortsdetail-Aufruf:', longPressError);
          });
        }, MAP_LONG_PRESS_DURATION_MS);
      }, { passive: true });

      containerElement.addEventListener('pointermove', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (pressActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId || !pressStartScreenPoint) {
          return;
        }
        const movementX = pointerEvent.clientX - pressStartScreenPoint.x;
        const movementY = pointerEvent.clientY - pressStartScreenPoint.y;
        const movementDistance = Math.sqrt(movementX * movementX + movementY * movementY);
        if (movementDistance > MAP_LONG_PRESS_MAX_MOVEMENT_PIXELS) {
          cleanupGestureState();
        }
      }, { passive: true });

      const cancelPress = function (pointerEvent) {
        if (pointerEvent && pressActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId) {
          return;
        }
        cleanupGestureState();
      };
      containerElement.addEventListener('pointerup', cancelPress, { passive: true });
      containerElement.addEventListener('pointercancel', cancelPress, { passive: true });
      containerElement.addEventListener('pointerleave', cancelPress, { passive: true });

      mapInstance.on('click', function (clickEvent) {
        if (state.placeSheetSuppressNextMapClick || pressFiredAsLong) {
          state.placeSheetSuppressNextMapClick = false;
          pressFiredAsLong = false;
          return;
        }
        if (!isSearchPanelOpen() || !hasActiveSearchTarget()) {
          return;
        }
        applyClickedPlaceToActiveSearchField(clickEvent).catch(function (clickError) {
          console.error('Fehler bei Karten-Tap-Übernahme:', clickError);
          window.alert(getErrorMessageOrFallback(clickError, 'Karten-Auswahl konnte nicht übernommen werden.'));
        });
      });
    }

    async function handleMapLongPress(longPressEvent) {
      if (!longPressEvent || !longPressEvent.latlng) {
        return;
      }
      const pressLatitude = Number(longPressEvent.latlng.lat);
      const pressLongitude = Number(longPressEvent.latlng.lng);
      if (!Number.isFinite(pressLatitude) || !Number.isFinite(pressLongitude)) {
        return;
      }
      placeLongPressMarker(pressLatitude, pressLongitude);
      const pressLabelPreview = 'Kartenpunkt: ' + pressLatitude.toFixed(5) + ', ' + pressLongitude.toFixed(5);
      openPlaceSheet({
        lat: pressLatitude,
        lon: pressLongitude,
        label: pressLabelPreview,
        loading: true
      });
      try {
        const placeDetails = await fetchPlaceDetails(pressLatitude, pressLongitude);
        const resolvedLabel = composePlaceLabelFromDetails(placeDetails) ||
          (await resolveMapClickLabel(pressLatitude, pressLongitude));
        const placePoint = {
          lat: pressLatitude,
          lon: pressLongitude,
          label: resolvedLabel || pressLabelPreview,
          details: placeDetails
        };
        state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = placePoint;
        renderPlaceSheet(placePoint);
      } catch (detailsError) {
        console.error('Ortsdetails konnten nicht geladen werden:', detailsError);
        const fallbackLabel = await resolveMapClickLabel(pressLatitude, pressLongitude);
        const fallbackPoint = {
          lat: pressLatitude,
          lon: pressLongitude,
          label: fallbackLabel || pressLabelPreview,
          details: null,
          detailsError: detailsError && detailsError.message ? detailsError.message : 'Details nicht verfügbar.'
        };
        state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = fallbackPoint;
        renderPlaceSheet(fallbackPoint);
      }
    }

    function placeLongPressMarker(latitude, longitude) {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.longPressMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.longPressMarker);
        state.longPressMarker = null;
      }
      const longPressIcon = L.divIcon({
        className: 'longpress-marker-icon',
        html: '<div class="longpress-marker-pin" aria-hidden="true"></div>',
        iconSize: [22, 22],
        iconAnchor: [11, 11]
      });
      state.longPressMarker = L.marker([latitude, longitude], { icon: longPressIcon }).addTo(state.map);
    }

    function removeLongPressMarker() {
      if (state.longPressMarker && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.longPressMarker);
      }
      state.longPressMarker = null;
    }

    function refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton() {
      const toggleExpandButton = byId('placeSheetToggleExpandBtn');
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (!toggleExpandButton) {
        return;
      }
      const sheetHidden = sheetElement ? sheetElement.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true' : true;
      if (sheetHidden) {
        toggleExpandButton.classList.remove('place-sheet-toggle-open');
        toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Dialog ausklappen');
        toggleExpandButton.title = 'Ausklappen';
        return;
      }
      const isPeekOnly = state.placeSheetSnapState === 'collapsed';
      toggleExpandButton.classList.toggle('place-sheet-toggle-open', !isPeekOnly);
      toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isPeekOnly ? 'false' : 'true');
      if (isPeekOnly) {
        toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Dialog ausklappen');
        toggleExpandButton.title = 'Ausklappen';
      } else {
        toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Dialog zuklappen');
        toggleExpandButton.title = 'Zuklappen';
      }
    }

    function setPlaceSheetSnapState(nextSnapState) {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (!sheetElement) {
        return;
      }
      const allowedStates = ['collapsed', 'half', 'expanded'];
      const targetState = allowedStates.indexOf(nextSnapState) >= 0 ? nextSnapState : 'collapsed';
      sheetElement.classList.remove('collapsed', 'half', 'expanded');
      sheetElement.classList.add(targetState);
      sheetElement.style.transform = '';
      state.placeSheetSnapState = targetState;
      refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
    }

    function openPlaceSheet(initialPoint) {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      const titleElement = byId('placeSheetTitle');
      const bodyElement = byId('placeSheetBody');
      if (!sheetElement || !titleElement || !bodyElement) {
        return;
      }
      sheetElement.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
      setPlaceSheetSnapState('collapsed');
      titleElement.textContent = initialPoint && initialPoint.label
        ? initialPoint.label
        : 'Ort';
      bodyElement.innerHTML = initialPoint && initialPoint.loading
        ? '<div class="place-sheet-loading">Lade Details…</div>'
        : '';
      state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = initialPoint && !initialPoint.loading
        ? initialPoint
        : { lat: initialPoint && initialPoint.lat, lon: initialPoint && initialPoint.lon, label: initialPoint && initialPoint.label, details: null };
    }

    function closePlaceSheet() {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (sheetElement) {
        sheetElement.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        sheetElement.classList.remove('collapsed', 'half', 'expanded');
        sheetElement.style.transform = '';
      }
      state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = null;
      state.placeSheetSnapState = 'collapsed';
      refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
      removeLongPressMarker();

    function togglePlaceSheetFromHeaderChevron() {
      if (!isPlaceSheetOpen()) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.placeSheetSnapState === 'collapsed') {
        setPlaceSheetSnapState('expanded');
      } else {
        setPlaceSheetSnapState('collapsed');
      }
    }

    function isPlaceSheetOpen() {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      return !!(sheetElement && sheetElement.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false');
    }

    function attachPlaceSheetDragGestures() {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      const handleElement = byId('placeSheetHandle');
      if (!sheetElement || !handleElement) {
        return;
      }
      let dragActivePointerId = null;
      let dragStartClientY = 0;
      let dragStartTransform = 0;
      let dragCurrentDelta = 0;
      let pendingFrameId = 0;

      const sheetHeight = function () {
        return sheetElement.offsetHeight || 1;
      };

      const startTransformForState = function (snapStateName) {
        const heightPx = sheetHeight();
        if (snapStateName === 'expanded') {
          return 0;
        }
        if (snapStateName === 'half') {
          return Math.round(window.innerHeight * 0.45);
        }
        return Math.max(heightPx - PLACE_SHEET_COLLAPSED_TOP_OFFSET_PX, 0);
      };

      const applyTransform = function (translateY) {
        sheetElement.style.transform = 'translate3d(0, ' + translateY + 'px, 0)';
      };

      const scheduleApply = function (translateY) {
        if (pendingFrameId) {
          return;
        }
        pendingFrameId = window.requestAnimationFrame(function () {
          pendingFrameId = 0;
          applyTransform(translateY);
        });
      };

      handleElement.addEventListener('pointerdown', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (!isPlaceSheetOpen()) {
          return;
        }
        if (pointerEvent.pointerType === 'mouse' && pointerEvent.button !== 0) {
          return;
        }
        dragActivePointerId = pointerEvent.pointerId;
        dragStartClientY = pointerEvent.clientY;
        dragStartTransform = startTransformForState(state.placeSheetSnapState);
        dragCurrentDelta = 0;
        sheetElement.classList.add('dragging');
        state.placeSheetDragging = true;
        try {
          handleElement.setPointerCapture(pointerEvent.pointerId);
        } catch (capturePointerError) {
          /* pointer capture optional */
        }
      });

      handleElement.addEventListener('pointermove', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (dragActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId) {
          return;
        }
        const deltaY = pointerEvent.clientY - dragStartClientY;
        const heightPx = sheetHeight();
        const minTranslate = 0;
        const maxTranslate = Math.max(heightPx - 60, 100);
        const nextTranslate = Math.max(minTranslate, Math.min(maxTranslate, dragStartTransform + deltaY));
        dragCurrentDelta = nextTranslate;
        scheduleApply(nextTranslate);
      });

      const finishDrag = function (pointerEvent) {
        if (dragActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId) {
          return;
        }
        sheetElement.classList.remove('dragging');
        state.placeSheetDragging = false;
        const heightPx = sheetHeight();
        const expandedThreshold = heightPx * 0.18;
        const halfThreshold = heightPx * 0.55;
        let snapTarget = 'collapsed';
        if (dragCurrentDelta < expandedThreshold) {
          snapTarget = 'expanded';
        } else if (dragCurrentDelta < halfThreshold) {
          snapTarget = 'half';
        } else {
          snapTarget = 'collapsed';
        }
        try {
          handleElement.releasePointerCapture(pointerEvent.pointerId);
        } catch (releasePointerError) {
          /* not critical */
        }
        dragActivePointerId = null;
        setPlaceSheetSnapState(snapTarget);
      };

      handleElement.addEventListener('pointerup', finishDrag);
      handleElement.addEventListener('pointercancel', finishDrag);
      handleElement.addEventListener('pointerleave', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (dragActivePointerId === pointerEvent.pointerId && !state.placeSheetDragging) {
          dragActivePointerId = null;
        }
      });
      handleElement.addEventListener('click', function () {
        if (!isPlaceSheetOpen()) {
          return;
        }
        if (state.placeSheetSnapState === 'collapsed') {
          setPlaceSheetSnapState('half');
        } else if (state.placeSheetSnapState === 'half') {
          setPlaceSheetSnapState('expanded');
        } else {
          setPlaceSheetSnapState('half');
        }
      });
    }

    async function fetchPlaceDetails(latitude, longitude) {
      const reverseUrl = 'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=jsonv2' +
        '&lat=' + encodeURIComponent(String(latitude)) +
        '&lon=' + encodeURIComponent(String(longitude)) +
        '&zoom=18&addressdetails=1&extratags=1&namedetails=1';
      const reverseResult = await fetchJson(reverseUrl, {
        headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
      });
      if (!reverseResult || typeof reverseResult !== 'object') {
        return null;
      }
      return reverseResult;
    }

    function composePlaceLabelFromDetails(details) {
      if (!details || typeof details !== 'object') {
        return '';
      }
      const addressBlock = details.address || {};
      const primaryName = details.name || addressBlock.shop || addressBlock.amenity ||
        addressBlock.tourism || addressBlock.building || addressBlock.road || '';
      const displayName = details.display_name || '';
      if (primaryName && displayName) {
        if (displayName.toLowerCase().indexOf(String(primaryName).toLowerCase()) >= 0) {
          return displayName;
        }
        return String(primaryName) + ', ' + displayName;
      }
      return displayName || String(primaryName || '');
    }

    function buildPlaceSheetRowElement(label, valueHtml, iconCharacter) {
      const rowElement = document.createElement('div');
      rowElement.className = 'place-sheet-row';
      const iconElement = document.createElement('div');
      iconElement.className = 'place-sheet-row-icon';
      iconElement.textContent = iconCharacter || '';
      const contentElement = document.createElement('div');
      contentElement.className = 'place-sheet-row-content';
      const labelElement = document.createElement('div');
      labelElement.className = 'place-sheet-row-label';
      labelElement.textContent = label;
      const valueElement = document.createElement('div');
      valueElement.className = 'place-sheet-row-value';
      valueElement.innerHTML = valueHtml;
      contentElement.appendChild(labelElement);
      contentElement.appendChild(valueElement);
      rowElement.appendChild(iconElement);
      rowElement.appendChild(contentElement);
      return rowElement;
    }

    function escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(rawValue) {
      return String(rawValue == null ? '' : rawValue)
        .replace(/&/g, '&')
        .replace(/</g, '<')
        .replace(/>/g, '>')
        .replace(/"/g, '"')
        .replace(/'/g, ''');
    }

    function isUrlLikeString(rawValue) {
      if (typeof rawValue !== 'string') {
        return false;
      }
      return /^https?:\/\//i.test(rawValue) || /^www\./i.test(rawValue);
    }

    function buildExternalUrlString(rawValue) {
      if (typeof rawValue !== 'string') {
        return '';
      }
      if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(rawValue)) {
        return rawValue;
      }
      if (/^www\./i.test(rawValue)) {
        return 'https://' + rawValue;
      }
      return '';
    }

    function renderPlaceSheet(placePoint) {
      const bodyElement = byId('placeSheetBody');
      const titleElement = byId('placeSheetTitle');
      if (!bodyElement || !titleElement) {
        return;
      }
      bodyElement.innerHTML = '';
      const placeDetails = placePoint && placePoint.details ? placePoint.details : null;
      const detailsError = placePoint && placePoint.detailsError ? placePoint.detailsError : null;
      const safeLabel = placePoint && placePoint.label ? placePoint.label : 'Ort';
      titleElement.textContent = safeLabel;

      const addressDisplay = (placeDetails && placeDetails.display_name) || safeLabel;
      bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
        'Adresse',
        escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(addressDisplay),
        '\uD83D\uDCCD'
      ));

      const lat = Number(placePoint && placePoint.lat);
      const lon = Number(placePoint && placePoint.lon);
      if (Number.isFinite(lat) && Number.isFinite(lon)) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Koordinaten',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(lat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + lon.toFixed(6)),
          '\uD83E\uDDED'
        ));
      }

      const extratags = placeDetails && placeDetails.extratags && typeof placeDetails.extratags === 'object'
        ? placeDetails.extratags
        : {};

      const phoneRaw = extratags['phone'] || extratags['contact:phone'] || extratags['contact:mobile'];
      if (phoneRaw) {
        const phoneSafe = escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(phoneRaw);
        const phoneHrefSafe = encodeURI(String(phoneRaw).replace(/\s+/g, ''));
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Telefon',
          '<a href="tel:' + phoneHrefSafe + '">' + phoneSafe + '</a>',
          '\u260E\uFE0F'
        ));
      }

      const emailRaw = extratags['email'] || extratags['contact:email'];
      if (emailRaw) {
        const emailSafe = escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(emailRaw);
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'E-Mail',
          '<a href="mailto:' + emailSafe + '">' + emailSafe + '</a>',
          '\u2709\uFE0F'
        ));
      }

      const websiteRaw = extratags['website'] || extratags['url'] || extratags['contact:website'];
      const websiteHrefValue = buildExternalUrlString(websiteRaw);
      if (websiteHrefValue) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Webseite',
          '<a href="' + escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(websiteHrefValue) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' +
            escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(websiteRaw) + '</a>',
          '\uD83C\uDF10'
        ));
      }

      const openingHoursRaw = extratags['opening_hours'];
      if (openingHoursRaw) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          '\u00d6ffnungszeiten',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(openingHoursRaw),
          '\uD83D\uDD52'
        ));
      }

      const descriptionRaw = extratags['description'] || extratags['note'];
      if (descriptionRaw) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Beschreibung',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(descriptionRaw),
          '\uD83D\uDCDD'
        ));
      }

      const wikipediaRaw = extratags['wikipedia'];
      if (wikipediaRaw && typeof wikipediaRaw === 'string') {
        const splitIndex = wikipediaRaw.indexOf(':');
        const wikiLanguage = splitIndex > 0 ? wikipediaRaw.slice(0, splitIndex) : 'de';
        const wikiTitle = splitIndex > 0 ? wikipediaRaw.slice(splitIndex + 1) : wikipediaRaw;
        const wikipediaUrl = 'https://' + encodeURIComponent(wikiLanguage) + '.wikipedia.org/wiki/' + encodeURIComponent(wikiTitle.replace(/ /g, '_'));
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Wikipedia',
          '<a href="' + escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(wikipediaUrl) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' +
            escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(wikipediaRaw) + '</a>',
          '\uD83D\uDCD6'
        ));
      }

      const poiCategory = placeDetails && (placeDetails.category || placeDetails.class);
      const poiType = placeDetails && placeDetails.type;
      const poiAddressType = placeDetails && placeDetails.addresstype;
      const poiPartsList = [];
      if (poiCategory) poiPartsList.push(String(poiCategory));
      if (poiType) poiPartsList.push(String(poiType));
      if (poiAddressType && poiAddressType !== poiType) poiPartsList.push(String(poiAddressType));
      if (poiPartsList.length > 0) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'POI-Typ',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(poiPartsList.join(' / ')),
          '\uD83C\uDFF7\uFE0F'
        ));
      }

      const namedetails = placeDetails && placeDetails.namedetails && typeof placeDetails.namedetails === 'object'
        ? placeDetails.namedetails
        : {};
      const consumedExtraTagKeys = {
        phone: true,
        'contact:phone': true,
        'contact:mobile': true,
        email: true,
        'contact:email': true,
        website: true,
        url: true,
        'contact:website': true,
        opening_hours: true,
        description: true,
        note: true,
        wikipedia: true
      };
      const remainingExtraTagPairs = [];
      Object.keys(extratags).forEach(function (extraKey) {
        if (consumedExtraTagKeys[extraKey]) {
          return;
        }
        const extraValue = extratags[extraKey];
        if (extraValue == null || extraValue === '') {
          return;
        }
        remainingExtraTagPairs.push({ key: extraKey, value: extraValue });
      });
      Object.keys(namedetails).forEach(function (nameKey) {
        const nameValue = namedetails[nameKey];
        if (nameValue == null || nameValue === '') {
          return;
        }
        remainingExtraTagPairs.push({ key: 'name:' + nameKey, value: nameValue });
      });

      if (remainingExtraTagPairs.length > 0) {
        const extrasToggleButton = document.createElement('button');
        extrasToggleButton.type = 'button';
        extrasToggleButton.className = 'place-sheet-extras-toggle';
        extrasToggleButton.textContent = 'Mehr Details (' + remainingExtraTagPairs.length + ')';
        const extrasListElement = document.createElement('div');
        extrasListElement.className = 'place-sheet-extras-list';
        remainingExtraTagPairs.forEach(function (pairEntry) {
          const pairRowElement = document.createElement('div');
          pairRowElement.className = 'extras-row';
          const pairKeyElement = document.createElement('div');
          pairKeyElement.className = 'extras-key';
          pairKeyElement.textContent = pairEntry.key;
          const pairValueElement = document.createElement('div');
          pairValueElement.className = 'extras-value';
          if (isUrlLikeString(pairEntry.value)) {
            const externalUrl = buildExternalUrlString(pairEntry.value);
            if (externalUrl) {
              const linkElement = document.createElement('a');
              linkElement.href = externalUrl;
              linkElement.target = '_blank';
              linkElement.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';
              linkElement.textContent = String(pairEntry.value);
              pairValueElement.appendChild(linkElement);
            } else {
              pairValueElement.textContent = String(pairEntry.value);
            }
          } else {
            pairValueElement.textContent = String(pairEntry.value);
          }
          pairRowElement.appendChild(pairKeyElement);
          pairRowElement.appendChild(pairValueElement);
          extrasListElement.appendChild(pairRowElement);
        });
        extrasToggleButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
          extrasListElement.classList.toggle('open');
        });
        bodyElement.appendChild(extrasToggleButton);
        bodyElement.appendChild(extrasListElement);
      }

      if (detailsError) {
        const errorRow = document.createElement('div');
        errorRow.className = 'place-sheet-loading';
        errorRow.textContent = 'Hinweis: ' + detailsError;
        bodyElement.appendChild(errorRow);
      }
    }

    function isRouteSpeedJumpOutlier(estimatedSpeedMps, recentRouteSpeedsMps) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(estimatedSpeedMps) || estimatedSpeedMps < 0) return false;
      if (estimatedSpeedMps > ROUTE_MAX_INSTANT_SPEED_MPS) return true;
      if (!Array.isArray(recentRouteSpeedsMps) || recentRouteSpeedsMps.length < 2) return false;
      const sortedRecentSpeeds = recentRouteSpeedsMps.slice().sort(function (leftSpeed, rightSpeed) {
        return leftSpeed - rightSpeed;
      });
      const middleIndex = Math.floor(sortedRecentSpeeds.length / 2);
      const recentMedianMps = sortedRecentSpeeds.length % 2 === 1
        ? sortedRecentSpeeds[middleIndex]
        : (sortedRecentSpeeds[middleIndex - 1] + sortedRecentSpeeds[middleIndex]) / 2;
      if (recentMedianMps < ROUTE_STATIONARY_SPEED_BASELINE_MPS) {
        return estimatedSpeedMps > recentMedianMps + ROUTE_MAX_SPEED_JUMP_MPS;
      }
      const allowedSpeedMps = (ROUTE_STATIONARY_HIGH_SPEED_FACTOR * recentMedianMps) + ROUTE_MAX_SPEED_JUMP_MPS;
      return estimatedSpeedMps > allowedSpeedMps;
    }

    function pushRecentRouteSpeedSample(recentRouteSpeedsMps, sampleSpeedMps) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(sampleSpeedMps) || sampleSpeedMps < 0) return recentRouteSpeedsMps;
      recentRouteSpeedsMps.push(sampleSpeedMps);
      if (recentRouteSpeedsMps.length > ROUTE_RECENT_SPEED_WINDOW_SIZE) {
        recentRouteSpeedsMps.splice(0, recentRouteSpeedsMps.length - ROUTE_RECENT_SPEED_WINDOW_SIZE);
      }
      return recentRouteSpeedsMps;
    }

    function buildCleanRouteCoordinates(pointEntries) {
      const validPointEntries = Array.isArray(pointEntries) ? pointEntries.filter(function (pointEntry) {
        return pointEntry && typeof pointEntry.lat === 'number' && typeof pointEntry.lon === 'number';
      }) : [];
      validPointEntries.sort(function (leftPoint, rightPoint) {
        const leftTimestamp = Number(leftPoint.timestamp || leftPoint.receivedAt || 0);
        const rightTimestamp = Number(rightPoint.timestamp || rightPoint.receivedAt || 0);
        return leftTimestamp - rightTimestamp;
      });
      if (validPointEntries.length === 0) {
        return [];
      }
      const filteredPoints = [];
      const recentRouteSpeedsMps = [];
      let previousPoint = null;
      validPointEntries.forEach(function (pointEntry) {
        if (!previousPoint) {
          filteredPoints.push(pointEntry);
          previousPoint = pointEntry;
          return;
        }
        const previousTimestamp = Number(previousPoint.timestamp || previousPoint.receivedAt || 0);
        const currentTimestamp = Number(pointEntry.timestamp || pointEntry.receivedAt || 0);
        const hasUsableTimestamps = Number.isFinite(previousTimestamp) && previousTimestamp > 0 &&
          Number.isFinite(currentTimestamp) && currentTimestamp > 0;
        const distanceGapMeters = haversineKilometers(
          previousPoint.lat, previousPoint.lon,
          pointEntry.lat, pointEntry.lon
        ) * 1000;
        if (distanceGapMeters < ROUTE_MIN_POINT_DISTANCE_METERS) {
          return;
        }
        const timeGapSeconds = hasUsableTimestamps ? Math.max(0.001, (currentTimestamp - previousTimestamp) / 1000) : null;
        const movementSpeedMps = timeGapSeconds ? (distanceGapMeters / timeGapSeconds) : null;
        if (movementSpeedMps !== null && isRouteSpeedJumpOutlier(movementSpeedMps, recentRouteSpeedsMps)) {
          return;
        }
        if (movementSpeedMps !== null) {
          pushRecentRouteSpeedSample(recentRouteSpeedsMps, movementSpeedMps);
        }
        filteredPoints.push(pointEntry);
        previousPoint = pointEntry;
      });
      if (filteredPoints.length === 0) {
        return [];
      }
      if (filteredPoints.length < 3) {
        return filteredPoints.map(function (pointEntry) { return [pointEntry.lat, pointEntry.lon]; });
      }
      const smoothedCoordinates = filteredPoints.map(function (pointEntry, pointIndex, allPoints) {
        if (pointIndex === 0 || pointIndex === allPoints.length - 1) {
          return [pointEntry.lat, pointEntry.lon];
        }
        const previousEntry = allPoints[pointIndex - 1];
        const nextEntry = allPoints[pointIndex + 1];
        const smoothedLat = (previousEntry.lat + (2 * pointEntry.lat) + nextEntry.lat) / 4;
        const smoothedLon = (previousEntry.lon + (2 * pointEntry.lon) + nextEntry.lon) / 4;
        return [smoothedLat, smoothedLon];
      });
      return smoothedCoordinates;
    }

    function renderLatestTrackingRouteLineFromHistory(pointEntries, trackingStartPosition) {
      removeLatestTrackingRouteLine();
      const hasStartPosition = !!(trackingStartPosition &&
        typeof trackingStartPosition.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof trackingStartPosition.lon === 'number');
      const routeCoordinates = buildCleanRouteCoordinates(pointEntries);
      const hasRouteCoordinates = routeCoordinates.length > 0;
      if (!hasStartPosition && !hasRouteCoordinates) {
        return;
      }
      const startCoordinate = hasStartPosition
        ? [trackingStartPosition.lat, trackingStartPosition.lon]
        : routeCoordinates[0];
      state.latestTrackingStartMarker = L.marker(startCoordinate, { icon: greenIcon }).addTo(state.map);
      state.latestTrackingStartMarker.bindPopup('Startpunkt (letzte Tracking-Route)');
      if (!Array.isArray(routeCoordinates) || routeCoordinates.length < 2) {
        return;
      }
      state.latestTrackingRouteLine = L.polyline(routeCoordinates, withVectorRenderer({
        color: '#111111',
        weight: 4,
        opacity: 0.9
      })).addTo(state.map);
      state.latestTrackingRouteLine.bindPopup('Letzte Tracking-Route');
    }

        window.alert('Keine Startposition verfügbar.');

      state.latestTrackingStartPosition = trackedStartPosition;

      const historyResponse = await fetchHistoryForSelectedDevice();
      const historyEntries = historyResponse && Array.isArray(historyResponse.data) ? historyResponse.data : [];
      renderLatestTrackingRouteLineFromHistory(historyEntries, trackedStartPosition);

        method: 'POST',

        body: JSON.stringify({ deviceKey: deviceKeyForTracking })
      });
      const trackingControlData = trackingControlResponse && trackingControlResponse.data
        ? trackingControlResponse.data
        : null;
      state.trackingEnabled = !!(trackingControlData && trackingControlData.active);
      updateTrackingButtonLabel();
      updateTrackingStatusChip();
      if (!state.trackingEnabled) {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[deviceKeyForTracking];

          state.trackLine = null;

        removeStartMarker();
      }
      await loadTracking();
    }

    async function centerOnCurrentLocation() {
      const locateToggleButton = byId('locateToggleBtn');
      if (locateToggleButton) {
        locateToggleButton.classList.add('active');
      }
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
      showLocateLoadingBadge('Letzte Position wird angezeigt...');
      try {
        const controlPanelElement = byId('controlPanel');
        const isControlPanelOpen = !!(controlPanelElement && !controlPanelElement.classList.contains('hidden'));
        const selectedTarget = getSelectedDeviceTarget();
        const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap && !selectedTarget && !selectedDeviceKey) {
          throw new Error('Kein ausgewähltes Gerät verfügbar.');
        }
        const requestSingleDevice = !state.showAllDevicesOnMap;
        const requestTarget = requestSingleDevice ? selectedTarget : null;
        const priorRecord = requestSingleDevice
          ? (state.selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]
            ? state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]
            : await fetchDevicePositionRecord(selectedTarget))
          : await fetchLastPositionRecord();
        const priorReceivedAt = lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(priorRecord);
        const hasPriorCoordinates = !!(
          priorRecord &&
          typeof priorRecord.lat === 'number' &&
          typeof priorRecord.lon === 'number'
        );
        if (hasPriorCoordinates && state.map) {
          state.map.setView([priorRecord.lat, priorRecord.lon], 16);
          state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [priorRecord.lat, priorRecord.lon];
          triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
        }

        showLocateLoadingBadge('Aktuellen OwnTracks-Standort lade...');
        let owntracksRequestSent = false;
        let locatePublishError = null;
        try {
          await publishOwntracksReportLocationRequest(requestTarget);
          setTimeout(function () {
            publishOwntracksReportLocationRequest(requestTarget).catch(function () {
              /* zweiter schneller Anstoß ist optional */
            });
          }, 650);
          owntracksRequestSent = true;
        } catch (owntracksRequestError) {
          locatePublishError = owntracksRequestError;
          console.warn('OwnTracks Standort-Anforderung:', owntracksRequestError);
        }
        let currentPosition = null;
        if (owntracksRequestSent) {
          currentPosition = await waitForLastPositionNewerThan(priorReceivedAt, {
            maxWaitMs: OWNTRACKS_LOCATE_BUTTON_MAX_WAIT_MS,
            retryPublishAfterMs: 2500,
            deviceTarget: requestSingleDevice ? selectedTarget : null
          });
        }
        if (!currentPosition) {
          const deviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedDeviceKey, selectedTarget);
          let failureMessage = 'Gerät «' + deviceLabel + '»: Standort nach Anforderung nicht verfügbar (keine OwnTracks-Antwort). Status: Getrennt. ' +
            'Ist für dieses Gerät das Tracking aktiv, wird nach etwa 1 Minute ohne frische Daten der Rückkehrpunkt rot markiert und die Rückkehrroute eingeblendet.';
          if (locatePublishError && locatePublishError.message) {
            failureMessage = 'Gerät «' + deviceLabel + '»: Standortanforderung fehlgeschlagen – ' + locatePublishError.message +
              ' Ist Tracking aktiv, folgt nach ca. 1 Minute ohne Daten die rote Rückkehr-Markierung.';
          } else if (!owntracksRequestSent) {
            failureMessage = 'Gerät «' + deviceLabel + '»: Standortanforderung konnte nicht gesendet werden. Status: Getrennt. ' +
              'Ist Tracking aktiv, folgt nach ca. 1 Minute ohne Daten die rote Rückkehr-Markierung.';
          }
          if (requestSingleDevice && selectedDeviceKey) {
            applyDeviceConnectionFailure(selectedDeviceKey, failureMessage);
          } else {
            applyDeviceConnectionFailure('__default__', failureMessage);
          }
          triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
          if (!hasPriorCoordinates) {
            throw new Error(failureMessage);
          }
          return;
        }
        if (requestSingleDevice && selectedDeviceKey) {
          clearDeviceConnectionFailure(selectedDeviceKey);
        } else {
          clearDeviceConnectionFailure('__default__');
          if (selectedDeviceKey) {
            clearDeviceConnectionFailure(selectedDeviceKey);
          }
        }
        triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
        state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [currentPosition.lat, currentPosition.lon];
        state.map.setView([currentPosition.lat, currentPosition.lon], 16);
      } finally {
        hideLocateLoadingBadge();
        if (locateToggleButton) {
          setTimeout(function () { locateToggleButton.classList.remove('active'); }, LOCATE_BUTTON_ACTIVE_MS);
        }
      }
    }

    async function registerMapServiceWorker() {
      if (!('serviceWorker' in navigator)) return;
      try {
        await navigator.serviceWorker.register('/service-worker.js', { scope: '/' });
        await navigator.serviceWorker.ready;
      } catch (serviceWorkerError) {
        /* fallback: IndexedDB tile cache handles persistence */
      }
    }

    function getLiveTrackingWebSocketUrl() {
      const websocketProtocol = window.location.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
      return websocketProtocol + '//' + window.location.host + LIVE_TRACKING_WS_PATH;
    }

    function scheduleLiveTrackingReconnect() {
      if (state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer) {
        return;
      }
      const reconnectDelayMs = state.liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs;
      state.liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs = Math.min(
        LIVE_TRACKING_RECONNECT_MAX_MS,
        state.liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs * 2
      );
      state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer = setTimeout(function () {
        state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer = null;
        connectLiveTrackingSocket();
      }, reconnectDelayMs);
    }

    function connectLiveTrackingSocket() {
      if (state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp || !('WebSocket' in window)) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.liveTrackingSocket &&
          (state.liveTrackingSocket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN ||
           state.liveTrackingSocket.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING)) {
        return;
      }
      let newSocket;
      try {
        newSocket = new WebSocket(getLiveTrackingWebSocketUrl());
      } catch (socketCreateError) {
        scheduleLiveTrackingReconnect();
        return;
      }
      state.liveTrackingSocket = newSocket;
      newSocket.addEventListener('open', function () {
        state.liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs = LIVE_TRACKING_RECONNECT_INITIAL_MS;
      });
      newSocket.addEventListener('message', function () {
        wakeOwntracksLocateWaitIfAny();
        triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
      });
      newSocket.addEventListener('close', function () {
        if (state.liveTrackingSocket === newSocket) {
          state.liveTrackingSocket = null;
        }
        scheduleLiveTrackingReconnect();
      });
      newSocket.addEventListener('error', function () {
        if (newSocket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || newSocket.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING) {
          newSocket.close();
        } else {
          scheduleLiveTrackingReconnect();
        }
      });
    }

    function startLiveTrackingChannel() {
      state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp = false;
      connectLiveTrackingSocket();
    }

    function triggerLiveTrackingUpdate() {
      if (state.liveTrackingUpdateInFlight) {
        state.liveTrackingUpdatePending = true;
        return;
      }
      state.liveTrackingUpdateInFlight = true;
      loadTracking()
        .catch(function (loadError) {
          console.error('Fehler bei Live-Tracking-Aktualisierung:', loadError);
        })
        .finally(function () {
          state.liveTrackingUpdateInFlight = false;
          if (state.liveTrackingUpdatePending) {
            state.liveTrackingUpdatePending = false;
            triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
          }
        });
    }

    function normalizeHeadingDegrees(rawHeadingValue) {
      if (rawHeadingValue === null || rawHeadingValue === undefined || rawHeadingValue === '') {
        return null;
      }
      const numericHeading = typeof rawHeadingValue === 'number' ? rawHeadingValue : Number(rawHeadingValue);
      if (!Number.isFinite(numericHeading)) {
        return null;
      }
      return ((numericHeading % 360) + 360) % 360;
    }

    function removeCurrentPositionMarkers() {
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
        state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
      }
      if (state.currentMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentMarker);
        state.currentMarker = null;
      }
      state.latestHeadingDegrees = null;
      state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey = {};
      try {
        localStorage.removeItem(LAST_HEADING_BY_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY);
      } catch (storageClearError) {
        console.warn('Konnte gespeicherte Karten-Richtungen nicht löschen:', storageClearError);
      }
      clearAllDeviceMarkers();
    }

    function persistLastHeadingsToStorage() {
      try {
        localStorage.setItem(
          LAST_HEADING_BY_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY,
          JSON.stringify(state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey)
        );
      } catch (storageWriteError) {
        console.warn('Konnte Karten-Richtungen nicht speichern:', storageWriteError);
      }
    }

    function rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(deviceKey, normalizedHeading) {
      if (!deviceKey || normalizedHeading === null) {
        return;
      }
      state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[deviceKey] = normalizedHeading;
      persistLastHeadingsToStorage();
    }

    function effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(deviceKey, normalizedHeading) {
      if (normalizedHeading !== null) {
        return normalizedHeading;
      }
      if (deviceKey && typeof state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[deviceKey] === 'number') {
        return state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[deviceKey];
      }
      return null;
    }

    function updateHeadingVisualization(positionEntry, currentLatLng) {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const dk = getSelectedDeviceKey() || (positionEntry && positionEntry.key) || '';
      const nh = normalizeHeadingDegrees(positionEntry && positionEntry.heading);
      rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(dk, nh);
      const eff = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(dk, nh);
      state.latestHeadingDegrees = nh;

      try {
        if (eff === null) {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
            state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
          }
          if (state.currentMarker) {
            state.currentMarker.setIcon(createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, null));
          }
          if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap && dk && state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk] &&
            typeof state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk].setIcon === 'function') {
            state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk].setIcon(createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, null));
          }
          return;
        }

        if (state.currentMarker) {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
            state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
          }
          state.currentMarker.setIcon(createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, eff));
          return;
        }

        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap && dk && state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk] &&
          typeof state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk].setIcon === 'function') {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
            state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
          }
          state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk].setIcon(createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, eff));
          if (currentLatLng) {
            state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk].setLatLng(currentLatLng);
          }
          return;
        }

        const hi = createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, eff);
        if (!state.currentHeadingMarker) {
          state.currentHeadingMarker = L.marker(currentLatLng, {
            icon: hi,
            interactive: false,
            keyboard: false,
            zIndexOffset: 2500,
            rotateWithView: true,
            rotation: 0
          }).addTo(state.map);
        } else {
          state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng(currentLatLng);
          state.currentHeadingMarker.setIcon(hi);
        }
      } finally {
        performBearingSyncNow();
      }
    }

    function animateCurrentMarkerTo(nextLatLng, pointTimestamp) {
      if (!state.currentMarker) return;
      const previousLatLng = state.currentMarker.getLatLng();
      if (!previousLatLng) {
        state.currentMarker.setLatLng(nextLatLng);
        return;
      }

      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }

      const targetLat = nextLatLng[0];
      const targetLng = nextLatLng[1];
      const nowMs = Date.now();
      const candidateDurationMs = typeof pointTimestamp === 'number' && Number.isFinite(pointTimestamp)
        ? Math.max(0, nowMs - pointTimestamp)
        : MARKER_MOVE_MIN_DURATION_MS;
      const animationDurationMs = Math.max(
        MARKER_MOVE_MIN_DURATION_MS,
        Math.min(MARKER_MOVE_MAX_DURATION_MS, candidateDurationMs)
      );
      const startLat = previousLatLng.lat;
      const startLng = previousLatLng.lng;
      const animationStartMs = performance.now();

      function stepMarkerAnimation(frameTimeMs) {
        const elapsedMs = frameTimeMs - animationStartMs;
        const progress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, elapsedMs / animationDurationMs));
        const easedProgress = 1 - Math.pow(1 - progress, 3);
        const interpolatedLat = startLat + (targetLat - startLat) * easedProgress;
        const interpolatedLng = startLng + (targetLng - startLng) * easedProgress;
        state.currentMarker.setLatLng([interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng]);
        if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
          state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng([interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng]);
        }
        if (progress < 1) {
          state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(stepMarkerAnimation);
          return;
        }
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }

      state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(stepMarkerAnimation);
    }

    function stopLiveTrackingChannel() {
      state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp = true;
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      if (state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer) {
        clearTimeout(state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer);
        state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer = null;
      }
      if (state.liveTrackingSocket) {
        try {
          state.liveTrackingSocket.close();
        } catch (socketCloseError) {
          console.error('Fehler beim Schließen des Live-Tracking-Sockets:', socketCloseError);
        } finally {
          state.liveTrackingSocket = null;
        }
      }
      state.liveTrackingUpdatePending = false;
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
        state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
      }
    }

    window.addEventListener('load', async function () {
      await registerMapServiceWorker();
      initMap();
      loadRecentRouteSuggestions();
      await loadSavedPlaces();
      await loadSavedRoutes();
      await syncTrackingStateFromServer();
      await loadTracking();
      setInterval(triggerLiveTrackingUpdate, TRACKING_POLL_INTERVAL_MS);
      setInterval(quickPollOwnTracksLastPosition, LAST_POSITION_QUICK_POLL_MS);
      setInterval(runOwnTracksStatusProbe, OWNTRACKS_STATUS_PROBE_INTERVAL_MS);
      startLiveTrackingChannel();
      window.addEventListener('beforeunload', stopLiveTrackingChannel);

      const resetButton = byId('resetBtn');
      const trackingButton = byId('trackingBtn');
      const markPlaceButton = byId('markPlaceBtn');
      const saveRouteButton = byId('saveRouteBtn');
      const settingsButton = byId('settingsBtn');
      const owntracksButton = byId('owntracksBtn');
      const trackingRouteButton = byId('trackingRouteBtn');
      const searchButton = byId('searchBtn');
      const waypointButton = byId('waypointBtn');
      const routeClearButton = byId('routeClearBtn');
      const transportModeElement = byId('transportMode');
      const transportModeButtons = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.transport-mode-btn'));
      const searchToggleButton = byId('searchToggleBtn');
      const locateToggleButton = byId('locateToggleBtn');
      const mapStyleToggleButton = byId('mapStyleToggleBtn');
      const clearSearchInlineButton = byId('clearSearchInlineBtn');
      const clearStartInlineButton = byId('clearStartInlineBtn');
      const useCurrentAsStartButton = byId('useCurrentAsStartBtn');
      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
      const waypointSuggestionsElement = byId('waypointSuggestions');
      const routeSuggestionsElement = byId('routeSuggestions');
      const deleteSelectedButton = byId('deleteSelectedBtn');
      const deleteAllButton = byId('deleteAllBtn');
      const panelToggleButton = byId('panelToggleBtn');
      const previousDeviceButton = byId('prevDeviceBtn');
      const nextDeviceButton = byId('nextDeviceBtn');
      const toggleDeviceViewButton = byId('toggleDeviceViewBtn');
      const dropDeviceButton = byId('dropDeviceBtn');
      const placeSheetCloseButton = byId('placeSheetCloseBtn');
      const placeSheetToggleExpandButton = byId('placeSheetToggleExpandBtn');
      const placeSheetRouteButton = byId('placeSheetRouteBtn');
      const placeSheetMarkButton = byId('placeSheetMarkBtn');

      updateTrackingButtonLabel();
      updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
      updateTrackingStatusChip();
      renderPlacesList();
      renderRoutesList();
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      updateMapStyleButtonState();

      bindClickIfPresent(resetButton, handleResetClick);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(trackingButton, toggleTracking, 'Fehler beim Umschalten des Trackings:', 'Tracking konnte nicht umgeschaltet werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(markPlaceButton, saveCurrentPlace, 'Fehler beim Speichern des Ortes:', 'Ort konnte nicht gespeichert werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(saveRouteButton, saveCurrentRoute, 'Fehler beim Speichern der Route:', 'Route konnte nicht gespeichert werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(trackingRouteButton, toggleLatestTrackingRouteVisibility, 'Fehler beim Anzeigen der Tracking-Route:', 'Tracking-Route konnte nicht angezeigt werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(settingsButton, toggleSettingsPanel);
      bindClickIfPresent(owntracksButton, toggleOwntracksPanel);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(searchButton, function () {
        return handlePlaceSearch().then(function () {
          appendWaypointEditorRowAfterDestinationSearch();
        });
      }, 'Fehler bei der Suche:', 'Ort konnte nicht gesucht werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(routeClearButton, function () {
        clearRouteVisualization(true);
        setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(waypointButton, toggleWaypointPickMode);
      if (transportModeElement) {
        transportModeButtons.forEach(function (transportButton) {
          transportButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
            const selectedMode = transportButton.getAttribute('data-mode') || 'driving';
            transportModeElement.value = selectedMode;
            transportModeButtons.forEach(function (buttonItem) {
              buttonItem.classList.toggle('active', buttonItem === transportButton);
            });
            const hasSearchText = routeQueryElement && String(routeQueryElement.value || '').trim().length > 0;
            const hasSelectedSuggestion = !!state.selectedRouteSuggestion;
            const hasExistingDestination = !!state.destinationMarker;
            if (!hasSearchText && !hasSelectedSuggestion && !hasExistingDestination) {
              return;
            }
            handleRouteRequest().catch(function (error) {
              handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei automatischer Routenberechnung:', 'Route konnte nicht berechnet werden.');
            });
          });
        });
      }
      bindClickIfPresent(clearSearchInlineButton, clearSearchInputAndMap);
      bindClickIfPresent(mapStyleToggleButton, toggleMapStyle);
      if (routeQueryElement) {
        const setDestinationTarget = function () {
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
          state.activeWaypointRowId = null;
          state.activeSearchTarget = { kind: 'destination' };
          updateWaypointButtonState();
          const currentInputValue = String(routeQueryElement.value || '').trim();
          if (currentInputValue.length === 0) {
            showRecentRouteSuggestionsForQuery(currentInputValue);
          }
        };
        routeQueryElement.addEventListener('focus', setDestinationTarget);
        routeQueryElement.addEventListener('click', setDestinationTarget);
        routeQueryElement.addEventListener('keydown', function (keyboardEvent) {
          if (keyboardEvent.key === 'Enter') {
            keyboardEvent.preventDefault();
            handlePlaceSearch().catch(function (error) {
              handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei der Suche:', 'Ort konnte nicht gesucht werden.');
            });
          }
        });
        routeQueryElement.addEventListener('input', function () {
          state.selectedRouteSuggestion = null;
          updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
          if (state.routeSuggestTimer) {
            clearTimeout(state.routeSuggestTimer);
          }
          state.routeSuggestTimer = setTimeout(function () {
            fetchRouteSuggestions(routeQueryElement.value).catch(function (error) {
              if (error && error.name === 'AbortError') {
                return;
              }
              console.error('Fehler bei Suchvorschlägen:', error);
              hideRouteSuggestions();
            });
          }, ROUTE_INPUT_DEBOUNCE_MS);
        });
      }
      if (routeStartQueryElement) {
        const setStartTarget = function () {
          state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
          state.activeWaypointRowId = null;
          state.activeSearchTarget = { kind: 'start' };
          updateWaypointButtonState();
          const currentStartValue = String(routeStartQueryElement.value || '').trim();
          if (currentStartValue.length === 0) {
            showRecentRouteSuggestionsForQuery(currentStartValue);
          }
        };
        routeStartQueryElement.addEventListener('focus', setStartTarget);
        routeStartQueryElement.addEventListener('click', setStartTarget);
        routeStartQueryElement.addEventListener('keydown', function (keyboardEvent) {
          if (keyboardEvent.key === 'Enter') {
            keyboardEvent.preventDefault();
            const startQueryText = String(routeStartQueryElement.value || '').trim();
            if (!startQueryText) {
              state.selectedRouteStart = null;
              if (state.startMarker) {
                state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
                state.startMarker = null;
              }
              return;
            }
            searchDestinationCoordinates(startQueryText).then(function (resolvedStart) {
              state.selectedRouteStart = {
                lat: resolvedStart.lat,
                lon: resolvedStart.lon,
                label: resolvedStart.label,
                kind: 'place'
              };
              routeStartQueryElement.value = resolvedStart.label;
              addToRecentRouteSuggestions(resolvedStart);
              renderRouteStartMarker();
              updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
              if (state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
                return applyRouteFromCurrentServerPositionToDestinationIfAvailable(state.selectedRouteSuggestion);
              }
              return null;
            }).catch(function (error) {
              handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei der Start-Suche:', 'Startpunkt konnte nicht gefunden werden.');
            });
          }
        });
        routeStartQueryElement.addEventListener('input', function () {
          if (String(routeStartQueryElement.value || '').trim() === '') {
            state.selectedRouteStart = null;
          }
          updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
          if (state.routeSuggestTimer) {
            clearTimeout(state.routeSuggestTimer);
          }
          state.routeSuggestTimer = setTimeout(function () {
            fetchRouteSuggestions(routeStartQueryElement.value).catch(function (error) {
              if (error && error.name === 'AbortError') {
                return;
              }
              console.error('Fehler bei Start-Vorschlägen:', error);
              hideRouteSuggestions();
            });
          }, ROUTE_INPUT_DEBOUNCE_MS);
        });
      }
      bindClickIfPresent(clearStartInlineButton, function () {
        if (routeStartQueryElement) {
          routeStartQueryElement.value = '';
        }
        state.selectedRouteStart = null;
        if (state.startMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
          state.startMarker = null;
        }
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        hideRouteSuggestions();
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(useCurrentAsStartButton, function () {
        state.selectedRouteStart = null;
        if (state.startMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
          state.startMarker = null;
        }
        if (routeStartQueryElement) {
          routeStartQueryElement.value = 'Mein Standort';
        }
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        hideRouteSuggestions();
        if (state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
          applyRouteFromCurrentServerPositionToDestinationIfAvailable(state.selectedRouteSuggestion).catch(function (error) {
            handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler bei Routenberechnung:', 'Route konnte nicht berechnet werden.');
          });
        }
      });
      bindClickIfPresent(placeSheetCloseButton, closePlaceSheet);
      bindClickIfPresent(placeSheetToggleExpandButton, togglePlaceSheetFromHeaderChevron);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(placeSheetRouteButton, routeToPlaceSheetPoint, 'Fehler beim Anzeigen der Route:', 'Route konnte nicht berechnet werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(placeSheetMarkButton, savePlaceSheetPointAsPlace, 'Fehler beim Speichern des Ortes:', 'Ort konnte nicht gespeichert werden.');
      attachPlaceSheetDragGestures();
      if (waypointSuggestionsElement) {
        waypointSuggestionsElement.addEventListener('scroll', function () {
          if (state.waypointSuggestions.length > 0) {
            renderWaypointSuggestions();
          }
        });
      }
      if (routeSuggestionsElement) {
        routeSuggestionsElement.addEventListener('scroll', maybeRenderMoreSuggestionsOnScroll);
      }
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(deleteSelectedButton, deleteSelectedItems, 'Fehler beim Löschen der ausgewählten Einträge:', 'Einträge konnten nicht gelöscht werden.');
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(deleteAllButton, deleteAllItems, 'Fehler beim Löschen aller Einträge:', 'Einträge konnten nicht gelöscht werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(previousDeviceButton, function () { switchDevice(-1); });
      bindClickIfPresent(nextDeviceButton, function () { switchDevice(1); });
      bindClickIfPresent(toggleDeviceViewButton, toggleDeviceViewMode);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(dropDeviceButton, removeSelectedDevice, 'Fehler beim Entfernen des Geräts:', 'Gerät konnte nicht entfernt werden.');
      bindClickIfPresent(panelToggleButton, toggleControlPanel);
      bindClickIfPresent(searchToggleButton, toggleSearchPanel);
      bindAsyncClickIfPresent(locateToggleButton, centerOnCurrentLocation, 'Fehler bei Standortermittlung:', 'Standort konnte nicht ermittelt werden.');
      window.addEventListener('resize', updateDialogLayout);
      updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
      updateRouteActionVisibility();
      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
      updateWaypointButtonState();
      updateDialogLayout();
    });
    })();
  </script>
